local player = Knit.Player

local DataController = nil

local JUMPPOWER = 50
local JUMPDELAY = 0.2

local currentDoubleJump = 0
local hasJumped = 0
local loadedAnimation = nil
local maxJumps = 1
local hasTrail = false

function JumpController:KnitStart()
	self:StartCharacter(player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait())
	player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
		self:StartCharacter(character)
	end)

	UserInputService.JumpRequest:Connect(function()
		self:OnJump()
	end)

	DataController:Await():andThen(function(replica)
		local data = replica.Data

		maxJumps = data.jumps + 3

		replica:ListenToChange("jumps", function(newJumps)
			maxJumps = newJumps
		end)
	end)
end

function JumpController:KnitInit()
	DataController = Knit.GetController("DataController")
end


function JumpController:OnJump()
	local character = player.Character
	if not character then
		return
	end
	
	local Humanoid = character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
	if not Humanoid then
		return
	end
	
	local HumanoidRootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	if not HumanoidRootPart then
		return
	end
	
	if currentDoubleJump < maxJumps and not hasJumped then
		Humanoid.JumpPower = JUMPPOWER * 5
		Humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping)

		if currentDoubleJump >= 1 then
			loadedAnimation:Play()

			HumanoidRootPart.AssemblyLinearVelocity = HumanoidRootPart.CFrame.lookVector * 90 + Vector3.new(0, 70, 0)
		end

		currentDoubleJump += 1
		hasJumped = true
	end
end

function JumpController:StartCharacter(character)
	local characterTrove = Trove.new()
	characterTrove:AttachToInstance(character)

	local Humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")

	local animation = Instance.new("Animation")
	animation.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://11239413826"

	loadedAnimation = Humanoid:LoadAnimation(animation)	

	characterTrove:Add(Humanoid.StateChanged:connect(function(old, new)
		if new == Enum.HumanoidStateType.Freefall then
			if not hasTrail then
				self:SetTrail()
			end
			
			task.delay(JUMPDELAY, function()
				hasJumped = false
			end)
			return
		end
		
		if new == Enum.HumanoidStateType.Landed then
			self:RemoveTrail()
			hasJumped = false
			currentDoubleJump = 0
			Humanoid.JumpPower = JUMPPOWER
			return
		end
	end)) 
end

local Item = require(script.Parent.itemHandler)

local Inventory = {}
Inventory.__index = Inventory

function Inventory.new(maxSize)
	-- ... existing code ...

	local self = setmetatable({}, Inventory)

	local items = {}
	local noneItem = Item.new("None", 0, {})

	for i = 1, maxSize do
		-- Create a new instance of noneItem for each slot
		items[i] = Item.new(noneItem.name, noneItem.amount, noneItem.args)
	end

	self.items = items
	self.maxSize = maxSize

	return self
end


function Inventory:attributesMatch(attributes1, attributes2)
	for attribute, value in pairs(attributes2) do
		if attributes1.attributes[attribute] ~= value then
			return false
		end
	end
	return true
end

function Inventory:findSlotForItem(item)
	for index, existingItem in ipairs(self.items) do
		if existingItem.name == item.name and self:attributesMatch(existingItem.attributes, item.attributes) then
			return index
		end
	end

	for index, existingItem in ipairs(self.items) do
		if existingItem.name == "None" then
			return index
		end
	end

	return nil
end

local mouse = player:GetMouse()

-- Set the player's acceleration speed
local forwardVector = Vector3.new(0, 0, -1)
local acceleration = 1000000

-- This function aims the character at the mouse
function onAim()
	
	--Make sure the player character exists
	if player.Character then
		
		--Get the player position
		local rootPart = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart
		local playerPostion = rootPart.Position
		
		-- Get the mouse position
		local mousePosition = Vector3.new(mouse.Hit.x, playerPostion.y, mouse.Hit.z)
		
		-- Angle the player towards the mouse
		rootPart.CFrame = CFrame.lookAt(playerPostion, mousePosition)
		
	end
	
end

-- Moves the player
function movement(actionName, inputState)
		if player.Character then
		local vectorForce = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.VectorForce
		local particle1 = player.Character.Wing.ParticleEmitter
		local particle2 = player.Character.Wing2.ParticleEmitter
		local fire = player.Character.Fire.Fire
		local fire1 = player.Character.Fire1.Fire
		
		-- If the key is pressed down
		if inputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin then
			vectorForce.Force = forwardVector * acceleration
			particle1.Enabled = true
			particle2.Enabled = true
			fire.Enabled = true
			fire1.Enabled = true
			-- If the key is released	
		else
			vectorForce.Force = Vector3.new(0,0,0)
			particle1.Enabled = false
			particle2.Enabled = false
			fire.Enabled = false
			fire1.Enabled = false
		end

	end
	
end

-- Shoot a laser
function shoot(actionName, inputState)
	
	-- Make sure the mouse is pressed not realeased
	if inputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin then
		
		-- Get humanoid root part
		local root = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart
		
		-- Figure out where the laser should spawn
		local laserCFrame = root.CFrame + root.CFrame.LookVector * 12
		
		--Spawn our laser
		local newLaser = laser:Clone()
		newLaser.Parent = workspace.Lasers
		newLaser.CFrame = laserCFrame
		
		-- Make the lasers move
		newLaser.AssemblyLinearVelocity = newLaser.CFrame.LookVector * 500
		
		-- Destroy Lasers

local function runToTarget()
	local targetPosition = (maid.humanoidRootPart.Position - target.Position).Unit * ATTACK_RANGE + target.Position

	maid.humanoid:MoveTo(targetPosition)

	if not movingToAttack then
		maid.humanoid.WalkSpeed = random:NextInteger(ATTACK_MIN_WALKSPEED, ATTACK_MAX_WALKSPEED)
	end

	movingToAttack = true

	-- Stop the attack animation
	maid.attackAnimation:Stop()
end

local function attack()
	attacking = true
	lastAttackTime = tick()

	local originalWalkSpeed = maid.humanoid.WalkSpeed
	maid.humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0

	-- Play the attack animation
	maid.attackAnimation:Play()

	-- Create a part and use it as a collider, to find humanoids in front of the zombie
	-- This is not ideal, but it is the simplest way to achieve a hitbox
	local hitPart = Instance.new("Part")
	hitPart.Size = HITBOX_SIZE
	hitPart.Transparency = 1
	hitPart.CanCollide = true
	hitPart.Anchored = true
	hitPart.CFrame = maid.humanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, -1, -3)
	hitPart.Parent = Workspace

	local hitTouchingParts = hitPart:GetTouchingParts()

	-- Destroy the hitPart before it results in physics updates on touched parts
	hitPart:Destroy()

	-- Find humanoids to damage
	local attackedHumanoids	= {}
	for _, part in pairs(hitTouchingParts) do
		local parentModel = part:FindFirstAncestorOfClass("Model")
		if isInstaceAttackable(part) and not attackedHumanoids[parentModel]	then
			attackedHumanoids[parentModel.Humanoid] = true
		end
	end

	-- Damage the humanoids
	for humanoid in pairs(attackedHumanoids) do
		humanoid:TakeDamage(ATTACK_DAMAGE)
	end

	startPosition = maid.instance.PrimaryPart.Position

	wait(ATTACK_STAND_TIME)

	maid.humanoid.WalkSpeed = originalWalkSpeed

	maid.attackAnimation:Stop()

	attacking = false
end

--[[
	Event functions
]]

local function onHeartbeat()
	if target then
		-- Point towards the enemy
		maid.alignOrientation.Enabled = true
		maid.worldAttachment.CFrame = CFrame.new(maid.humanoidRootPart.Position, target.Position)
	else
		maid.alignOrientation.Enabled = false
	end

	if target then
		local inAttackRange = (target.Position - maid.humanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= ATTACK_RANGE + 1

		if inAttackRange then
			if not attacking and tick() - lastAttackTime > ATTACK_DELAY then
				attack()
			end
		else
			runToTarget()
		end
	end

	-- Check if the current target no longer exists or is not attackable
	if not target or not isInstaceAttackable(target) then
		findTargets()
	end
end

documentation things

ok so the kick/ban codes;
the code is in 2 parts, before and after the "-"
the first part is the type code, for example "XS" which is is bypassing client checks and the user is not banned for it
when the first part ends with "S" meaning soft, it means that the user is not banned, but they are kicked
when the first part ends with "H" meaning hard,  it means that the user is banned and cannot join back until unbanned
the second part after the "-" is the location identifier, it should be in hex is 4 chars long and manually randomly selected for each kick
the reason for this is to make it more cryptic and harder to find what caused the kick when on the client

the list of type codes and the definitions of each are as follows:

(automated detection)
XS - bypassing client checks (soft)
FS - flooding the server with requests or data (soft)
DH - exploiting a bug/glitch with exploits (hard)



(hard bans handed out by moderators/admins, the first part of these end in a "H" because it can only really be hard)
IH - impersonating staff or other players (hard)
TH - threatening others with harm or death (hard)

-- This module allows frames within Plugins to be dragged
-- around, be placed at some other frame position, and have their data accessed.
-- Known Issues : It was made to work on widgets of a fixed size,
-- so the MinWidget and MinHeight of the widget should be also their max
-- Using UISizeConstraint on the main widget frame is recommended.

local WidgetDrag = {}

local icon = nil

--------------------------
------------Local functions -----------------------------
local function GetSlotAbsolutePosition(Slot) : Vector2
	local SlotsFrame = Slot.Parent
	local relativePos = Vector2.new(Slot.Position.X.Scale * SlotsFrame["AbsoluteSize"].X, Slot.Position.Y.Scale * SlotsFrame["AbsoluteSize"].Y)
	local absolutePosA = SlotsFrame["AbsolutePosition"]
	local absolutePosB = relativePos + absolutePosA
	return absolutePosB
end

local function IsUnderMouse(frame : Frame) : boolean

	local mousePosition = pluginWidget:GetRelativeMousePosition()
	local framePosition = GetSlotAbsolutePosition(frame)
	local NormalizedMousePosX = mousePosition.X
	local NormalizedMousePosY = mousePosition.Y

	local nMousePos = Vector2.new(NormalizedMousePosX, NormalizedMousePosY)
	local cursorOverFrame = 
		nMousePos.X >= framePosition.X and 
		nMousePos.X <= framePosition.X + frame["AbsoluteSize"].X and 
		nMousePos.Y >= framePosition.Y and 
		nMousePos.Y <= framePosition.Y + frame["AbsoluteSize"].Y 
	

	if cursorOverFrame then
		return true
	else
		return false
	end
end
local function GetDropTarget(targetParent : Frame) : Frame
	for each, child in pairs(targetParent:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("Frame") and child.Visible == true then 
			if IsUnderMouse(child) then
				warn(child.Name)
				return child
			end
		end 
	end
	return nil
end

local function SortZIndexRecursively(frame)
	if frame:IsA("GuiBase2d") then
		local children = frame:GetChildren()
		if #children == 0 then
			warn("Sorting UI : Done")
			return
		end

		for each, child in ipairs(children) do
			if child:IsA("GuiBase2d") then
				child["ZIndex"] = frame["ZIndex"] + each
				SortZIndexRecursively(child)
			end
		end
	end
end

local function AdminCommand(Player, Command)
	if table.find(Admins, Player.Name) then
		local Args = string.split(Command, " ")
		local Cmd = table.remove(Args, 1)
		
		if Commands[Cmd] then
			return Commands[Cmd](Player, Args)
		end
		
		return false
	end
	
	return false
end

function recurse(obj,func)
	for k,i in ipairs(obj:GetChildren()) do
		func(i)
		recurse(i,func)
	end
end

local function spawnInter()
	script.Parent.Line:TweenSize(beforSizePic,Enum.EasingDirection.InOut,Enum.EasingStyle.Sine,2)
	for i = 0.1,1,0.1 do
		script.Parent.Time.TextTransparency -= i
		script.Parent.Namei.TextTransparency -= i
		wait(0.1)
	end
end
local function despawnInter()
	script.Parent.Line:TweenSize(UDim2.new(0,0,0,4),Enum.EasingDirection.InOut,Enum.EasingStyle.Sine,2)
	for i = 0.1,1,0.1 do
		script.Parent.Time.TextTransparency += i
		script.Parent.Namei.TextTransparency += i
		wait(0.1)
	end
	
end

function SwordUp()
	Tool.GripForward = Vector3.new(-1, 0, 0)
	Tool.GripRight = Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
	Tool.GripUp = Vector3.new(0, 0, 1)
end

function SwordOut()
	Tool.GripForward = Vector3.new(0, 0, 1)
	Tool.GripRight = Vector3.new(0, -1, 0)
	Tool.GripUp = Vector3.new(-1, 0, 0)
end

function GetDistance(Position1, Position2)
	local Distance = (Position1.Position - Position2.Position).Magnitude
	
	if Distance > 10 and Tool.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid").Health ~= 0 then
		warn("Potential distance exploit detected. Attack by:", Tool.Parent.Name)
		Tool:Destroy()
		return
	end
end

function Activated()
	if not Enabled then
		return
	end
	
	Enabled = false
	
	local Character = Tool.Parent
	local Humanoid = Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")

	if Humanoid == nil then
		warn("Humanoid not found")
		return
	end

	local Timing = RunService.Stepped:Wait()

	if Timing - LastAttack < 0.2 then
		Lunge()
		Damage = DamageTable.LungeDamage
	else
		Slash()
		Damage = DamageTable.SlashDamage
	end
	
	LastAttack = Timing
	Enabled = true
end

function Equipped()
	if Tool:FindFirstChild("DamageBonus") and Tool.DamageBonus.Value == true then
		DamageTable.SlashDamage = 10
		DamageTable.LungeDamage = 30
	else
		DamageTable.SlashDamage = 5
		DamageTable.LungeDamage = 15
	end
end

local function onActivated()
	
	--anchor player
	player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
	
	--uncollide player
	for _, part in pairs(player.Character:GetChildren()) do
		if part:IsA("BasePart") then
			part.CanCollide = false
		end
	end
	
	--make a burrow ability
	local burrowAbility = Instance.new("BoolValue")
	burrowAbility.Name = "Burrow"
	burrowAbility.Parent = player.Character.Humanoid
	
	--make a burrow sound
	local burrowSound = Instance.new("Sound")
	burrowSound.SoundId = "rbxassetid://138186576"
	burrowSound.Volume = 0.5
	burrowSound.Parent = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart
	
	--wait for ability to be activated
	while not burrowAbility.Value do wait() end
	
	--play sound and hide character
	player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Transparency = 1
	player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CanCollide = false
	player.Character.Head.Transparency = 1
	player.Character.Head.CanCollide = false	
	burrowSound:Play()
	
	--wait for ability to be deactivated or tool unequipped, then unhide character and stop sounds/effects.

		player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CanCollide = true
		for _, part in pairs(player.Character:GetChildren()) do
			if part:IsA("BasePart") then
				part.CanCollide=true;
			end;
			if part.Name == "Head" then 
				part.Transparency=0;

function CameraSwitcher:Initialize()
	local cameras = CAMERAS_FOLDER:GetChildren()

	for i, camera in cameras do
		local prompt : ProximityPrompt = camera:FindFirstChildWhichIsA('ProximityPrompt', true)
		self._maid:GiveTask(prompt.Triggered:Connect(function(playerWhoTrigger)
			if playerWhoTrigger == LOCAL_PLAYER then
				self:SetCamera(camera.Name)
			end
		end)) 
	end
end

function CameraSwitcher:SetCamera(cameraName)
	self.ActualCamera = cameraName
	if cameraName == 'Roblox' then
		CONTROLS:Enable()
		self.Camera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Custom
		self.CameraState = CAMERA_DICTIONARY.Default
	else
		CONTROLS:Disable()
		self.CameraState = CAMERA_DICTIONARY.Custom
		self.Camera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Scriptable
		local cameraInfo = CAMERA_LIST[cameraName]
		if cameraInfo == nil then 
			return
		end
	
		local cameraModel = cameraInfo.Model
		local cameraPreset = cameraInfo.Preset
		self.Camera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Scriptable
		local cameraFocus = cameraModel:FindFirstChild('Focus', true)
		local cameraTarget = cameraModel:FindFirstChild('Target', true)
		local TweeenService = game:GetService('TweenService')
		local tweenTrack = TweeenService:Create(self.Camera, BASE_TWEENINFO, {CFrame = CFrame.new(cameraFocus.WorldPosition, cameraTarget.WorldPosition)})
		tweenTrack:Play()
		tweenTrack.Completed:Wait()
		if cameraInfo.Movement ~= nil then
			local hasWaypoints = cameraModel:FindFirstChild('WaypointsAttachment', true)
			if hasWaypoints then
				self.Waypoints = hasWaypoints
				self.CurrentWaypoint = self.Waypoints:FindFirstChild('1')
				self.LastWaypointNumber = #self.Waypoints:GetChilren()
				self:TrackCameraMovement()
			end
		end
		self:TurnOnCamera()
	end
end

function CameraSwitcher:TrackCameraMovement()
	if self.IsTracking then
		self:UntrackCameraMovement()
	end
	self.IsTracking = true
	
	local function RotateCameraHandler(actionName, inputState, _inputObject)
		local imputMultiplier = 1
		if inputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
			imputMultiplier = -1
		end
		if actionName == 'TurnCameraRight' then
			self.MoveTable.Turn += 1 * imputMultiplier
		elseif actionName == 'TurnCameraLeft' then
			self.MoveTable.Turn += (-1) * imputMultiplier
		end
	end

	local function MoveCameraHandler(actionName, inputState, _inputObject)
		local imputMultiplier = 1
		if inputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
			imputMultiplier = -1
		end
		if actionName == 'MoveCameraFront' then
			self.MoveTable.Move += 1 * imputMultiplier
		elseif actionName == 'MoveCameraBack' then
			self.MoveTable.Move += (-1) * imputMultiplier
		end
	end
	
	ContextActionService:BindAction('TurnCameraRight', RotateCameraHandler, false, Enum.KeyCode.D)
	ContextActionService:BindAction('TurnCameraLeft', RotateCameraHandler, false, Enum.KeyCode.A)
	ContextActionService:BindAction('MoveCameraFront', MoveCameraHandler, false, Enum.KeyCode.W)
	ContextActionService:BindAction('MoveCameraBack', MoveCameraHandler, false, Enum.KeyCode.S)

local TeleportModule = {}
local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local PlayerMiscData = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerMiscData_TestServer_014", "Location")
local currentLocation = game:GetService("ServerStorage").Data.Location.Value
local setTPGui = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Events.GuiEvents.SetTeleportGui

function TeleportModule.Teleport(player, location)	
	
	setTPGui:FireClient(player, location)
	local SystemData = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("SystemData_TestServer_013", location)
	local ID = nil

	for i = 1,4 do
		if i == 4 then
			player:Kick("Error connecting to server.")
		end
		local success = pcall(function()
			ID = SystemData:GetAsync("ReservedServerAccessCode")
		end)

		if success then 
			break
		end

		task.wait(1)
	end

	local options = Instance.new("TeleportOptions")

	PlayerMiscData:UpdateAsync(player.UserId, function()
		return location
	end)

	task.wait(2)


	if location ~= currentLocation then
		if ID then
			options.ReservedServerAccessCode = ID
			local success = pcall(function()
				TeleportService:TeleportAsync(13455109167, {player}, options)
			end)

			if not success then
				options.ShouldReserveServer = true
				local result = TeleportService:TeleportAsync(13455109167, {player}, options)
				SystemData:SetAsync("ReservedServerAccessCode", result.ReservedServerAccessCode)
				SystemData:SetAsync("PrivateServerId", result.PrivateServerId)
			end
		else
			options.ShouldReserveServer = true
			local result = TeleportService:TeleportAsync(13455109167, {player}, options)
			SystemData:SetAsync("ReservedServerAccessCode", result.ReservedServerAccessCode)
			SystemData:SetAsync("PrivateServerId", result.PrivateServerId)
		end
	else
		TeleportService:TeleportToPlaceInstance(game.PlaceId, game.JobId, player)
	end
end

return TeleportModule

local function getRandomResult(inputTable): number
	local inputs: {number} = {}

	for _, item in pairs(inputTable) do
		if type(item) == "table" and item.Rate ~= nil and type(item.Rate) == "number" then
			table.insert(inputs, item.Rate)
		end
	end
	-- Check if inputs is a table
	if type(inputs) ~= "table" then
		error("Error: Invalid inputs. Expected a table.")
	end

	-- Check if inputs are numbers and sum up to 1
	local total = 0
	for i = 1, #inputs do
		if type(inputs[i]) ~= "number" then
			error("Error: Invalid input at index " .. i .. ". Expected a number.")
		end
		total = total + inputs[i]
	end

	if total ~= 1 then
		error("Error: Inputs do not add up to 1.")
	end

	local chances = {}
	for i = 1, #inputs do
		chances[i] = inputs[i] * 100
	end

	local totalChance = 0
	local randomNumber = math.random(100)

	for i = 1, #inputs do
		totalChance = totalChance + chances[i]

		if randomNumber <= totalChance then
			return inputs[i]
		end
	end

	error("Error: Unable to determine the result.")
end

function BannerService:_isBanner(banner): boolean
	if banner.Name and banner.Rarity and banner.Rate then
		if typeof(banner.Name) == "string" and typeof(banner.Rarity) == "string" and typeof(banner.Rate) == "number" then
			return true
		else
			return false
		end
	else
		return false
	end
end

function BannerService:_canSummon(player: Player): boolean
	if (Money.GetDataMoney(player) > self._summonPrice and Money.GetMoney(player) > self._summonPrice) then
		return true
	else
		return false
	end
end

-- BEGIN Player Air Levels --
function IsUnderWater:ReadVoxel(pos)
	local res = 4
	local radius = 1
	local minBounds = Vector3.new(
		math.floor((pos.X - radius) / res) * res,
		math.floor((pos.Y - radius) / res) * res,
		math.floor((pos.Z - radius) / res) * res)
	local maxBounds = Vector3.new(
		math.ceil((pos.X + radius) / res) * res,
		math.ceil((pos.Y + radius) / res) * res,
		math.ceil((pos.Z + radius) / res) * res)
	local region = Region3.new(minBounds, maxBounds)	
	return game.Workspace.Terrain:ReadVoxels(region, res)
end

function IsUnderWater:HasWaterAtHead(character)
	local headPosition = nil
	local hasWaterAtHead = false
	local head = character:FindFirstChild('Head')		
	if head then
		local headPosition = game.Workspace.Terrain:WorldToCell(head.Position)
		hasWaterAtHead = game.Workspace.Terrain:GetWaterCell(headPosition.x, headPosition.y, headPosition.z)
	end
	return hasWaterAtHead
end

function IsUnderWater:GetMaterialAtMouth(character, maxDistance)
	local material = nil
	local target = nil
	local headPosition = nil
	local head = character:FindFirstChild('Head')		
	if head then
		local cframe = head.CFrame
		headPosition = cframe.p
		target = headPosition + cframe.UpVector.Unit * 3
		local mat, occupancy = self:ReadVoxel(target)
		material = mat[1][1][1]
	end
	return material, target, headPosition, head
end

function IsUnderWater:OnPlayerAdded(player)
	self.__base.OnPlayerAdded(self, player)
	
	local IsUnderWaterProperty = self.Controller.GetPlayerMetricProperty(player, 'IsUnderWater', 'Value')
	local IsSwimmingProperty = self.Controller.GetPlayerMetricProperty(player, 'IsSwimming', 'Value')
	
	self.PlayerBindings[player] = {
		IsUnderWater = IsUnderWaterProperty,
		IsSwimming = IsSwimmingProperty
	}
end

	self.__base.OnStateChanged(self, player, character, humanoid, oldState, newState, transition)
	
	self.IsSeated =

--Welcome to a tutorial over Shelf.
--But first, what is Shelf?
--Shelf is a custom class built onto the array part of tables.¹
--It is a class that allows you to quickly store data in an array, but with the ability to modify it by values.
--What does it mean? It means you can index through arrays not by their index, but the values stored in it.
--For example, if you have an array of numbers, and you want to find the index of a number in it, you can quickly call the number you want to find and it'll return its index.
--This is useful for many things, such as finding the index of a player in an array of players, or keeping track of thousands of parts at once while also maintaining the #len feature of tables.
--But (surprise, surprise!) it can also be paired up with mathematical operations to make storing, removing and fetching values faster!
--Let's jump onto an example, shall we?
One+=1
--Here, we performed an addition onto the shelf "One", which then indexed the number 1 into its array.

-- << math.log(x,b) >> -------------------------------------------------------------------------

Que es el logartimo?: 
la logaritmacion es una operacion que se usa para calcular el exponente al que se tiene que elevar
cierto numero para obtener un resultado especifico.

Ejemplos:

x = el numero que quieres potenciar
b = el resultado que quieres obtener

- math.log(16,2) == 4 
el 2 tiene que multiplicarse las veces necesarias para que 16; 4 veces, entonces 2^4 = 16.

-- 2^x = 16
math.log() es para encontrar el valor de la icognita exponente; math.log(16,2), el exponente es 4.
 
-- << math.random(d,a) >> -------------------------------------------------------------------------

Que es math.random()?:
math.random() es una funcion que se usa para obtener un numero aleatorio entre la cantidad definida

Ejemplos:
d = el numero en donde empieza la cantidad de numeros aleatorios
a = el numero en donde termina la cantidad de numeros aleatorios

- math.random(1,10) == Numero aleatorio del 1 al 10

Ejemplos:
x = el numero que quieres potenciar
y = la cantidad de veces que se multiplicara x por si mismo

- math.pow(10,5) = 100000 = 10 * 10 * 10 * 10 * 10, 10 multiplicado por si mismo 5 veces es igual a 100000.

guisystem.dropdown(changed_function, parent, selected_string, string_options_table)
-- "changed_function" must be a function callback for when the slider changes, with the
-- format function(new_val, old_val)
-- "parent" is the parent GUI element to have the slider [slider autoscales to parent]
-- "selected_string" is a string of the current data
-- "string_options_table" is a dictionary of all of the string options
-- <dropDownModule>

-- Example code
```
local function changed_function(new_val, old_val)
	print(new_val)
end

local guiObject = guisystem.dropdown(changed_function, parent, selected_string, string_options_table)

guiObject:Disconnect() -- disconnect all input events

guiObject:Reconnect() -- reconnect all input events

guiObject:Destroy() -- destroy the slider UI and Object.
```

guisystem.truefalse(changed_function, parent, bool_current)
-- Creates a true/false button
-- "changed_function" must be a function callback for when the slider changes, with the
-- format function(new_val, old_val)
-- "parent" is the parent GUI element to have the slider [slider autoscales to parent]
-- "bool_current" is the bool of the current data
-- <trueFalseModule>

--Localscript client-side
```
local trueFalseSelector = guisystem.truefalse(changed_function, parent, bool_current)

trueFalseSelector:Disconnect() -- disconnect all input events

trueFalseSelector:Reconnect() -- reconnect all input events

trueFalseSelector:Destroy() -- destroy the slider UI and Object.

-- Waits for the child of the specified parent
local function WaitForChild(parent, childName)
	while not parent:FindFirstChild(childName) do parent.ChildAdded:wait() end
	return parent[childName]
end

local MyHumanoid

local function PlayAnimation(animationName)
	if Animations[animationName] then
		Animations[animationName]:Play()
	end
end

local function StopAnimation(animationName)
	if Animations[animationName] then
		Animations[animationName]:Stop()
	end
end

local Character = script.Parent
local Humanoid = Character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local PathfindingService = game:GetService("PathfindingService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

-- This is the pathfinding service that will be used to find a path
local PathService = PathfindingService:CreatePath()
-- This is the path that will be used to store the path
local Path = nil
-- This is the goal that will be used to store the goal
local Goal = nil

-- This is the function that will be used to find a path
function FindPath()
	-- This is the start position of the path
	local StartPosition = Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
	-- This is the end position of the path
	local EndPosition = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
	
	-- This sets up the goal for our pathfinding service
	Goal = PathService:ComputeAsync(StartPosition, EndPosition)
end

-- This is the function that will be used to move our character
function MoveCharacter()
	-- This checks if we have a path and a goal
	if Path ~= nil and Goal ~= nil then
		-- This gets the next waypoint in our path
		local Waypoint = Path:GetWaypoint(1)
		
		-- This sets up the humanoid's walk speed to 16 (the default value)
		Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
		
		if Waypoint.Action == Enum.PathWaypointAction.Jump then
			Humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping)
			
			wait(0.5)
			
			Humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Freefall)
			
			wait(0.5)
			
			Humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.GettingUp)
			
			wait(0.5)
		end
	end
end

-- This is the function that will be used to update our path
function UpdatePath()
	-- This checks if we have a goal
	if Goal ~= nil then
		-- This gets the status of our goal
		local Status = PathService:GetStatus(Goal)
		
		if Status == Enum.PathStatus.Success then
			Path = PathService:CreatePath()
			
			Path:ComputeAsync(Goal)
			
			Goal = nil
			
			MoveCharacter()
		end
		
	elseif Goal == nil and Path ~= nil then
		MoveCharacter()
	end
	
	wait(0.5)
	
	UpdatePath()
end

-- This is the function that will be used to find a path
function FindPath()
	-- This is the start position of the path
	local StartPosition = Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
	-- This is the end position of the path
	local EndPosition = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
	
	-- This sets up the goal for our pathfinding service
	Goal = PathService:ComputeAsync(StartPosition, EndPosition)
end

local			function DoSomethingWithALoadedProfile(Spieler : Player, Profil)
				COLLECTION:AddTag()
	
				local		Spielerstats							=			Instance.new("Folder")		
							Spielerstats.Name						=			"leaderstats"
							Spielerstats.Parent						=			Spieler
	
				local		CashVal									=			Instance.new("IntValue")
							CashVal.Name							=			"Cash"
							CashVal.Value							=			Profil.Data.Statistiken.Cash
	
	
				coroutine.wrap(function()
							while		task.wait() do
										CashVal.Value				=			Profil.Data.Statistiken.Cash
							end
				end)()
	
				print(Spieler.Name.." ist beigetreten. Spielerprofil:", Profil)
end

local			function PlayerAdded(Spieler : Player)
				local			Profil								=			ProfileStore:LoadProfileAsync("Spieler_"..Spieler.UserId)
				if				not Profil then
								Spieler:Kick("Your profile could not be loaded. Try again later.")
								return
				end
		
				Profil:AddUserId(Spieler.UserId)
				Profil:Reconcile()
				Profil:ListenToRelease(function()
								DatenManager.Profile[Spieler]		=			Profil
								Spieler:Kick("Hey bro, you shouldn't be here (anymore). Feel free to join again.")
				end)
	
				if				Spieler:IsDescendantOf(PLAYERS) then
								DatenManager.Profile[Spieler]		=			Profil
								DoSomethingWithALoadedProfile(Spieler, Profil)
				else
								Profil:Release()
				end
end
local			function PlayerRemoving(Spieler : Player)
				local			Profil								=			DatenManager.Profile[Spieler]
				if				Profil == nil then return end
				Profil:Release()
end

	local terminalHolderFrame: Frame = terminalInterface:WaitForChild("Holder")
	local terminalCLIFrame: Frame = terminalHolderFrame:WaitForChild("CLI")
	local inputBox: TextBox = terminalCLIFrame:WaitForChild("Input")
	local systemTitle: TextLabel = terminalHolderFrame:WaitForChild("Title")
	
	local self = {
		connections = {},
		lines = {},
		history = {
			currentIndex = 0,
			list = {},
		},
		inputAllowed = false
	}
	
	-- functions
	function self:toggleInput(inputAllowed: boolean)
		inputBox.TextEditable = inputAllowed
		inputBox.Visible = inputAllowed
		self.inputAllowed = inputAllowed
		
		if not inputAllowed then
			if inputBox:IsFocused() then
				inputBox:ReleaseFocus()
			end
		else
			inputBox:CaptureFocus()
		end
	end
	
	function self:shutDown()
		self:toggleInput(false)
		
		if #self.connections > 0 then
			GlobalUtility.DisconnectTable(self.connections)
		end
		
		-- TODO shut down effects
	end
	
	function self:writeLine(text: string, color: Color3?, includeTime: boolean?): (TextLabel, string)
		color = color or Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		
		local newLabel: TextLabel = lineTemplate:Clone()
		newLabel.TextColor3 = color
		newLabel.Text = `{includeTime and "[TIME] " or ""}{text}`
		newLabel.Parent = terminalCLIFrame
		
		table.insert(self.lines, 1, newLabel)
		
		local max: number = 12
		if #self.lines > max then
			for i = max + 1, #self.lines do
				local ref: TextLabel? = self.lines[i]
				if ref then
					ref:Destroy()
					self.lines[i] = nil
				end
			end 
		end
		
		return newLabel, newLabel.Text
	end
	
	function self:clearInput()
		inputBox.Text = ""
	end
	
	function self:clearLines()
		for _, line: Instance in terminalCLIFrame:GetChildren() do
			if line:IsA("TextLabel") then
				line:Destroy()
			end
		end
		self.lines = {}
	end
	
	-- local functions
	local function updateCursor()
		local len: number = #termData.OS_LINE + 1
		if inputBox.CursorPosition < len then
			inputBox.CursorPosition = len
		end
	end
	
	local function formatDisplayText()
		local searchTerm = `^{termData.OS_LINE}`
		local searchText = inputBox.Text

		if not string.find(searchText, searchTerm) then

	local chatcolor = CHAT_COLORS[(GetNameValue(sender) % #CHAT_COLORS) + 1]
	
	local senderf = sender .. ": "
	local messageframe = messagetemplate:Clone()
	local messagetext = messageframe.MessageText
	local playername = messageframe.PlayerName
	
	messageframe.Visible = true
	messageframe.Fade.Disabled = false
	
	playername.Text = senderf
	
	messagetext.Text = senderf .. text
	--if playername is on a team, then use that color instead
	if game.Players:FindFirstChild(sender) then
		local player = game.Players[sender]
		if player.TeamColor then
			playername.TextColor3 = player.TeamColor.Color
		else
			playername.TextColor3 = chatcolor
		end

documentation things

ok so the kick/ban codes;
the code is in 2 parts, before and after the "-"
the first part is the type code, for example "XS" which is is bypassing client checks and the user is not banned for it
when the first part ends with "S" meaning soft, it means that the user is not banned, but they are kicked
when the first part ends with "H" meaning hard,  it means that the user is banned and cannot join back until unbanned
the second part after the "-" is the location identifier, it should be in hex is 4 chars long and manually randomly selected for each kick
the reason for this is to make it more cryptic and harder to find what caused the kick when on the client

the list of type codes and the definitions of each are as follows:

(automated detection)
XS - bypassing client checks (soft)
FS - flooding the server with requests or data, soft
DH - exploiting a bug/glitch with exploits, hard
SS - spamming the chat or other players, soft
TS - using a third party program to gain an advantage, hard
CS - exploiting a bug/glitch without an exploit, soft
MS - using a macro or other automated program, hard
PS - exploiting the physics engine to gain an advantage, hard

local function GetSlotAbsolutePosition(Slot: Frame): Vector2
	local SlotsFrame : Frame = Slot.Parent

	local absolutePosA : Vector2 = SlotsFrame.AbsolutePosition
	local absolutePosB : Vector2 = Vector2.new(absolutePosA.X + (Slot.AbsolutePosition.X * SlotsFrame.AbsoluteSize.X), absolutePosA.Y + (Slot.AbsolutePosition.Y * SlotsFrame.AbsoluteSize.Y))

	return absolutePosB
end

local function IsUnderMouse(frame : Frame) : boolean
	warn("Checking if ", frame, " under the mouse")
	local mousePosition = pluginWidget:GetRelativeMousePosition()
	local framePosition = frame.AbsolutePosition
	local NormalizedMousePosX = mousePosition.X 
	local NormalizedMousePosY = mousePosition.Y

	local nMousePos = Vector2.new(NormalizedMousePosX, NormalizedMousePosY)
	local frameXBorder = framePosition.X + frame["AbsoluteSize"].X
	local frameYBorder = framePosition.Y + frame["AbsoluteSize"].Y

	local frameBorders = UDim2.new(framePosition.X, frameXBorder, framePosition.Y, frameYBorder)
	
	local cursorOverFrame = 
		nMousePos.X >= frameBorders.X.Scale and 
		nMousePos.X <= frameBorders.X.Offset and 
		nMousePos.Y >= frameBorders.Y.Scale and 
		nMousePos.Y <= frameBorders.Y.Offset 
	
	if cursorOverFrame then
		warn("Found something")
		return true
	else
		warn("Found nothing")
		warn("Frame Borders ", frameBorders)
		warn("Mouse Position ", nMousePos)
		return false
	end
end
local function GetDropTarget(targetParent : Frame) : Frame
	warn(targetParent, " children being checked")
	for each, child in pairs(targetParent:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("Frame") and child.Visible == true then 
			if IsUnderMouse(child) then
				warn(child.Name)
				return child
			end
		end 
	end
	return nil
end

local function SortZIndexRecursively(frame)
	if frame:IsA("GuiBase2d") then
		local children = frame:GetChildren()
		if #children == 0 then
			warn("Sorting UI : Done")
			return
		end

		for each, child in ipairs(children) do
			if child:IsA("GuiBase2d") then
				child["ZIndex"] = frame["ZIndex"] + each
				SortZIndexRecursively(child)
			end
		end
	end
end

	if target:FindFirstChild("Tooltip") then
		target.Tooltip:Destroy()
	end
	
	target.MouseEnter

local http = game:GetService("HttpService")

--Allow web request.
--You need your own OpenAI Codex API key for the engine and Trainer.
--This is just a basic code, you need professional knowledge and large dataset.
--You need to modify a lot to use this.

-- Define your OpenAI API key
local API_KEY = "your_api_key"

-- Define a function to generate code based on a random prompt from the dataset
function generate_code()
	-- Load the dataset from datastore
	local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
	local datastore = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("OpenAI_DataStore")
	local dataset = datastore:GetAsync("dataset")

	local prompt = dataset[math.random(#dataset)]

	local response = http:PostAsync(
		"https://api.openai.com/v1/engines/text-davinci-002/completions",
		'{"prompt": "' .. prompt .. '", "max_tokens": 1024, "n": 1, "stop": null, "temperature": 0.5}',
		Enum.HttpContentType.ApplicationJson,
		{
			["Authorization"] = "Bearer " .. API_KEY,
		}
	)

	local json = http:JSONDecode(response)
	return json.choices[1].text
end

function NeuralNetwork:activate(x)
	-- Sigmoid activation function
	return 1 / (1 + math.exp(-x))
end

function NeuralNetwork:forward(input)
	local hidden = {}
	local output = {}

	-- Compute hidden layer activations
	for i = 1, self.hiddenSize do
		local sum = 0
		for j = 1, self.inputSize do
			sum = sum + input[j] * self.weightsInputHidden[j][i]
		end
		sum = sum + self.biasHidden[i]
		hidden[i] = self:activate(sum)
	end

	-- Compute output layer activations
	for i = 1, self.outputSize do
		local sum = 0
		for j = 1, self.hiddenSize do
			sum = sum + hidden[j] * self.weightsHiddenOutput[j][i]
		end
		sum = sum + self.biasOutput[i]
		output[i] = self:activate(sum)
	end

	return output
end

function NeuralNetwork:mutate(rate)
	-- Mutate the weights and biases of the neural network
	for i = 1, self.hiddenSize do
		for j = 1, self.inputSize do
			if math.random() < rate then
				-- Add random value between -0.1 and 0.1 to the weight
				self.weightsInputHidden[j][i] = self.weightsInputHidden[j][i] + (math.random() * 0.2 - 0.1)
			end
		end
		if math.random() < rate then
			-- Add random value between -0.1 and 0.1 to the bias
			self.biasHidden[i] = self.biasHidden[i] + (math.random() * 0.2 - 0.1)
		end
	end

	for i = 1, self.outputSize do
		for j = 1, self.hiddenSize do
			if math.random() < rate then
				-- Add random value between -0.1 and 0.1 to the weight
				self.weightsHiddenOutput[j][i] = self.weightsHiddenOutput[j][i] + (math.random() * 0.2 - 0.1)
			end
		end
		if math.random() < rate then
			-- Add random value between -0.1 and 0.1 to the bias
			self.biasOutput[i] = self.biasOutput[i] + (math.random() * 0.2 - 0.1)
		end
	end
end

function Change(Color, Text)
	local Button1 = script.Parent.Button1
	local Button2 = script.Parent.Button2
	Button2.Button.Color = Color
	Button2.Base.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.TextColor3 = Color
	Button2.Light.Color = Color
	Button1.Button.Color = Color
	Button1.Base.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.TextColor3 = Color
	Button1.Light.Color = Color
	Button2.Base.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text = Text
	Button1.Base.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text = Text
end

local isOpen = Folder.isOpen
local Moving = false

function Trigger()
	if not isOpen.Value and not Moving then
		Moving = true
		Change(Color3.new(1,1,0), "Moving")
		Folder.Frame.Open:Play()
		OpenR:Play()
		OpenL:Play()
		wait(3.25)
		Moving = false
		isOpen.Value = true
		Change(Color3.new(0,1,0), "Open")
	elseif isOpen.Value and not Moving then
		Moving = true
		Change(Color3.new(1,1,0), "Moving")
		Folder.Frame.Close:Play()
		CloseR:Play()
		CloseL:Play()
		wait(3.1)
		Moving = false
		isOpen.Value = false
		Change(Color3.new(0,0,1), "Closed")
	end
end

local isLocked = false
function Lock()
	if isLocked == false then 
		if Moving then repeat wait(.1) until not Moving end
		if isOpen then
			Frame["Close"]:Play()
			CloseL:Play()
			CloseR:Play()
		end
		Moving = true
		Change(Color3.new(1,0,0), "LOCKDOWN")
		isLocked = true
	elseif isLocked == true then
		Moving = false
		isOpen.Value = false
		Change(Color3.new(0,0.4,1), "Closed")
		isLocked = false
	end
end

function CreateFolder (Parent)
	local Folder = Instance.new("Folder")
	Folder.Parent = Parent
	Folder.Name = "User_Data"
	
	local Towers = Instance.new("Folder")
	Towers.Parent = Folder
	Towers.Name = "Towers"
	
	local TowerSkins = Instance.new("Folder")
	TowerSkins.Name = "TowerSkins"
	TowerSkins.Parent = Folder
	
	local Cash = Instance.new("IntValue")
	Cash.Parent = Folder
	Cash.Name = "Cash"
	
	local Level = Instance.new("IntValue")
	Level.Parent = Folder
	Level.Name = "Level"
	
	local XP = Instance.new("IntValue")
	XP.Parent = Folder
	XP.Name = "XP"
	
	local MaxXP = Instance.new("IntValue")
	MaxXP.Parent = Folder
	MaxXP.Name = "MaxXP"
	
	local Wins = Instance.new("IntValue")
	Wins.Parent = Folder
	Wins.Name = "Wins"
	
	local Defeats = Instance.new("IntValue")
	Defeats.Parent = Folder
	Defeats.Name = "Defeats"
	
	local Quits = Instance.new("IntValue")
	Quits.Name = "Quits"
	Quits.Parent = Folder
	
	local Kills = Instance.new("IntValue")
	Kills.Name = "Kills"
	Kills.Parent = Folder
	
	return Folder,Towers,Cash,Level,XP,MaxXP,Wins,Defeats,TowerSkins,Kills
end

local function mouseRaycast(model)
	local raycastParams = RaycastParams.new()
	
	local blacklist = camera:GetChildren()
	table.insert(blacklist, model)
	
	raycastParams.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Blacklist
	raycastParams.FilterDescendantsInstances = blacklist
	
	local mousePosition = userInputService:GetMouseLocation()

	local mouseRay = camera:ViewportPointToRay(mousePosition.X, mousePosition.Y)

	local raycastResult = workspace:Raycast(mouseRay.Origin, mouseRay.Direction * 1000, raycastParams)
	
	return raycastResult
end

local function addPlaceholder(name)
	local UnitsExists = ReplicatedStorage.Units:FindFirstChild(name)
	
	if UnitsExists then
		placeholder = UnitsExists:Clone()
		placeholder.Parent = workspace.Units
		
		for i, part in ipairs(placeholder:GetDescendants()) do
			if part:IsA("BasePart") then
				part.CollisionGroup = "Towers"
				part.Transparency = 0.5
			end
		end
		
	end
	
end

local function removePlaceholder(name)
	placeholder:Destroy()
	placeholder = nil

end

-- Create a part to use as a template for the blocks
local template = Instance.new("Part")
template.Anchored = true
template.BrickColor = BrickColor.Random()
template.Size = Vector3.new(4, 4, 4)

-- Create a function to spawn a block at a random position
local function spawnBlock()
	-- Clone the template part
	local block = template:Clone()
	-- Set a random position above the ground
	local x = math.random(-100, 100)
	local y = 100
	local z = math.random(-100, 100)
	block.Position = Vector3.new(x, y, z)
	-- Parent the block to the workspace
	block.Parent = workspace
	-- Make the block fall down with gravity
	block.Anchored = false
	-- Add a touch event to kill the player if touched
	block.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
		-- Get the player from the hit part
		local player = game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(hit.Parent)
		-- If there is a player, kill them
		if player then
			player.Character:BreakJoints()
		end
	end)
end

-- Create a function to delete all the blocks in the workspace
local function deleteBlocks()
	-- Loop through all the parts in the workspace
	for _, part in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
		-- Check if the part is a clone of the template part
		if part:IsDescendantOf(template) then
			-- Delete the part
			part:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

-- Create a loop to spawn and delete blocks every 15 seconds
while true do
	-- Spawn 15 blocks every second for 15 seconds
	for i = 1, 15 do
		spawnBlock()
		wait(1)
	end
	-- Delete all the blocks in the workspace
	deleteBlocks("all")
end

function Algorithm:GetNextActions(weights)
	local PossibleActions = {}

	for k, v in pairs(self.Actions) do
		table.insert(PossibleActions, {val = 0, name = k})
	end

	for i in weights do
		local thisIndex = i%self._ActionCount +1
		PossibleActions[thisIndex].val += 1
	end

	local ValidActions = {}

	for _, v in ipairs(PossibleActions) do
		if v.val > 0 then
			table.insert(ValidActions, v.name)
		end
	end

	return ValidActions
end


function Algorithm:SimulateDummy(genes)
	local dummy = script.Parent.Dummy:Clone()
	dummy.Parent = workspace
	dummy:PivotTo(self.StartCf)

	--colorDummy(dummy, genes)

	local connection
	connection = RunService.Stepped:Connect(function()
		if not dummy.Parent then 
			-- When it is destroyed, we just want to stop this loop
			-- It would be better to stop it externally but this works
			-- fine so whatever 
			connection:Disconnect()
			return 
		end

		local weights = self:GetWeights(dummy:GetPivot().Position, genes)
		local nextActions = self:GetNextActions(weights)
		
		if #nextActions <= 3 then print(nextActions) end
		for _, v in ipairs(nextActions) do
			self.Actions[v](dummy)
		end
	end)

	return dummy
end

function IsTeamMate(Player1, Player2)
	return (Player1 and Player2 and not Player1.Neutral and not Player2.Neutral and Player1.TeamColor == Player2.TeamColor)
end

function TagHumanoid(humanoid, player)
	local Creator_Tag = Instance.new("ObjectValue")
	Creator_Tag.Name = "creator"
	Creator_Tag.Value = player
	Debris:AddItem(Creator_Tag, 2)
	Creator_Tag.Parent = humanoid
end

function UntagHumanoid(humanoid)
	for i, v in pairs(humanoid:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("ObjectValue") and v.Name == "creator" then
			v:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

function Blow(Hit)
	if not Hit or not Hit.Parent or not CheckIfAlive() or not ToolEquipped then
		return
	end
	local RightArm = Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") or Character:FindFirstChild("RightHand")
	if not RightArm then
		return
	end
	local RightGrip = RightArm:FindFirstChild("RightGrip")
	if not RightGrip or (RightGrip.Part0 ~= Handle and RightGrip.Part1 ~= Handle) then
		return
	end
	local character = Hit.Parent
	if character == Character then
		return
	end
	local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	if not humanoid or humanoid.Health == 0 then
		return
	end
	local player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(character)
	if player and (player == Player or IsTeamMate(Player, player)) then
		return
	end
	UntagHumanoid(humanoid)
	TagHumanoid(humanoid, Player)
	humanoid:TakeDamage(Damage)	
	
	if humanoid.Health > 0 then
		local Fire = Instance.new("Fire")
		Fire.Parent = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("HumanoidRootPart")
		Fire.Heat = 5
		-- give the user twice the damage

--Welcome to a tutorial over Shelf.
--But first, what is Shelf?
--Shelf is a custom class built onto the array part of tables.¹
--It is a class that allows you to quickly store data in an array, but with the ability to modify it by values.
--What does it mean? It means you can index through arrays not by their index, but the values stored in it.
--For example, if you have an array of numbers, and you want to find the index of a number in it, you can quickly call the number you want to find and it'll return its index.
--This is useful for many things, such as finding the index of a player in an array of players, or keeping track of thousands of parts at once while also maintaining the #len feature of tables.
--But (surprise, surprise!) it can also be paired up with mathematical operations to make storing, removing and fetching values faster!
--Let's jump onto an example, shall we?
One+=1
--Here, we performed an addition onto the shelf "One", which then indexed the number 1 into its array.
--Now, let's see what happens when we add another number.
One+=2

function CheckHit(Hit,dmg)
	local character = Hit.Parent
	if character == Character then
		return
	end
	if table.find(hits,character.Name) then
		return
	end
	if character:FindFirstChild("Config") then
		local config = character:FindFirstChild("Config")
		local HitFolder = config:WaitForChild("HitBy")
		local CanBeHit = config:WaitForChild("CanBeHit")
		local Blocking = config:WaitForChild("Blocking")
		local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
		if not humanoid or humanoid.Health == 0 then
			return
		end
		table.insert(hits,character.Name)
		if HitFolder:FindFirstChild(Player.Name) then
			local val = HitFolder[Player.Name]
			val.Value += dmg
		else
			createFolder(HitFolder)
			local val = HitFolder[Player.Name]
			val.Value += dmg
		end
		humanoid:TakeDamage(dmg)	
	else
		local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
		if not humanoid or humanoid.Health == 0 then
			return
		end
		table.insert(hits,character.Name)
		humanoid:TakeDamage(dmg)	
	end
end

local function chooseRandomPet(petTable)
	local chosenPet = nil
	local randomNumber = math.random(100)
	local weight = 0

	for i, v in pairs(petTable) do
		weight += v.chance
		
		if weight >= randomNumber then
			chosenPet = v
			break
		end
	end
	
	return chosenPet
end

	local newPart = Instance.new("Part")
	newPart.Parent = workspace

	newPart.Position = Vector3.new(0,0,0)

	while wait(1) do

	end

--make it when the player touches the Part it kills you
local function createNewPart()
	local newPart = Instance.new("Part")
	newPart.Parent = workspace
	newPart.Size = Vector3.new(1,1,1)
	newPart.Position = Vector3.new(0,0,0)
	newPart.Name = "New Part"
	
	while wait(1) do
		newPart.Size = newPart.Size + Vector3.new(1,1,1)
	end
	
	local function onTouched(hit)
		if hit.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
			hit.Parent.Humanoid.Health = 0
		end
	end
	
	newPart.Touched:Connect(onTouched)
end


--make the part color changes each 1x second
local function createNewPart()
	local newPart = Instance.new("Part")
	newPart.Parent = workspace
	newPart.Size = Vector3.new(1,1,1)
	newPart.Position = Vector3.new(0,0,0)
	newPart.Name = "New Part"
	
	while wait(1) do
		newPart.Size = newPart.Size + Vector3.new(1,1,1)
	end
	
	local function onTouched(hit)
		if hit.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
			hit.Parent.Humanoid.Health = 0
		end
	end
	
	newPart.Touched:Connect(onTouched)
	
	while wait(1) do
		local r,g,b,a = math.random(),math.random(),math.random(),math.random()
		newPart.Color = Color3.fromRGB(r*255,g*255,b*255,a*255)
	end
	
end

local function onKeyPress(input)
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.E then
		local newPart = Instance.new("Part")
		newPart.Anchored = true
		newPart.Size = Vector3.new(5, 5, 5)
		newPart.Position = game.Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.Position + (game.Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.LookVector * 5)
		newPart.BrickColor = BrickColor.new(getRandomColor())
		newPart.Parent = game.Workspace
	end
end

local function createButton(player, button)
	if player then
		if debounce == false then
			--debounce = true
			if player.Bronze.Value >= button.Config.Price.Value then
				--   while player.Bronze.Value >= button.Config.Price.Value do
					player.Bronze.Value -= button.Config.Price.Value

local CameraSwitcher = {}
CameraSwitcher.__index = CameraSwitcher

function CameraSwitcher.new()
	local self = setmetatable({}, CameraSwitcher)
	
	self.Player = LOCAL_PLAYER
	self.Camera = PLAYER_CAMERA
	self.CameraState = CAMERA_DICTIONARY.Default
	self.ActualCamera = 'Roblox'
	self.IsTracking = false
	self.MoveTable = {Move = 0, Turn = 0}
	self.TrackConnections = {}
	
	self._maid = Maid.new()
	
	return self
end

function CameraSwitcher:Initialize()
	local cameras = CAMERAS_FOLDER:GetChildren()

	for i, camera in cameras do
		local prompt : ProximityPrompt = camera:FindFirstChildWhichIsA('ProximityPrompt', true)
		self._maid:GiveTask(prompt.Triggered:Connect(function(playerWhoTrigger)
			if playerWhoTrigger == LOCAL_PLAYER then
				self:SetCamera(camera.Name)
			end
		end)) 
	end
end

function CameraSwitcher:SetCamera(cameraName)
	self.ActualCamera = cameraName
	if cameraName == 'Roblox' then
		CONTROLS:Enable()
		self.Camera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Custom
		self.CameraState = CAMERA_DICTIONARY.Default
	else
		CONTROLS:Disable()
		self.CameraState = CAMERA_DICTIONARY.Custom
		self.Camera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Scriptable
		local cameraInfo = CAMERA_LIST[cameraName]
		if cameraInfo == nil then 
			return
		end
	
		local cameraModel = cameraInfo.Model
		local cameraPreset = cameraInfo.Preset
		self.Camera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Scriptable
		local cameraFocus = cameraModel:FindFirstChild('Focus', true)
		local cameraTarget = cameraModel:FindFirstChild('Target', true)
		local TweeenService = game:GetService('TweenService')
		local tweenTrack = TweeenService:Create(self.Camera, BASE_TWEENINFO, {CFrame = CFrame.new(cameraFocus.WorldPosition, cameraTarget.WorldPosition)})
		tweenTrack:Play()
		tweenTrack.Completed:Wait()
		if cameraInfo.Movement ~= nil then
			self.Waypoints =

local function AllowPlayerAccess(plr:Player , level:string)
	local GlobalListInfo = game.ServerScriptService.Admin.GetGlobalList:Invoke()

	if level:match('Admin') then
		if GlobalListInfo[tostring(plr.UserId)] and (GlobalListInfo[tostring(plr.UserId)]:match('Admin') or GlobalListInfo[tostring(plr.UserId)]:match('Owner')) then return true end
	elseif level:match('Owner') then
		if GlobalListInfo[tostring(plr.UserId)] and (GlobalListInfo[tostring(plr.UserId)]:match('Owner')) then return true end
	end
end

local function repeatedRequestExists(requestTable : {any}, info : {any})
	for i, request in ipairs(requestTable) do
		if request.UserId == info.UserId and request.IsleRef:match(info.IsleRef) then return i, request.Time > info.Time end
	end
end

	end
	for i2,mdl2 in ipairs(mdl:GetChildren()) do

function playsound(time)
	nextsound=time+5+(math.random()*5)
	local randomsound=sounds[math.random(1,#sounds)]
	randomsound.Volume=.5+(.5*math.random())
	randomsound.Pitch=.5+(.5*math.random())
	randomsound:Play()
end

while sp.Parent~=nil and Humanoid and Humanoid.Parent~=nil and Humanoid.Health>0 and Torso and Head and Torso~=nil and Torso.Parent~=nil do
	local _,time=wait(1/3)
	humanoids={}
	populatehumanoids(game.Workspace)
	closesttarget=nil
	closestdist=sightrange
	local creator=sp:FindFirstChild("creator")
	for i,h in ipairs(humanoids) do
		if h and h.Parent~=nil then
			if h.Health>0 and h.Parent.Name~=sp.Name and h.Parent~=sp then
				local plr=game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(h.Parent)
				if creator==nil or plr==nil or creator.Value~=plr then
					local t=h.Parent:FindFirstChild("Torso")
					if t~=nil then
						local dist=(t.Position-Torso.Position).magnitude
						if dist<closestdist then
							closestdist=dist
							closesttarget=t
						end
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end
	if closesttarget~=nil then
		if not chasing then
			playsound(time)
			chasing=true
			Humanoid.WalkSpeed=runspeed
		end
		Humanoid:MoveTo(closesttarget.Position+(Vector3.new(1,1,1)*(variance*((math.random()*2)-1))),closesttarget)
		if math.random()<.5 then
			attack(time,closesttarget.Position)
		end
	else
		if chasing then
			chasing=false
			Humanoid.WalkSpeed=wonderspeed
		end
		if time>nextrandom then
			nextrandom=time+3+(math.random()*5)
			local randompos=Torso.Position+((Vector3.new(1,1,1)*math.random()-Vector3.new(.5,.5,.5))*40)
			Humanoid:MoveTo(randompos,game.Workspace.Terrain)
		end
	end
	if time>nextsound then
		playsound(time)
	end
	if time>nextjump then
		nextjump=time+7+(math.random()*5)
		Humanoid.Jump=true
	end
	animate(time)
end

	end
end

--Node Connector
local function renderMap()
	local startingPoint = MapFrame.MapData.StartingNode.Value

	for _,line in pairs(MapFrame.Lines:GetChildren())do
		Debris:AddItem(line, 0)
	end
	
	local scannedNodes = {}
	
	local function connectLines(node)
		if table.find(scannedNodes, node) then
			return
		end
		table.insert(scannedNodes, node)
		
		if node:IsA("Frame") then
			node.Visible = false
		end
		
		for _,n in pairs(node.NextConnections:GetChildren()) do
			if n.Value == nil then continue end
			
			local Line = script.LineTemplate:Clone()
			Line.Parent = MapFrame.Lines
			
			local Mag = ((node.AbsolutePosition + node.AbsoluteSize/2) - (n.Value.AbsolutePosition + n.Value.AbsoluteSize/2))
			
			local CenterPosition = ((node.AbsolutePosition + node.AbsoluteSize/2) + (n.Value.AbsolutePosition + n.Value.AbsoluteSize/2)) / 2
			
			
			Line.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
			Line.Rotation = math.deg(math.atan2(Mag.Y, Mag.X))
			Line.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(CenterPosition.X - MapFrame.Lines.AbsolutePosition.X, CenterPosition.Y - MapFrame.Lines.AbsolutePosition.Y)
			Line.Size = UDim2.new(0, Mag.Magnitude+5, 0, Line.Size.Y.Offset)

			connectLines(n.Value)
		end
	end

	connectLines(startingPoint)
end
renderMap()

local eyes = {4, 5, 6}  -- Substitua pelos IDs reais das texturas de olhos

local face1Name = "Face1"
local face2Name = "Face2"
local face3Name = "Face3"

-- Função para selecionar aleatoriamente um ID de textura
local function getRandomDecalID(decalList)
	local index = math.random(1, #decalList)
	return decalList[index]
end

-- Aplicar texturas nas caras
local function applyDecals()
	local face1 = brick:FindFirstChild(face1Name)
	local face2 = brick:FindFirstChild(face2Name)
	local face3 = brick:FindFirstChild(face3Name)

	if face1 and face2 and face3 then --identifica se as caras existem
		local eyebrowID = getRandomDecalID(eyebrows)
		local eyeID = getRandomDecalID(eyes)
		local mouthID = getRandomDecalID(mouths)

		face1.Texture = "rbxassetid://" .. eyebrowID
		face2.Texture = "rbxassetid://" .. eyeID
		face3.Texture = "rbxassetid://" .. mouthID

		print("texturas aplicados com sucesso.")
	else
		print("Uma ou mais caras não foram encontradas.")
	end
end

function UnitModule.FindTarget(map, unit, range, mode)
	local configurations = unit:WaitForChild("Configurations")
	
	if configurations then
		local Range = range
		local bestTarget = nil
		
		local bestDistance = nil
		local bestHealth = nil
		

		for i, target in ipairs(map.Enemies:GetChildren()) do
			local distanceToEnemy = (target.HumanoidRootPart.Position - unit.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
			local distanceToEnd = (target.HumanoidRootPart.Position - map.Target.Position).Magnitude
			
			if distanceToEnemy <= Range then
				if mode == "First" then
					if not bestDistance or distanceToEnd < bestDistance then
						bestDistance = distanceToEnd
						bestTarget = target

					end
				elseif mode == "Nearest" then
					Range = distanceToEnemy
					bestTarget = target
					
				elseif mode == "Last" then
					if not bestDistance or distanceToEnd > bestDistance then
						bestDistance = distanceToEnd
						bestTarget = target
					end
				elseif mode == "Weakest" then
					if not bestHealth or target.Humanoid.Health < bestHealth then
						bestHealth = target.Humanoid.Health
						bestTarget = target
					end
				elseif mode == "Strongest" then
					if not bestHealth or target.Humanoid.Health > bestHealth then
						bestHealth = target.Humanoid.Health
						bestTarget = target
					end
				end
				
			end
		end

		return bestTarget
	end
end

local minutesInADay = 24*60

local lighting = game:GetService("Lighting")

local startTime = tick() - (lighting:getMinutesAfterMidnight() / minutesInADay)*cycleTime
local endTime = startTime + cycleTime

local timeRatio = minutesInADay / cycleTime

if dayLength == 0 then
	dayLength = 1
end

repeat
	local currentTime = tick()
	
	if currentTime > endTime then
		startTime = endTime
		endTime = startTime + cycleTime
	end
	
	lighting:setMinutesAfterMidnight((currentTime - startTime)*timeRatio)
	wait(1/15)
until false

function round.LoadMap()
	local votedMap = round.ToggleVoting()
	local mapFolder = ServerStorage.Maps:FindFirstChild(votedMap)
	if not mapFolder then
		mapFolder = ServerStorage.Maps.Blons
	end
	
	local newMap = mapFolder:Clone()
	newMap.Parent = workspace.Map 
	
	local spawnBox = workspace.SpawnBox
	local currentFloor = spawnBox.CurrentFloor.SurfaceGui.Frame.TextLabel
	local mud = spawnBox.Mud.Mud
	
	-- TweenService animation to move the mud down
	local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(1, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out)
	local tween = TweenService:Create(mud, tweenInfo, {Position = mud.Position + Vector3.new(0, -10, 0)})
	spawnBox.Mud.BackMud:Destroy()
	tween:Play()

	-- Destroy the mud after the animation finishes
	task.wait(1.15)
	mud:Destroy()
	
	workspace.SpawnBox.Floor:Destroy()
	spawnBox.ElevatorBell:Play()
	currentFloor.Text = "Ground"
	
	-- Destroy the elevator parts with TweenService transition moving upwards using quad easing style
	local elevatorParts = { spawnBox.Front }
	local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(1, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad)

	for i, part in ipairs(elevatorParts) do
		local startPosition = part.Position
		local targetPosition = startPosition + Vector3.new(0, part.Size.Y, 0) -- Move the part upwards

		local tween = TweenService:Create(part, tweenInfo, {
			Position = targetPosition
		})

		tween:Play()

		-- Destroy the part after the tween completes
		tween.Completed:Connect(function()
			part:Destroy()
		end)
	end


		
	local portal = newMap:WaitForChild("Start")
	
	newMap.Base.Humanoid.HealthChanged:Connect(function(health)
		if health <= 0 then
			info.GameRunning.Value = false
			info.Message.Value = "We failed.."
		end
	end)
	
	return newMap
end

				ts:Create(hrp,TweenInfo.new(0.6,Enum.EasingStyle.Linear,Enum.EasingDirection.Out,0,false,0),{Velocity = hrp.CFrame.LookVector * 0}):Play()
				wait(0.6)
				CanDash = true
			elseif AKeyDown == true then
				CanDash = false
				remote:FireServer("A")
				hum:LoadAnimation(rep.Animations.Dash.Left):Play()
				hrp.Velocity = hrp.CFrame.rightVector * -DashPower
				ts:Create(hrp,TweenInfo.new(0.6,Enum.EasingStyle.Linear,Enum.EasingDirection.Out,0,false,0),{Velocity = hrp.CFrame.rightVector * 0}):Play()
				wait(0.6)
				CanDash = true

local function onClientRequest(player)
	-- Verifica se já existe uma parte criada
	if partCriada then
		return
	end

	-- Verifica se o jogador tem um personagem válido
	local character = player.Character
	if character then
		-- Obtém a posição atual do personagem
		local currentPosition = character.PrimaryPart.Position

		-- Obtém a direção em que o personagem está olhando
		local forwardVector = character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame.LookVector

		-- Calcula a posição da nova parte
		local spawnPosition = currentPosition + forwardVector * 25

		-- Cria a nova parte (part1)
		local part1 = Instance.new("Part")
		part1.Shape = Enum.PartType.Ball
		part1.Size = Vector3.new(5, 5, 5)
		part1.Position = spawnPosition
		part1.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Bright yellow")
		part1.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
		part1.Anchored = true
		part1.CanCollide = false
		part1.Parent = workspace

		-- Define a variável de controle como true para indicar que uma parte foi criada
		partCriada = true

		-- Função para escolher aleatoriamente um bloco dentro da pasta NullVoid
		local function chooseRandomBlock()
			local nullVoidFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("NullVoid")
			if nullVoidFolder then
				local blocks = nullVoidFolder:GetChildren()
				local validBlocks = {}

				for _, block in ipairs(blocks) do
					local blockName = block.Name
					if blockName == "N1" or blockName == "N2" or blockName == "N3" or blockName == "N4" then
						table.insert(validBlocks, block)
					end
				end

				if #validBlocks > 0 then
					return validBlocks[math.random(1, #validBlocks)]
				end
			end

			return nil
		end

		-- Cria a segunda parte (part2) em um dos blocos escolhidos dentro da pasta NullVoid
		local randomBlock = chooseRandomBlock()
		if randomBlock then
			local part2 = Instance.new("Part")
			part2.Shape = Enum.PartType.Ball
			part2.Size = Vector3.new(5, 5, 5)
			part2.Position = randomBlock.Position
			part2.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Bright yellow")
			part2.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
			part2.Anchored = true
			part2.CanCollide = false
			part2.Parent = workspace
		end

		-- Remove as partes após 20 segundos
		wait(20)
		part1:Destroy()
		if part2 then
			part2:Destroy()
		end

- << math.log(x,b) >> -------------------------------------------------------------------------

Que es el logartimo?: 
la logaritmacion es una operacion que se usa para calcular el exponente al que se tiene que elevar
cierto numero para obtener un resultado especifico.

Ejemplos:

x = el numero que quieres potenciar
b = el resultado que quieres obtener

- math.log(16,2) == 4 
el 2 tiene que multiplicarse las veces necesarias para que 16; 4 veces, entonces 2^4 = 16.

-- 2^x = 16
math.log() es para encontrar el valor de la icognita exponente; math.log(16,2), el exponente es 4.
 
-- << math.random(d,a) >> -------------------------------------------------------------------------

Que es math.random()?:
math.random() es una funcion que se usa para obtener un numero aleatorio entre la cantidad definida

Ejemplos:
d = el numero en donde empieza la cantidad de numeros aleatorios
a = el numero en donde termina la cantidad de numeros aleatorios

- math.random(1,10) == Numero aleatorio del 1 al 10

-- << math.floor(x) >> -------------------------------------------------------------------------
Que es math.floor()?:



-- << math.pow(x,y) >> -------------------------------------------------------------------------
Que es math.pow()?: es una funcion que se usa para elevar un numero a la potencia de otro.

Ejemplos:
x = el numero que quieres potenciar
y = la cantidad de veces que se multiplicara x por si mismo

- math.pow(10,5) = 100000 = 10 * 10 * 10 * 10 * 10, 10 multiplicado por si mismo 5 veces es igual a 100000.


-- << math.pi >> -------------------------------------------------------------------------
Que es math.pi?:  es una constante que representa el valor de pi (3.14159265358979323846)

--[[--

documentation things

ok so the kick/ban codes;
the code is in 2 parts, before and after the "-"
the first part is the type code, for example "XS" which is is bypassing client checks and the user is not banned for it
when the first part ends with "S" meaning soft, it means that the user is not banned, but they are kicked
when the first part ends with "H" meaning hard,  it means that the user is banned and cannot join back until unbanned
the second part after the "-" is the location identifier, it should be in hex is 4 chars long and manually randomly selected for each kick
the reason for this is to make it more cryptic and harder to find what caused the kick when on the client

the list of type codes and the definitions of each are as follows:

(automated detection)
XS - bypassing client checks (soft)
FS - flooding the server with requests or data (soft)
DH - exploiting a bug/glitch with exploits (hard)
CS - spamming the chat (soft)
PS - flooding the server with packets

			end

Tool.Enabled = true
LastAttack = 0

function Activated()
	if not Tool.Enabled or not ToolEquipped or not CheckIfAlive() then
		return
	end
	Tool.Enabled = false
	local Tick = RunService.Stepped:wait()
	if (Tick - LastAttack < 0.2) then
		Lunge()
	else
		Attack()
	end
	LastAttack = Tick
	--wait(0.5)
	Damage = DamageValues.BaseDamage
	local SlashAnim = (Tool:FindFirstChild("R15Slash") or Create("Animation"){
		Name = "R15Slash",
		AnimationId = BaseUrl .. Animations.R15Slash,
		Parent = Tool
	})
	
	local LungeAnim = (Tool:FindFirstChild("R15Lunge") or Create("Animation"){
		Name = "R15Lunge",
		AnimationId = BaseUrl .. Animations.R15Lunge,
		Parent = Tool
	})
	Tool.Enabled = true
end

function CheckIfAlive()
	return (((Player and Player.Parent and Character and Character.Parent and Humanoid and Humanoid.Parent and Humanoid.Health > 0 and Torso and Torso.Parent) and true) or false)
end

function Equipped()
	Character = Tool.Parent
	Player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(Character)
	Humanoid = Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	Torso = Character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	if not CheckIfAlive() then
		return
	end
	ToolEquipped = true
	Sounds.Unsheath:Play()
end

function Unequipped()
	Tool.Grip = Grips.Up
	ToolEquipped = false
end

Tool.Activated:Connect(Activated)
Tool.Equipped:Connect(Equipped)
Tool.Unequipped:Connect(Unequipped)

function retractStep()

		if script.Parent.doorBeep.Value==false then

		slidingstepextended=false
		wait(.45)
		script.Parent.SLIDINGSTEP.PrismaticConstraint.TargetPosition=slidingStepPullClosePos
		repeat wait() until script.Parent.SLIDINGSTEP.PrismaticConstraint.CurrentPosition<slidingStepPullClosePos+.025
		script.Parent.doorBeep.Value=false
	end
end


function countUp()
	if alreadyCountingUp==false then
		alreadyCountingUp=true
		while keepOpenDoor==true do
			repeat keepOpenTimer=keepOpenTimer+.1
				wait(.1)
			until
			keepOpenTimer>8 or keepOpenTimer<=0
			if keepOpenTimer>8 then
				keepOpenTimer=0
				keepOpenDoor=false
			end
		end
		alreadyCountingUp=false
	end
end

assetRequest.OnServerInvoke = function(plr, range: number)
	local assetList = {}
	
	if range then
		local chr = plr.Character
		if chr then
			local primaryPart = chr.PrimaryPart
			if not primaryPart then return end
			local currentPos = primaryPart.Position
			
			for i, asset in pairs(assetsFolder:GetChildren()) do
				local assetPos: Vector3 = asset.Position or asset.WorldPivot.Position
				if assetPos then
					local distance = (currentPos - assetPos).Magnitude
					if distance <= range and not asset:GetAttribute(plr.Name) then
						table.insert(assetList, asset)
						asset:SetAttribute(plr.Name, true)
					end
				else
					warn("Asset "..asset:GetFullName().." doesn't have a valid position")
					asset:Remove()
				end
			end
		end
	end
	
	return assetList
end

local function kinematics_eqaution(v, g, t)
	return v + (g * t)

function Cast.new(speed, gravity)
	local configuration = {}
	configuration.speed = speed
	configuration.Gravity = Vector3.new(0, gravity or Cast.DefaultGravity, 0)
	configuration.Position = Vector3.zero
	setmetatable(configuration, Cast)
	configuration.Update = task.spawn(function()
		while true do
			coroutine.yield()
			configuration:Perform()
		end
	end)
	return configuration
end

--ANIMATION
--play

function checkRunAnim()
	local isShiftPressed = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(runTriggerKey)
	local isForwardPressed = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(runForward)
	local isBackPressed = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(runBackward)
	local isLeftPressed = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(runLeft)
	local isRightPressed = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(runRight)

	if isShiftPressed and (isForwardPressed or isBackPressed or isLeftPressed or isRightPressed) then
		if not runAnimPlaying then
			RunTrack:Play()
			runAnimPlaying = true
		end
	else
		RunTrack:Stop()
		runAnimPlaying = false
	end
end

function onRunning(speed)
	if speed > 0.01 then
		local scale = 15.0
		playAnimation("walk", 0.1, Enemy)
		setAnimationSpeed(speed / scale)
		pose = "Running"
	else
		playAnimation("idle", 0.1, Enemy)
		pose = "Standing"
	end
end

function onDied()
	pose = "Dead"
end

function onJumping()
	playAnimation("jump", 0.1, Enemy)
	jumpAnimTime = jumpAnimDuration
	pose = "Jumping"
end

function onClimbing(speed)
	local scale = 5.0
	playAnimation("climb", 0.1, Enemy)
	setAnimationSpeed(speed / scale)
	pose = "Climbing"
end

function onGettingUp()
	pose = "GettingUp"
end

function onFreeFall()
	if (jumpAnimTime <= 0) then
		playAnimation("fall", fallTransitionTime, Enemy)
	end
	pose = "FreeFall"
end

function onFallingDown()
	pose = "FallingDown"
end

function onSeated()
	pose = "Seated"
end

function onPlatformStanding()
	pose = "PlatformStanding"
end

function onSwimming(speed)
	if speed > 1.00 then
		local scale = 10.0
		playAnimation("swim", 0.4, Enemy)
		setAnimationSpeed(speed / scale)
		pose = "Swimming"
	else
		playAnimation("swimidle", 0.4, Enemy)
		pose = "Standing"
	end
end

function getTool()	
	for _, kid in ipairs(Figure:GetChildren()) do
		if kid.className == "Tool" then return kid end
	end
	return nil
end

function getToolAnim(tool)
	for _, c in ipairs(tool:GetChildren()) do
		if c.Name == "toolanim" and c.className == "StringValue" then
			return c
		end
	end
	return nil
end

function animateTool()
	
	if (toolAnim == "None") then
		playToolAnimation("toolnone", toolTransitionTime, Enemy)
		return
	end

	if (toolAnim == "Slash") then
		playToolAnimation("toolslash", 0, Enemy)
		return
	end

	if (toolAnim == "Lunge") then
		playToolAnimation("toollunge", 0, Enemy)
		return
	end
end

function moveSit()
	if (pose == "Seated") then
		local tool = getTool()
		if (tool ~= nil) then
			local anim = getToolAnim(tool)
			if (anim ~= nil and anim.Value == "sit") then
				playAnimation("sitchair", 0.1, Enemy)
				return true
			end
		end
end

function visualizeShapeRay(origin, goal, radius)
	local part = Instance.new("Part")
	part.Anchored = true
	part.CanCollide = false
	part.Transparency = 0.5
	part.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255,0,0)
	part.Size = Vector3.new(radius*2, radius*2, radius*2)
	part.Position = goal
	part.Parent = workspace
	
	task.defer(function()
		
		task.wait()
		part:Destroy()
	end)
	
end

function visualizeRay(origin, goal, hit)
	local distance = (origin - goal).Magnitude
	local cframe = CFrame.lookAt(origin, goal) * CFrame.new(0, 0, -distance / 2)
	
	local rayTrail = Instance.new("Part")
	rayTrail.Anchored = true
	rayTrail.CanCollide = false
	rayTrail.CanQuery = false
	rayTrail.Size = Vector3.new(0.3,0.3,distance)
	rayTrail.CFrame = cframe
	rayTrail.Parent = workspace
	
	local rayHead = Instance.new("Part")
	rayHead.Anchored = true
	rayHead.CanCollide = false
	rayHead.CanQuery = false
	rayHead.Size = Vector3.new(0.5,0.5,0.5)
	rayHead.Position = origin
	rayHead.Parent = workspace
	
	if hit then
		rayTrail.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255,0,0)
		rayHead.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255,0,0)
	else
		rayTrail.Color = Color3.fromRGB(0,255,0)
		rayHead.Color = Color3.fromRGB(0,255,0)
	end
	
	task.defer(function()
		task.wait()
		rayHead:Destroy()
		rayTrail:Destroy()
	end)
	
end

		end)

			warn("Error while checking if player has pass: " .. tostring(message))
			return
		end
		
		for _ , Table in PlayerData.Gamepass do
			for Name , Value in Table do
				if Name == "PassID" and Value == ID then
					if Table["isBought"] == true then
						return
					end
				end
			end
		end

		if hasPass then
			-- Player already owns the Pass; tell them somehow
			warn("Player already have this gamepass")
		else
			-- Player does NOT own the Pass; prompt them to purchase
			MarketplaceService:PromptGamePassPurchase(Player, ID)

			MarketplaceService.PromptGamePassPurchaseFinished:Connect(function(player , purchasedPassID , purchaseSuccess)
				
				if purchaseSuccess and purchasedPassID == ID then

-- This Code Will Handle The Journey From Joining To Owning A Plot

-- 1) Get Player
local Player = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local RS = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local TS = game:GetService("TweenService") -- Also Tween Service

-- 2) Find Plots
local PlotFolder = workspace:WaitForChild("Plots")
local PlotTable = PlotFolder:GetChildren()
local AvailablePlots = {}

local MaxIndex = 0 -- Index Is To Sync Button Presses With Table Index.

for i, v in ipairs(PlotTable) do -- Loops Through All Children In Plots Folder, Final Results: Table With Unowned Plots
	if v:IsA("Part") then -- Contiunes With Any Children That Are Parts (Plots Are Parts)
		if v:FindFirstChild("Ownership").Value == "Unowned" then -- Contiunes With Children That Ownerships Value Are "Unowned"
			table.insert(AvailablePlots,v) -- Puts All Children That Pass (Plots) In The Table
			MaxIndex = MaxIndex+1 -- Will Result In Amount Of Plots Usable.
		end
	end

	local Rayparams = RaycastParams.new()

		Rock.Size = Vector3.new(size, size, size)
		Rock.CFrame = cframe * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(0,math.rad(angle),0) * CFrame.new(0,-size,-6)

			Rock.Material = ray.Instance.Material
			Rock.Color = ray.Instance.Color
			Rock.Orientation = Vector3.new(math.random(-180,180),math.random(-180,180),math.random(-180,180))

			tweenservice:Create(Rock, TweenInfo.new(.5),{Position = Rock.Position + Vector3.new(0,size * 2,0)}):Play()

				tweenservice:Create(Rock,TweenInfo.new(1),{Transparency = 1}):Play()
			end)

		end
		
		
		angle += 24
	end

local ampltiude_fbm = 60

local gain = 0.5
local lacunarity = 2
local scale = 200

local function genTop()
	game.Workspace.Terrain:Clear()
	for x=0, size do
		local plrs = 0
		local Pings = {}
		for i,v in pairs(game.Players:GetChildren()) do
			plrs += 1
			table.insert(Pings,v:GetNetworkPing())
		end
		local totalPing = 0
		for i,v in pairs(Pings) do
			totalPing += v/plrs
		end
		task.wait(totalPing/1.5)
		for z=0, size do
			local amplitude = 1
			local frequency = 0.55
			local total = 0
			local normalizer = 0
			--------
			for octave=1, octaves do
				local noise = math.noise(((x + xOffset) / scale) * frequency, ((z + zOffset)  / scale) * frequency)
				noise = math.clamp(noise, -1, 1)
				total += noise * amplitude
				amplitude *= gain
				frequency *= lacunarity
				normalizer += amplitude
			end
			total /= normalizer
			total *= ampltiude_fbm
			---------
			local pos = Vector3.new(x * block_size, (math.floor(total + 10) * block_size), z * block_size) + Vector3.new(block_size/2,0,block_size/2)
			
			game.Workspace.Terrain:FillBlock(CFrame.new(pos),Vector3.new(block_size, block_size, block_size),Enum.Material.Grass)
			
			
		end

function NeuralNetwork:activate(x)
	-- Sigmoid activation function
	return 1 / (1 + math.exp(-x))
end

function NeuralNetwork:forward(input)
	local hidden = {}
	local output = {}

	-- Compute hidden layer activations
	for i = 1, self.hiddenSize do
		local sum = 0
		for j = 1, self.inputSize do
			sum = sum + input[j] * self.weightsInputHidden[j][i]
		end
		sum = sum + self.biasHidden[i]
		hidden[i] = self:activate(sum)
	end

	-- Compute output layer activations
	for i = 1, self.outputSize do
		local sum = 0
		for j = 1, self.hiddenSize do
			sum = sum + hidden[j] * self.weightsHiddenOutput[j][i]
		end
		sum = sum + self.biasOutput[i]
		output[i] = self:activate(sum)
	end

	return output
end

function NeuralNetwork:mutate(rate)
	-- Mutate the weights and biases of the neural network
	for i = 1, self.hiddenSize do
		for j = 1, self.inputSize do
			if math.random() < rate then
				-- Add random value between -0.1 and 0.1 to the weight
				self.weightsInputHidden[j][i] = self.weightsInputHidden[j][i] + (math.random() * 0.2 - 0.1)
			end
		end
		if math.random() < rate then
			-- Add random value between -0.1 and 0.1 to the bias
			self.biasHidden[i] = self.biasHidden[i] + (math.random() * 0.2 - 0.1)
		end
	end

	for i = 1, self.outputSize do
		for j = 1, self.hiddenSize do
			if math.random() < rate then
				-- Add random value between -0.1 and 0.1 to the weight
				self.weightsHiddenOutput[j][i] = self.weightsHiddenOutput[j][i] + (math.random() * 0.2 - 0.1)
			end
		end
		if math.random() < rate then
			-- Add random value between -0.1 and 0.1 to the bias
			self.biasOutput[i] = self.biasOutput[i] + (math.random() * 0.2 - 0.1)
		end
	end
end

local function updateTime()
    local time=os.date("*t")
    local hour=time.hour
    if hour>12 then 
        hour-=12 
    end 
    local minute=time.min
    if minute<10 then 
        minute="0"..minute 
    end 
    clock.Text = string.format("%d:%s %s",hour,tostring(minute),time.hour>=12 and "PM" or "AM")
end
