-- Put this script inside the object that will follow the player

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local Object = script.Parent
local Speed = 10
local FollowDistance = 10

-- Function to find the player closest to the object
local function FindClosestPlayer()
	local closestPlayer = nil
	local shortestDistance = math.huge
	local objectPosition = Object.Position

	for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
		if player ~= nil and player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
			local playerPosition = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
			local distance = (playerPosition - objectPosition).magnitude

			if distance < shortestDistance then
				closestPlayer = player
				shortestDistance = distance
			end
		end
	end

	return closestPlayer
end

-- Function to make the object follow the player from behind
local function FollowPlayer(player)
	if player ~= nil and player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
		local targetPosition = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame.LookVector * FollowDistance
		local direction = (targetPosition - Object.Position).unit

		Object:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(Object:GetPrimaryPartCFrame() + direction * Speed)
	end
end

-- Main loop
while true do
	local closestPlayer = FindClosestPlayer()
	FollowPlayer(closestPlayer)

	wait(0.1)
end

--[[--

documentation things

ok so the kick/ban codes;
the code is in 2 parts, before and after the "-"
the first part is the type code, for example "XS" which is is bypassing client checks and the user is not banned for it
when the first part ends with "S" meaning soft, it means that the user is not banned, but they are kicked
when the first part ends with "H" meaning hard,  it means that the user is banned and cannot join back until unbanned
the second part after the "-" is the location identifier, it should be in hex is 4 chars long and manually randomly selected for each kick
the reason for this is to make it more cryptic and harder to find what caused the kick when on the client

the list of type codes and the definitions of each are as follows:

(automated detection)
XS - bypassing client checks (soft)
XH - bypassing client checks (hard)
YS - exploiting (soft)
YH - exploiting (hard)

local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
-- Variables --
local StageStore = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("StageStore")
local Checkpoints = workspace:WaitForChild("Checkpoints")
local SuccessSound = Checkpoints:WaitForChild("SuccessSound")
-- Functions --

function LoadLeaderstats(player)
	local leaderstats = Instance.new("Folder", player)
	leaderstats.Name = "leaderstats" -- IMPORTANT: Don't change the name of the leaderstats
	
	local stage = Instance.new("NumberValue", leaderstats)
	stage.Name = "Stage"
	stage.Value = 1
	
	local data
	local success, err = pcall(function()
		data = StageStore:GetAsync(player.UserId)
	end)
	
	if data then
		stage.Value = data
		TeleportPlayer(player)
	elseif not success then
		player:Kick("Your data didn't load correctly. Rejoin!")
	end
end

function TeleportPlayer(player)
	if player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait() then
		local char = player.Character
		char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart").Position = Checkpoints[tostring(player.leaderstats.Stage.Value)].Position
	end
end

function SaveData(player)
	local success, errmsg = pcall(function()
		StageStore:SetAsync(player.UserId, player.leaderstats.Stage.Value)
	end)
	
	if not success then
		warn("Data Store Error: "..errmsg.. " Stage: "..tostring(player.leaderstats.Stage.Value))
	end
end

(Leaderstat,Value,Player)

ExtraFunctions.Leaderstats.Divide=function(Leaderstat,Value,Player)
	if Player.Leaderstats[Leaderstat] and Value and Player then
		Player.Leaderstats[Leaderstat].Value=Player.Leaderstats[Leaderstat].Value/Value
		return
	else
		warn("All fields not filled - ExtraFunctions - Leaderstat Devide")
		return
	end
end
ExtraFunctions.Leaderstats.Multiply=function(Leaderstat,Value,Player)
	if Player.Leaderstats[Leaderstat] and Value and Player then
		Player.Leaderstats[Leaderstat].Value=Player.Leaderstats[Leaderstat].Value*Value
		return
	else
		warn("All fields not filled - ExtraFunctions - Leaderstat Multiply")
		return
	end
end
ExtraFunctions.Leaderstats.Set=function(Leaderstat,Value,Player)
	if Player.Leaderstats[Leaderstat] and Value and Player then
		Player.Leaderstats[Leaderstat].Value=Value
		return
	else
		warn("All fields not filled - ExtraFunctions - Leaderstat Set")
		return
	end
end
ExtraFunctions.Filter.FromPartFilter.FilterChildren=function(Part,Filter)
	local children = Part:GetChildren()
	local new = {}
	for i,v in ipairs(children) do
		if v:IsA(Filter) then
			table.insert(new,v)
		end
	end
	return new
end
ExtraFunctions.Filter.FromPartFilter.FilterDescendants=function(Part,Filter)
	local descendants = Part:GetDescendants()
	local new = {}
	for i,v in ipairs(descendants) do
		if v:IsA(Filter) then
			table.insert(new,v)
		end
	end
	return new
end
ExtraFunctions.Filter.FilterFromTable=function(Table,Filter)
	local new = {}
	for i,v in ipairs(Table) do
		if v:IsA(Filter) then
			table.insert(new,v)
		end
	end
	return new
end
ExtraFunctions.Table.RandomItem=function(Table)
	return Table[math.random(1,#Table)] --yea this feature is kinda useless
end
ExtraFunctions.Table.FindItem=function(Table,Item)
	return Table[table.find(Table,Item)] --these are built in but just without the ()'s and []'s
end
ExtraFunctions.Table.Sort=function(Table,SortType)
	if SortType=="Ascending" then
		table.sort(Table,function(a,b) return a<b end)
	elseif SortType=="Descending" then
		table.sort(Table,function(a,b) return a>b end)
	else
		warn("Invalid sort type - ExtraFunctions - Table Sort")
	end
end
ExtraFunctions.Client.ConvertToSeconds=function(Time)
	local TimeSplit=string.split(Time,":")
	if #TimeSplit==3 then
		return tonumber(TimeSplit[1])*3600+tonumber(TimeSplit[2])*60+tonumber(TimeSplit[3])
	elseif #TimeSplit==2 then
		return tonumber(TimeSplit[1])*60+tonumber(TimeSplit[2])
	else
		warn("Invalid time format - ExtraFunctions - Convert To Seconds")
	end
end

--Create shelf.
local One=Shelf.new()
local Two=Shelf.new()

--Welcome to a tutorial over Shelf.
--But first, what is Shelf?
--Shelf is a custom class built onto the array part of tables.¹
--It is a class that allows you to quickly store data in an array, but with the ability to modify it by values.
--What does it mean? It means you can index through arrays not by their index, but the values stored in it.
--For example, if you have an array of numbers, and you want to find the index of a number in it, you can quickly call the number you want to find and it'll return its index.
--This is useful for many things, such as finding the index of a player in an array of players, or keeping track of thousands of parts at once while also maintaining the #len feature of tables.
--But (surprise, surprise!) it can also be paired up with mathematical operations to make storing, removing and fetching values faster!
--Let's jump onto examples, shall we?
One+=2
--Here, we performed an addition onto the shelf "One", which then indexed the number 2 into its array.
--Now, let's see what happens when we add another number.
One+=1
--We now have two numbers in the array, with 2 being at [1] and 1 being at [2].
--But say you don't want the number one anymore.
--Normally, one would do table.remove(table,2) to get rid of the second index, which is where the number 1 is located at.
--Now, with Shelves, this is how you do that same task.
One-=1
--And, suddenly, the number 1's index got completely removed from the table, only leaving the number 2, at index [1], left.
--This is the purpose of Shelf:

local debounce = false

local cashButton = Mainitems.CashButton
local cashValue = Values.CashValue
local ownerValue = Values.OwnerValue

local function collectCash(hitPart)
	if debounce then return end
	debounce = true

	local player = game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(hitPart.Parent)
	if player and ownerValue.Value == player then
		local cashStat = player:WaitForChild("leaderstats").Cash
		cashStat.Value += cashValue.Value
		cashValue.Value = 0
		wait(1)
	end

	debounce = false
end

local function HandleHealthKit(HealthKit)
	local Info = HealthKitInfo[HealthKit.Name]
	local DefaultParent = HealthKit.Parent
	local Hitbox = HealthKit:WaitForChild("Trigger")
	local Cooldown = false
	Hitbox.Touched:Connect(function(Hit)
		local Humanoid = Hit.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
		if Humanoid and Humanoid.Health > 0 and Humanoid.Health < Humanoid.MaxHealth then
			Cooldown = true
			HealthKit.Parent = ServerStorage
			local AddHealthAmount = math.clamp((Humanoid.MaxHealth * (Info['RestorePercent'] / 100)), 1, Humanoid.MaxHealth)
			Humanoid.Health += AddHealthAmount
			ReplicatedStorage.PlayGuiSound:FireClient(Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(Humanoid.Parent), "MedkitHeal")
			task.wait(Info['RegenTime'])
			HealthKit.Parent = DefaultParent
			Cooldown = false
		end
	end)
end

			table.insert(PlayerTable, Player)
		end
	end
	return PlayerTable
end

local function ShakeScreen(0)
    local Camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
    local shake = Instance.new("Attachment")
    shake.Parent = Camera
    local shaker = Instance.new("Attachment")
    shaker.Position = Vector3.new(math.random(-intensity, intensity), math.random(-intensity, intensity), 0)
    shaker.Parent = Camera
    local springConstraint = Instance.new("SpringConstraint")
    springConstraint.Attachment0 = shake

    springConstraint.Length = 0
    springConstraint.DampingRatio = 1 --no bouncing back and forth please!

    local difference = Player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - part.Position

local module = {}

function module.start_receiving(superTable : {})

	local receiver = {}
	setmetatable(receiver, {__index = function(self, index)
		if module[index] then
			return module[index]
		else
			return superTable[index]
		end

	end,})
	
	receiver:initiate()

	return receiver

end

function findTarget()
	local MaxDistance = 100000 -- change the distance in studs that the dummy can see the enemy
	local NearestTarget
	local Distance

	for i, v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("Model") then
			if Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(v) then
				if v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
					local Hrp = v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")

					Distance = math.floor((Hrp.Position - HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude)

					if Distance <= MaxDistance then
						MaxDistance = Distance

						NearestTarget = v
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end

	return NearestTarget
end

function module.MergeSetInSnake(char, lastBlocksOfValue)
	local success = false

	local sortedValues = {}

	for value, _ in pairs(lastBlocksOfValue) do
		table.insert(sortedValues, value)
	end
	table.sort(sortedValues)

	for _, lastValue in ipairs(sortedValues) do
		local lastBlock = lastBlocksOfValue[lastValue]
		local firstBlock = module.GetBlockFromOpposite(char, lastBlock, "Last")

		if firstBlock and firstBlock ~= lastBlock then
			-- merge!!
			local newValue = firstBlock.BlockValue.Value * 2
			local firstPrevBlock = firstBlock.RopeConstraint.Attachment1.Parent

			if firstPrevBlock and firstPrevBlock:FindFirstChild("RopeConstraint") and firstPrevBlock.RopeConstraint.Attachment1 then
				local firstPrevBlock_2 = firstPrevBlock.RopeConstraint.Attachment1.Parent
				if firstPrevBlock_2 then
					firstBlock.RopeConstraint.Attachment1 = firstPrevBlock_2.Attachment1
					firstBlock.RopeConstraint.Length = module.GetRopeLengthFromBlocks(firstBlock, firstPrevBlock_2)
				else
					firstBlock.RopeConstraint:Destroy()
				end
			end

			if lastBlock == firstPrevBlock then
				lastBlocksOfValue[lastValue] = nil
			end

			firstPrevBlock:Destroy()
			module.SetValueOfBlock(firstBlock, newValue)

			lastBlocksOfValue[newValue] = module.GetBlockFromOpposite(char, firstBlock, "First")

			success = true
			break
		end
	end
	return success, lastBlocksOfValue
end

local function ScalePlayer(player, scale)
	-- Check if player and scale are valid
	if player and scale then
		-- Get the character of the player
		local character = player
		-- Loop through all the parts in the character
		for _, part in pairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
			if part:IsA("BasePart") then
				-- Scale the part
				part.Size = part.Size * scale
				part.Position = part.Position * scale
			end
		end
	else
		warn("Invalid player or scale provided!")
	end
end

local function IsDescendantOfRagdolls(part)
	local ragdolls = workspace:FindFirstChild("Ragdolls")
	if ragdolls then
		local descendants = ragdolls:GetDescendants()
		for _, descendant in ipairs(descendants) do
			if descendant == part then
				return true
			end
		end
	end

	return false
end

--create a universe gravition simulator and based on it own weight,more weight equal more strong gravition.
local function Gravitionv1(Obj1,Obj2)
    local Obj1Mass = Obj1:GetMass()
    local Obj2Mass = Obj2:GetMass()
    local Distance = (Obj1.Position - Obj2.Position).magnitude
    if Distance < 0 then return end
    local Force = (6.67 * 10^-11) * ((Obj1Mass * Obj2Mass)/(Distance^2))
    return Force
end

local function Gravitionv2(Obj1, Obj2)
    local Force = 0.5
    local Distance = (Obj1.Position - Obj2.Position).magnitude
    local Direction = (Obj1.Position - Obj2.Position).unit
    if Distance < 100 then --if the distance is less than 100 studs, apply force to object 1.
        Obj1.Velocity += Direction * Force / Distance^2
    end
end

local function bitmap(byte: number)
	local bits: {boolean} = {}
	for i = 1, 8 do
		bits[i] = byte % 2 == 1
		byte = math.floor(byte / 2)
	end
	return bits
end


local function byteFromBitmap(bitmap: {boolean})
	local byte: number = 0
	for i, bit in ipairs(bitmap) do
		if bit then
			byte += 2 ^ (8 - i)
		end
	end
	return byte
end

local mainFolder = script.Parent
local platform = mainFolder.Platform
local alignPosition = platform.AlignPosition

local destinationList = {}
-- Get the valid destinations by checking their name for the string "Destination " (with a space at the end).
for index, value in pairs(mainFolder:GetChildren()) do
	local valueName = value.Name
	if string.match(valueName, "Destination ") then
		table.insert(destinationList, valueName)
		--make this looped
	end
end

local sortedList = {}
repeat -- Sort the list
	local lowestValue = {nil, math.huge}
	-- Table describing the index of the destination of the lowest value, followed by its value.
	for index, value in pairs(destinationList) do
		local nameSplit = string.split(destinationList[index], " ") -- Split the name to isolate its destination number
		local stringToNumber = tonumber(nameSplit[2]) -- Convert the destination number to an actual number
		if stringToNumber < lowestValue[2] then
			lowestValue = {index, stringToNumber} -- Overwrite the lowestValue table with the new lowest value.
		end
	end
	table.insert(sortedList, destinationList[lowestValue[1]]) -- Insert the lowest value into the sorted list
	destinationList[lowestValue[1]] = "Destination 999999" -- Don't remove the lowest value because it will end the loop early.
until #sortedList == #destinationList -- Repeat until the sorted list has all the destinations.

-- Function to set up a template
functions.setup_template = function(input, tycoon)
	local template = server_storage:FindFirstChild("template")
	if not template then
		error("Template object not found in server storage.")
	end

	local store = template:FindFirstChild(input)
	if not store then
		error("Store object not found in the template.")
	end

	local cloned_store = store:Clone()
	if input == "structure_store" then
		cloned_store:PivotTo(tycoon.tycoonCFrame.CFrame)
		functions.templates[tycoon] = cloned_store
	else
		cloned_store:PivotTo(tycoon.buttonCFrame.CFrame)
	end
	return cloned_store
end

-- Function to retrieve a template
functions.get_template = function(tycoon)
	local template = functions.templates[tycoon]
	if not template then
		error("Template not found for the given tycoon.")
	end
	return template
end

-- Define the PathfindingAI class
local PathfindingAI = {}
PathfindingAI.__index = PathfindingAI

function PathfindingAI.new(neuralNetwork, grid)
	local self = setmetatable({}, PathfindingAI)

	self.neuralNetwork = neuralNetwork
	self.grid = grid

	return self
end

function PathfindingAI:findPath(start, goal)
	-- Perform pathfinding using the neural network
	local openSet = {start}
	local cameFrom = {}
	local gScore = {}
	local fScore = {}

	gScore[start] = 0
	fScore[start] = self:heuristic(start, goal)

	while #openSet > 0 do
		local current = self:findLowestFScore(openSet, fScore)
		if current == goal then
			return self:reconstructPath(cameFrom, goal)
		end

		table.remove(openSet, self:indexOf(openSet, current))

		for _, neighbor in ipairs(self:getNeighbors(current)) do
			local tentativeGScore = gScore[current] + 1

			if not gScore[neighbor] or tentativeGScore < gScore[neighbor] then
				gScore[neighbor] = tentativeGScore
				fScore[neighbor] = tentativeGScore + self:heuristic(neighbor, goal)
				cameFrom[neighbor] = current

				local input = self:generateInput(neighbor, goal)
				local output = self.neuralNetwork:forward(input)

				if output[1] > 0.5 then
					table.insert(openSet, neighbor)
				end
			end
		end
	end

	return nil -- No path found
end

local function loadData(plr)
	local profileData = profileStore:LoadProfileAsync("UserId_" .. plr.UserId)
	if profileData ~= nil then
		profileData:AddUserId(plr.UserId)
		profileData:Reconcile()
		profileData:ListenToRelease(function()
			cachedProfiles[plr] = nil
			plr:Kick("A DS2 error has occured, please report this to the devs.")
		end)
		if plr:IsDescendantOf(game:GetService("Players")) == true then
			cachedProfiles[plr] = profileData
			-- Data Stuff
		else
			profileData:Release()
		end
	else
		plr:Kick("A DS2 error has occured, please report this to the devs.")
	end
end

function dataManager:updateData(plr, section, key, value)
	if cachedProfiles[plr] and cachedProfiles[plr].Data[section][key] then
		cachedProfiles[plr].Data[section][key] = value
		return true
	else
		return false
	end
end

function dataManager:getData(plr)
	if cachedProfiles[plr] then
		return cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	else
		return false
	end
end

function dataManager:getLevel(plr)
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	if profileData then
		local totalExp = profileData.statsMain.totalExp
		local level = 0
		local expNeeded = 3

		while totalExp >= expNeeded do
			totalExp = totalExp - expNeeded
			level = level + 1
			expNeeded = 3 * (1.3 ^ level)
		end

		return {currentLevel = level, remainingExp = totalExp, expRequired = expNeeded}
	else
		return false
	end
end
function dataManager:addLevelUpEffects(plr) -- adds +5 storage and +1 pet slot every 25 levels
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	local levelReceived = dataManager:getLevel(plr).currentLevel
	if levelReceived and profileData then
		if levelReceived % 25 == 0 then
			profileData.statsMain.maxEquippedPets += 1
		end
		profileData.statsMain.petStorage += 5
	end
end
function dataManager:addLevel(plr)
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	local levelReceived = dataManager:getLevel(plr)
	if profileData and levelReceived and levelReceived.currentLevel < profileData.statsMain.maxLevel then
		dataManager:addLevelUpEffects(plr)
		profileData.statsMain.totalExp += dataManager:getLevel(plr).expRequired
	end
end

function dataManager:addExp(plr, exp)
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	local levelReceived = dataManager:getLevel(plr)
	exp = math.abs(exp)
	if profileData and levelReceived and levelReceived.currentLevel < profileData.statsMain.maxLevel then
		if levelReceived.remainingExp <= exp then
			dataManager:addLevelUpEffects(plr)
		end
		profileData.statsMain.totalExp += exp 
	end
end

function IsTeamMate(Player1, Player2)
	return (Player1 and Player2 and not Player1.Neutral and not Player2.Neutral and Player1.TeamColor == Player2.TeamColor)
end

function TagHumanoid(humanoid, player)
	local Creator_Tag = Instance.new("ObjectValue")
	Creator_Tag.Name = "creator"
	Creator_Tag.Value = player
	Debris:AddItem(Creator_Tag, 2)
	Creator_Tag.Parent = humanoid
	humanoid.Died:Connect(function()
		if Creator_Tag.Parent == humanoid then
			Kill()
		end
	end)
end

function UntagHumanoid(humanoid)
	for i, v in pairs(humanoid:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("ObjectValue") and v.Name == "creator" then
			v:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

function Blow(Hit)
	if not Hit or not Hit.Parent or not CheckIfAlive() or not ToolEquipped then
		return
	end
	local RightArm = Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") or Character:FindFirstChild("RightHand")
	if not RightArm then
		return
	end
	local RightGrip = RightArm:FindFirstChild("RightGrip")
	if not RightGrip or (RightGrip.Part0 ~= Handle and RightGrip.Part1 ~= Handle) then
		return
	end
	local character = Hit.Parent
	if character == Character then
		return
	end
	local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	if not humanoid or humanoid.Health == 0 then
		return
	end
	local player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(character)
	if player and (player == Player or IsTeamMate(Player, player)) then
		return
	end
	UntagHumanoid(humanoid)
	TagHumanoid(humanoid, Player)
	humanoid:TakeDamage(Damage)	
end

local function renderPolarGraph(rEquation, prescision, iswait)
	graphFolder:ClearAllChildren()

	local function getPoint(theta)
		local r = rEquation(theta)
		local x = r * math.cos(theta)
		local y = r * math.sin(theta)
		return Vector3.new(x, y, 0)
	end

	local function getPoints()
		local points = {}
		for theta = 0, 2 * math.pi, prescision do
			table.insert(points, getPoint(theta))
		end
		return points
	end

	local function renderPoints(points)
		local sound = Instance.new('Sound',basePart)
		sound.SoundId = 'rbxassetid://9040512075'
		sound.Volume = 1
		sound.Looped = true
		sound:Play()
		local attachment1 = Instance.new("Attachment", graphFolder)
		attachment1.CFrame = CFrame.new(points[1])
		for i = 2,#points do
			if(iswait) then
				task.wait()
			end
			local attachment2 = Instance.new("Attachment", graphFolder)
			local theta = (i - 1) * prescision
			local pitch = (points[i].Y + 10) / 20
			sound.Pitch = pitch
			Humanoid.DisplayName = string.format('Computing...\n%s Prescision\nTheta: %.3f\nR: %.3f', to_percent(.1, prescision), theta, rEquation(theta))
			attachment2.CFrame = CFrame.new(points[i])
			local beam = Instance.new("RodConstraint", graphFolder)
			beam.Enabled = true
			beam.Visible = true
			beam.Attachment0 = attachment1
			beam.Attachment1 = attachment2
			beam.Color = BrickColor.Red()
			beam.Thickness = 0.1
			attachment1 = attachment2
		end
		sound:Stop()
	end

	renderPoints(getPoints())
end

-- Configuration
local shakeMagnitude = 0.05 -- Magnitude of screen shake
local shakeDuration = 0.5 -- Duration of screen shake
local soundThreshold = 1 -- Minimum loudness of sound to trigger screen shake

-- Get the local player's camera
local camera = game:GetService("Workspace").CurrentCamera

-- Function to shake the screen
local function shakeScreen(magnitude, duration)
	local shakeOffset = Vector3.new(
		math.random(-magnitude * 100, magnitude * 100) / 100,
		math.random(-magnitude * 100, magnitude * 100) / 100,
		math.random(-magnitude * 100, magnitude * 100) / 100
	)
	local shakeCFrame = camera.CFrame + shakeOffset
	local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(duration, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out, 0, false, 0)
	local tween = game:GetService("TweenService"):Create(camera, tweenInfo, {CFrame = shakeCFrame})
	tween:Play()
end

-- Connect to the sound playing event
game:GetService("SoundService").Playing:Connect(function(sound)
	if sound.Playing and sound.SoundId and sound.Volume >= soundThreshold then
		shakeScreen(shakeMagnitude, shakeDuration)
	end
end)

function getClosestPlayer()
	local closestPlayer = {
		Distance = 500
	}	
	
    --calculate distance between part and players
    for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local distance = (player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - Part.Position).magnitude
			
			--if closestPlayer is nil or the current distance is less than the previous closestPlayer, set new closestPlayer
            if not closestPlayer or distance < (closestPlayer.Distance or math.huge) then
                closestPlayer = {
                    Player = player;
                    Distance = distance;
                }
			end
			
        end
    end
	
	--return the cloest player to part.
    return closestPlayer and closestPlayer.Player or nil;
end

end

local p,p2=1,5 --position/movement
local s,s2=0,5 --size/scale
local function CallOnChildren(Instance,FunctionToCall)
	FunctionToCall(Instance)
	for _,Child in next,Instance:GetChildren()do
		CallOnChildren(Child,FunctionToCall)
	end
end

local function GetNearestParent(Instance,ClassName)
	local Ancestor=Instance
	repeat
		Ancestor=Ancestor.Parent
		if Ancestor==nil then
			return nil
		end
	until Ancestor:IsA(ClassName)

	return Ancestor
end

local function GetBricks(StartInstance)
	local List={}
	CallOnChildren(StartInstance,function(Item)
		if Item:IsA("BasePart")then
			List[#List+1]=Item;
		end
	end)
	return List
end

-- Define the PathfindingAI class
local PathfindingAI = {}
PathfindingAI.__index = PathfindingAI

function PathfindingAI.new(neuralNetwork, grid)
	local self = setmetatable({}, PathfindingAI)

	self.neuralNetwork = neuralNetwork
	self.grid = grid

	return self
end

function PathfindingAI:findPath(start, goal)
	-- Perform pathfinding using the neural network
	local openSet = {start}
	local cameFrom = {}
	local gScore = {}
	local fScore = {}

	gScore[start] = 0
	fScore[start] = self:heuristic(start, goal)

	while #openSet > 0 do
		local current = self:findLowestFScore(openSet, fScore)
		if current == goal then
			return self:reconstructPath(cameFrom, goal)
		end

		table.remove(openSet, self:indexOf(openSet, current))

		for _, neighbor in ipairs(self:getNeighbors(current)) do
			local tentativeGScore = gScore[current] + 1

			if not gScore[neighbor] or tentativeGScore < gScore[neighbor] then
				gScore[neighbor] = tentativeGScore
				fScore[neighbor] = tentativeGScore + self:heuristic(neighbor, goal)
				cameFrom[neighbor] = current

				local input = self:generateInput(neighbor, goal)
				local output = self.neuralNetwork:forward(input)

				if output[1] > 0.5 then
					table.insert(openSet, neighbor)
				end
			end
		end
	end

	return nil -- No path found
end

local rand = Random.new()

local function noise(octaves, frequency, amplitude, lacunarity, persistence, x, y, z)
	local noiseSum = 0

	for _ = 1, octaves do
		noiseSum += math.noise((x or 0) * frequency, (y or 0) * frequency, (z or 0) * frequency) * amplitude
		frequency *= lacunarity
		amplitude *= persistence
	end

	return noiseSum
end

local function calculatePerlinWorm(length, yStep, octaves, frequency, amplitude, lacunarity, persistence, offset)
	local xSeed = rand:NextInteger(-2147483647, 2147483647);
	local zSeed = rand:NextInteger(-2147483647, 2147483647);

	local vectorValues = {}
	for i = 1, length do
		-- Axis clamping based on length.
		local yClamp = math.clamp((i - 5) / 100, 0, 1)
		local xNoise = noise(octaves, frequency, amplitude, lacunarity, persistence, xSeed, i)
		local zNoise = noise(octaves, frequency, amplitude, lacunarity, persistence, zSeed, i)
		table.insert(vectorValues, Vector3.new(xNoise * yClamp, i * yStep, zNoise * yClamp) + offset)
	end

	local vectorLerpedValues = {}
	for i, vector in ipairs(vectorValues) do
		local nextVector = vectorValues[i + 1]
		if nextVector then
			local magnitude = math.round((vector - nextVector).Magnitude / 3)
			for i = 1, magnitude do
				table.insert(vectorLerpedValues, vector:Lerp(nextVector, i / (magnitude + 1)))
			end
		end
	end

	return vectorLerpedValues
end

-- Create branching perlin worms.
local minBranchCount = 3
local maxBranchCount = 8
for i = 1, rand:NextInteger(minBranchCount, maxBranchCount) do
	local startVector = branchVectors[1][math.round(#branchVectors[1] * (i / maxBranchCount))]
	table.insert(branchVectors, calculatePerlinWorm(300, -2, 3, 0.001, 1536, 2, 0.5, startVector))
end

local function genTop()
	game.Workspace.Terrain:Clear()
	for x=0, size do
		local plrs = 0
		local Pings = {}
		for i,v in pairs(game.Players:GetChildren()) do
			plrs += 1
			table.insert(Pings,v:GetNetworkPing())
		end
		local totalPing = 0
		for i,v in pairs(Pings) do
			totalPing += v/plrs
		end
		task.wait(totalPing/1.5)
		for z=0, size do
			local amplitude = 1
			local frequency = 0.55
			local total = 0
			local normalizer = 0
			--------
			for octave=1, octaves do
				local noise = math.noise(((x + xOffset) / scale) * frequency, ((z + zOffset)  / scale) * frequency)
				noise = math.clamp(noise, -1, 1)
				total += noise * amplitude
				amplitude *= gain
				frequency *= lacunarity
				normalizer += amplitude
			end
			total /= normalizer
			total *= ampltiude_fbm
			---------
			local pos = Vector3.new(x * block_size, (math.floor(total + 10) * block_size), z * block_size) + Vector3.new(block_size/2,0,block_size/2)
			
			game.Workspace.Terrain:FillBlock(CFrame.new(pos),Vector3.new(block_size, block_size, block_size),Enum.Material.Grass)

		spawn(function()

			end
		end)

		PartTween:Play()
	end
end

--functions

local function convertTimestamp(timestamp)
	local currentTime = os.time()
	local elapsedTime = currentTime - timestamp

	-- Calculate elapsed time in seconds, minutes, hours, days, months, and years
	local seconds = elapsedTime % 60
	local minutes = math.floor(elapsedTime / 60) % 60
	local hours = math.floor(elapsedTime / 3600) % 24
	local days = math.floor(elapsedTime / 86400) % 30
	local months = math.floor(elapsedTime / 2592000) % 12
	local years = math.floor(elapsedTime / 31536000)

	-- Format the result based on the largest unit of time
	if years > 0 then
		return years .. " years"
	elseif months > 0 then
		return months .. " months"
	elseif days > 0 then
		return days .. " days"
	elseif hours > 0 then
		return hours .. " hours"
	elseif minutes > 0 then
		return minutes .. " mins"
	else
		return seconds .. " secs"
	end
end

local isCtrl = false

local overlap_params = OverlapParams.new()
overlap_params.FilterDescendantsInstances = {workspace.water}
overlap_params.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Whitelist

local airoverlap_params = OverlapParams.new()
airoverlap_params.FilterDescendantsInstances = {workspace.air}
airoverlap_params.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Whitelist

local bv = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
bv.MaxForce = Vector3.zero
bv.Velocity = Vector3.zero
bv.Parent = root

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
	local bounds = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(root.Position, 1, overlap_params)
	local airbounds = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(root.Position, 1, airoverlap_params)
	if #bounds > 0 and #airbounds == 0 then
		if isActionBound == false then
			ContextActionService:BindAction("UpMovie/DownMovie", upmovie, false, Enum.KeyCode.Space, Enum.KeyCode.LeftControl)
			isActionBound = true
		end
		humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.GettingUp, false)
		humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping, false)
		humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Swimming)
		bv.Velocity = humanoid.MoveDirection * humanoid.WalkSpeed + Vector3.new(0,0,0)
		bv.MaxForce = Vector3.new(math.huge, 5000, math.huge)
		if isSpace == true then
			bv.Velocity += Vector3.new(0, 15, 0)
		end
		if isCtrl == true then
			bv.Velocity += Vector3.new(0, -15, 0)
		end
	else
		humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.GettingUp, true)
		humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping, true)
		bv.Velocity = Vector3.zero
		bv.MaxForce = Vector3.zero
		ContextActionService:UnbindAction("UpMovie/DownMovie")
		isActionBound = false
	end
end)

function upmovie(actionname, inputstate, inputobject)
	if inputstate == Enum.UserInputState.Begin and inputobject.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Space then
		isSpace = true
	elseif inputstate == Enum.UserInputState.Begin and inputobject.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.LeftControl then
		isCtrl = true
	elseif inputobject.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.LeftControl then
		isCtrl = false
	elseif inputobject.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Space then
		isSpace = false
	end
end

function GetInputKeycodes()
	local codes = Keycodes["Computer"]
	if InputType == "Computer" then

		codes = Keycodes["Computer"]

	end
	
	return codes
end

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(k,p)
	if p then return end
	local codes = GetInputKeycodes()
	
	for i,key in ipairs(codes) do

		if k.KeyCode==key then

			if i==1 then -- forward
				Car:SetSpeed(CarSpeed)
			elseif i==2 then -- backward
				Car:SetSpeed(CarSpeed*-1)
			elseif i==3 then -- left
				Car:Turn(CarTurnAngle)
			else -- right
				Car:Turn(-CarTurnAngle)
			end

		end

	end
end)

UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(k,p)
	if p then return end
	local codes = GetInputKeycodes()
	
	for i,key in ipairs(codes) do

		if k.KeyCode==key then

			if i==1 then -- forward
				Car:SetSpeed(0)
			elseif i==2 then -- backward
				Car:SetSpeed(0)
			elseif i==3 then -- left
				Car:Turn(0)
			else -- right
				Car:Turn(0)
			end

		end

	end
end)

-- a better alternative implementation for the wait function
function wait_time(duration)
    local start = tick()
    local Heartbeat = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat
    repeat Heartbeat:Wait() until (tick() - start) >= duration
    return (tick() - start)
end

-- Support for debounce
function PlayCutscene()
	if bin then
		bin = false
		Music:Play()
		if ProtectTheCharacterWhilePlaying and ProtectTheCharacterWhilePlaying.Value and Player.Character then
			CharacterProtector.Parent = Player.Character
		end
		Demo:Play()
	end
end

Demo.EStop.Event:Connect(function()
	wait_time(Debounce.Value)
	CharacterProtector.Parent = nil
	if PlayOnce then
		if not PlayOnce.Value then
			bin = true
		end
	else
		bin = true
	end
	if StopMusicWhenFinished and StopMusicWhenFinished.Value then
		Music:Stop()
		if OnFinishedRemove then
			for i,v in pairs(OnFinishedRemove:GetChildren()) do
				if v:IsA("ObjectValue") then
					if v.Value then
						v.Value:Destroy()
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end
end)

local jsonDecode = http.JSONDecode

local clothingUrl = "https://catalog.roproxy.com/v1/search/items/details?Category=3&CreatorType=1&CreatorTargetId=%s&Cursor=%s"

local function getClothingRecursive(userId, cursor, clothing, maxTries)
	cursor = cursor or ""
	clothing = clothing or {}
	maxTries = maxTries or 10
	if maxTries == 0 then return end
	maxTries -= 1

	local requestUrl = clothingUrl:format(userId, cursor)
	local success, result = pcall(getAsync, http, requestUrl)
	if success then
		if result then
			local success2, result2 = pcall(jsonDecode, http, result)
			if success2 then
				if result2 then
					for _, clothingItem in ipairs(result2.data) do
						table.insert(clothing, clothingItem.id)
					end

					cursor = result2.nextPageCursor
					if cursor then
						return getClothingRecursive(userId, cursor, clothing, maxTries)
					else
						return clothing
					end
				end
			else
				warn(result2)
				task.wait()
				return getClothingRecursive(userId, cursor, clothing, maxTries)
			end
		end
	else
		warn(result)
		task.wait()
		return getClothingRecursive(userId, cursor, clothing, maxTries)
	end
end

	local success, result = pcall(getProductInfo, marketplace, assetId)

	if success then
		if result then
			return result.PriceInRobux
		end
	else
		warn(result)
	end
end

--// Functions \\--


--// Utility


local function removeIndex(tbl, index)
	tbl[index], tbl[#tbl] = tbl[#tbl], nil
end


local function checkEqual(tbl1: tbl, tbl2: tbl)

	for k,v in tbl1 do
		if v ~= tbl2[k] then return false end
	end

	for k,v in tbl2 do
		if v ~= tbl1[k] then return false end
	end

	return true

end


--// Encryption


local function encodeKey(id: number): string

	assert(type(id) == "number", "First argument provided must be a number.")
	assert(id > -1, "Number provided can't be lower than 0.")
	assert(id % 1 == 0, "Number provided must be an integer.")
	assert(id < 65537, "Integer provided can't be larger than 2^16")

	id -= 1

	if id == -1 then

		return ''

	elseif id < 256 then

		--[[
		
		string.pack("h", id) is the same as string.char(id)
		
		]]

		return string.char(id)

	else

		--[[
		
		string.pack("H", id) is the same as

		local n = id%256
		
		string.char((id-n)/256) .. string.char(n)
		
		]]

		return string.pack("H", id)

	end

end


local function decodeKey(key: string): number

	assert(type(key) == "string", "The key provided must be a string.")
	assert(#key < 3, "The key provided can't be larger than 2 characters.")

	if #key == 0 then return 0
	elseif #key == 1 then
		return 1 + string.byte(key) -- same as string.unpack("B", key)
	else
		return 1 + string.unpack("H", key)
	end

end

	local vanity = Utility.CheckVanity(descendant)

	if vanity then

	end

end


local function descendantRemoving(descendant)

	local vanity = Utility.CheckVanity(descendant)

	if vanity then

		local index = table.find(TrackedInstances, descendant)

		if index then
			removeIndex(TrackedInstances, index)
		end

	end

end

--[[--

documentation things

ok so the kick/ban codes;
the code is in 2 parts, before and after the "-"
the first part is the type code, for example "XS" which is is bypassing client checks and the user is not banned for it
when the first part ends with "S" meaning soft, it means that the user is not banned, but they are kicked
when the first part ends with "H" meaning hard,  it means that the user is banned and cannot join back until unbanned
the second part after the "-" is the location identifier, it should be in hex is 4 chars long and manually randomly selected for each kick
the reason for this is to make it more cryptic and harder to find what caused the kick when on the client

the list of type codes and the definitions of each are as follows:

(automated detection)
XS - bypassing client checks (soft)
FS - flooding the server with requests or data (soft)
DH - exploiting a bug/glitch with exploits (hard)



(hard bans handed out by moderators/admins, the first part of these end in a "H" because it can only really be hard)

	return a + (b - a) * c

local direction = nil
local value1 = 0
local value2 = 0
local RootJointC0 = RootJoint.C0
local LeftHipJointC0 = LeftHipJoint.C0
local RightHipJointC0 = RightHipJoint.C0

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
	force = root.Velocity * Vector3.new(1,0,1)
	
	
	if force.Magnitude > 0.001 then
		direction = force.Unit	
		value1 = root.CFrame.RightVector:Dot(direction)
		value2 = root.CFrame.LookVector:Dot(direction)

	else
		value1 = 0
		value2 = 0
	end
	RootJoint.C0 = RootJoint.C0:Lerp(RootJointC0 * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(value2 * 1), math.rad(-value1 * 30), 0), 0.2)
	LeftHipJoint.C0 = LeftHipJoint.C0:Lerp(LeftHipJointC0 * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(value1 * 15), 0, 0), 0.2)
	RightHipJoint.C0 = RightHipJoint.C0:Lerp(RightHipJointC0 * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(-value1 * 15), 0, 0), 0.2)
	
	
end)

	local clock = game.Lighting.ClockTime
	local glat = math.clamp(game.Lighting.GeographicLatitude,0.1,360)
	Viewport.Ambient = Color3.fromRGB(234*math.clamp((12-math.abs(-12+clock))/12,0.2,1), 242*math.clamp((12-math.abs(-12+clock))/12,0.2,1), 255*math.clamp((12-math.abs(-12+clock))/12,0.2,1))

end

	tween:Destroy() -- Limpia la memoria

	-- Cambia la posición objetivo para subir nuevamente a la posición inicial
	if union.Position == targetPosition then
		targetPosition = originalPosition
	end

	isMoving = false
end)

			":" .. currentTime.Minute ..				-- Output what minute

local function onExitSeat(obj, seat)
	if obj:IsA("Player") then
		RemotesFolder.ExitSeat:FireClient(obj, false)

		local playerGui = obj:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")
		if playerGui then
			local scriptContainer = playerGui:FindFirstChild(UniqueName .. "_ClientControls")
			if scriptContainer then
				scriptContainer:Destroy()
			end
		end
	end

	setHatsAndLegsTransparency(obj, 0)

	if obj:IsA("Humanoid") then
		obj.Sit = false
	end

	if CharacterRemovingConnection then
		CharacterRemovingConnection:Disconnect()
		CharacterRemovingConnection = nil
	end

	if seat == DriverSeat then
		DriverSeat:SetNetworkOwnershipAuto()
		Chassis.Reset()
		EffectsInstance:Disable()
	end
end

local function onEnterSeat(obj, seat)
	if seat and seat.Occupant then
		local ShouldTakeOffHats = true
		local prop = TopModel:GetAttribute("TakeOffAccessories")

		if prop ~= nil then
			ShouldTakeOffHats = prop
		end

		if ShouldTakeOffHats then
			setHatsAndLegsTransparency(seat.Occupant, 1)
		end
	end

	if not obj:IsA("Player") then
		return
	end

	local playerGui = obj:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")
	if playerGui then
		local screenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
		screenGui.Name = UniqueName .. "_ClientControls"
		screenGui.ResetOnSpawn = true
		screenGui.Parent = playerGui

		CharacterRemovingConnection = obj.CharacterRemoving:Connect(function()
			onExitSeat(obj)
		end)

		local localGuiModule = LocalGuiModulePrototype:Clone()
		localGuiModule.Parent = screenGui

		if seat == DriverSeat then
			local driverScript = DriverScriptPrototype:Clone()
			driverScript.CarValue.Value = TopModel
			driverScript.Parent = screenGui
			driverScript.Disabled = false

			DriverSeat:SetNetworkOwner(obj)
			EffectsInstance:Enable()
		else
			local passengerScript = PassengerScriptPrototype:Clone()
			passengerScript.CarValue.Value = TopModel
			passengerScript.Parent = screenGui
			passengerScript.Disabled = false
		end

		local scriptsReference = Instance.new("ObjectValue")
		scriptsReference.Name = "ScriptsReference"
		scriptsReference.Value = Scripts
		scriptsReference.Parent = screenGui
	end
end

local function updateTime()
    local time=os.date("*t")
    local hour=time.hour
    if hour>12 then 
        hour-=12 
    end 
    local minute=time.min
    if minute<10 then 
        minute="0"..minute 
    end 
    clock.Text = string.format("%d:%s %s",hour,tostring(minute),time.hour>=12 and "PM" or "AM")
end

local function hotbarHolder(props)
	return New "Frame" {
		Name = "Holder",
		AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 1),
		BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(31, 34, 63),
		BackgroundTransparency = 1,
		BorderSizePixel = 0,
		Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.98),
		Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.308, 0.126),

		[Children] = {
			New "UIListLayout" {
				Padding = UDim.new(0.03, 0),
				FillDirection = Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal,
				HorizontalAlignment = Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center,
				SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder,
				VerticalAlignment = Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center,
			},
			
			-- insert the individual items here
			ForPairs(props.itemList, function(index, item)
				local component = HotbarItem{
					ImageId = item.TextureId,
					ItemName = item.Name,
					HotbarID = index,
					activeValueObj = activeItemID,
					blockedValueObj = hotbarLocked,
				}
				
				return index, component
			end,
			
			function(index, component)
				component:Destroy()
			end)
		}
	}
end

script.Parent.PlaceTower.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(Player, TowerName, Position)
	if Player.Stats.Zuru.Value >= game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Towers[TowerName].Configuration.Price.Value then
		if Player.Stats.TowersPlaced.Value < 8 then
			local Template = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Towers[TowerName]:Clone()
			--Template.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
			Player.Stats.Zuru.Value -= Template.Configuration.Price.Value
			Player.Stats.TowersPlaced.Value += 1
			for i, Part in ipairs(Template:GetDescendants()) do
				if Part:IsA("BasePart") then
					Part.CollisionGroup = "Tower"
				end
			end
			Template.Parent = workspace.Towers
			Template.Configuration.PlayerOwner.Value = Player.Name
			Template.Torso.CFrame = Position - Vector3.new(0,3.25,0)
			wait()
			for i = 1, 10, 1 do
				Template:PivotTo(Position - Vector3.new(0,3.25,0))
				wait()
			end
			Template.Torso.SpawnSound:Play()
			Template.Torso.AbilityAtt.Spawn.Enabled = true
			Template.Torso.AbilityAtt.SpawnAura.Enabled = true
			Template.HumanoidRootPart.Orientation = Vector3.new(0,Template.HumanoidRootPart.Orientation.Y,0)
			wait(0.5)
			Template.Torso.AbilityAtt.Spawn.Enabled = false
			Template.Torso.AbilityAtt.SpawnAura.Enabled = false
		else
			warn("Max Towers Placed")
		end
	else
		warn("Cannot Afford")
	end
end)

local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local ServerTowers = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Towers")

function CreateFolder (Parent)
	local Folder = Instance.new("Folder")
	Folder.Parent = Parent
	Folder.Name = "User_Data"
	
	local Towers = Instance.new("Folder")
	Towers.Parent = Folder
	Towers.Name = "Towers"
	
	local TowerSkins = Instance.new("Folder")
	TowerSkins.Name = "TowerSkins"
	TowerSkins.Parent = Folder
	
	local Cash = Instance.new("IntValue")
	Cash.Parent = Folder
	Cash.Name = "Cash"
	
	local Level = Instance.new("IntValue")
	Level.Parent = Folder
	Level.Name = "Level"
	
	local XP = Instance.new("IntValue")
	XP.Parent = Folder
	XP.Name = "XP"
	
	local MaxXP = Instance.new("IntValue")
	MaxXP.Parent = Folder
	MaxXP.Name = "MaxXP"
	
	local Wins = Instance.new("IntValue")
	Wins.Parent = Folder
	Wins.Name = "Wins"
	
	local Defeats = Instance.new("IntValue")
	Defeats.Parent = Folder
	Defeats.Name = "Defeats"
	
	return Folder,Towers,Cash,Level,XP,MaxXP,Wins,Defeats,TowerSkins
end

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(Player)
	local Data = GetDataStore(Player.UserId)
	local Folder,Towers,Cash,Level,XP,MaxXP,Wins,Defeats,TowerSkins = CreateFolder(Player)
	
	Cash.Value = Data.Cash
	Level.Value = Data.Level
	
	XP.Value = Data.XP
	MaxXP.Value = Data.MaxXP
	
	Wins.Value = Data.Wins
	Defeats.Value = Data.Defeats
	
	for i,v in ipairs(Data.Towers) do
		local NewTower = Instance.new("ObjectValue")
		NewTower.Parent = Towers
		NewTower.Name = v.TowerName
		NewTower.Value = ServerTowers:FindFirstChild(v.TowerName)
	end
	
	for i,v in ipairs(Data.TowerSkins) do
		local NewSkin = Instance.new("ObjectValue")
		NewSkin.Parent = TowerSkins
		NewSkin.Name = v.SkinName
	end
end)

local function setUpCircularProgressBar(bar)
	local leftGradient = bar.LeftGradient.ProgressBarImage.UIGradient
	local rightGradient = bar.RightGradient.ProgressBarImage.UIGradient

	local progress = bar.Progress
	progress.Changed:Connect(function(value)
		local angle = math.clamp(value * 360, 0, 360)
		leftGradient.Rotation = math.clamp(angle, 180, 360)
		rightGradient.Rotation = math.clamp(angle, 0, 180)
	end)
end

local function CallOnChildren(Instance,FunctionToCall)
	FunctionToCall(Instance)
	for _,Child in next,Instance:GetChildren()do
		CallOnChildren(Child,FunctionToCall)
	end
end

local function GetNearestParent(Instance,ClassName)
	local Ancestor=Instance
	repeat
		Ancestor=Ancestor.Parent
		if Ancestor==nil then
			return nil
		end
	until Ancestor:IsA(ClassName)

	return Ancestor
end

local function GetBricks(StartInstance)
	local List={}
	CallOnChildren(StartInstance,function(Item)
		if Item:IsA("BasePart")then
			List[#List+1]=Item;
		end
	end)
	return List
end

local function drawWalls(walls)
	for _, wall in pairs(walls["Vertical"]) do
		local square = Instance.new("Frame")
		square.Name = wall["X"]..wall["Y"]
		square.Parent = wallsFolder
		square.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(.5,.5)
		square.Size = UDim2.new(0.015,0,0.095,0)
		square.Position = UDim2.new(wall["X"]/10+.05,0,wall["Y"]/10+.05,0)
		square.BorderSizePixel = 0
		square.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255,0,0)
	end
	for _, wall in pairs(walls["Horizontal"]) do
		local square = Instance.new("Frame")
		square.Name = wall["X"]..wall["Y"]
		square.Parent = wallsFolder
		square.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(.5,.5)
		square.Size = UDim2.new(0.095,0,0.015,0)
		square.Position = UDim2.new(wall["X"]/10+.05,0,wall["Y"]/10+.05,0)
		square.BorderSizePixel = 0
		square.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255,0,0)
	end
end

function loadSlot(Item)
	local viewmodelFolder = game.ReplicatedStorage.Viewmodels
	local moduleFolder = game.ReplicatedStorage.Modules
	
	for i,v in pairs(camera:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("Model") then
			v:Destroy()

	end
	
	if moduleFolder:FindFirstChild(Item) then

	end

	local X,Y,Z = rot:ToOrientation()
	swayCF = swayCF:Lerp(CFrame.Angles(math.sin(X) * swayAMT, math.sin(Y) * swayAMT, 0), .1)
	lastCameraCF = camera.CFrame
	
	local humanoid =  character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
	
	if humanoid then
		local bobOffset = CFrame.new(humanoid.CameraOffset.X, humanoid.CameraOffset.Y, humanoid.CameraOffset.Z)
		
		for i,v in pairs(camera:GetChildren()) do
			if v:IsA("Model") then
				v:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(camera.CFrame * swayCF * aimCF * bobOffset)
			end

	if isAiming and framework.viewmodel ~= nil and framework.module.canAim then
		local offset = framework.viewmodel.AimPart.CFrame:ToObjectSpace(framework.viewmodel.PrimaryPart.CFrame)

		currentSwayAMT = swayAMT
	else
		local offset = CFrame.new()
		aimCF = aimCF:Lerp(offset, framework.module.aimSmooth)
	end
end

local snap = 3


game.ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("PlaceBlockRE").OnServerEvent:Connect(function(plr, blockType, target, targetSurface, removeOrPlace)
	
	
	if removeOrPlace == "placing" then
	
		local position
		
		if targetSurface == Enum.NormalId.Top then
			position = target.Position + Vector3.new(0, snap, 0)
				
		elseif targetSurface == Enum.NormalId.Bottom then
			position = target.Position - Vector3.new(0, snap, 0)
				
		elseif targetSurface == Enum.NormalId.Left then
			position = target.Position - Vector3.new(snap, 0, 0)
				
		elseif targetSurface == Enum.NormalId.Right then
			position = target.Position + Vector3.new(snap, 0, 0)
				
		elseif targetSurface == Enum.NormalId.Front then
			position = target.Position - Vector3.new(0, 0, snap)
				
		elseif targetSurface == Enum.NormalId.Back then
			position = target.Position + Vector3.new(0, 0, snap)
		end
		
			
		local blockInPos
			
		for i, d in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
				
			if d:IsA("BasePart") and d.Position == position then blockInPos = true end
		end
			
			
		if not blockInPos and position then
				
			local newBlock = blockType:Clone()
			newBlock.Size = Vector3.new(snap, snap, snap)
			newBlock.Anchored = true
			
			newBlock.Position = position
			
			newBlock.Parent = workspace
			
			game.ReplicatedStorage.PlaySoundRE:FireClient(plr)
		end
		
		
	elseif removeOrPlace == "removing" then
		
		if target and target:FindFirstChild("Placeable") then
			target:Destroy()
			
			game.ReplicatedStorage.PlaySoundRE:FireClient(plr)
		end
	end
end)

function notransparency(char:Model)
	for i, child in pairs(char:GetChildren()) do
		if child.Name ~= "Heart" and child.Name ~= "BrokenHeart" and child.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" then
			if child:IsA("BasePart") or child:IsA("Model") then
				if child:FindFirstChildOfClass("BasePart") then
					notransparency(child)
				else
					if not child:IsA("Model") then
						local target = 0
						if child:FindFirstChild("OgTrans") then
							target = child.OgTrans.Value
							child.OgTrans:Destroy()
						end
						child.Anchored = false
						local ohhiagain = game.TweenService:Create(child,TweenInfo.new(1,Enum.EasingStyle.Linear),{Transparency=target})
						ohhiagain:Play()
						task.spawn(function()
							ohhiagain.Completed:Wait()
							ohhiagain:Destroy()
						end)
					end
				end
			elseif child:IsA("Accessory") then
				local actualpart:Part = child:FindFirstChild("Handle")
				local ohhiagain = game.TweenService:Create(actualpart,TweenInfo.new(1,Enum.EasingStyle.Linear),{Transparency=0})
				ohhiagain:Play()
				task.spawn(function()
					ohhiagain.Completed:Wait()
					ohhiagain:Destroy()
				end)
			end
		end
	end
end

local function ColorSimilarity(Color_1: Color3, Color_2: Color3)
	local R1, G1, B1 = Color_1.R, Color_1.G, Color_1.B
	local R2, G2, B2 = Color_2.R, Color_2.G, Color_2.B
	local R, G, B = (R1 - R2), (G1 - G2), (B1 - B2)

	return math.sqrt((R^2) +( G^2) + (B^2))
end

local			function DoSomethingWithALoadedProfile(Spieler : Player, Profil)
				COLLECTION:AddTag()
	
				local		Spielerstats							=			Instance.new("Folder")		
							Spielerstats.Name						=			"leaderstats"
							Spielerstats.Parent						=			Spieler
	
				local		CashVal									=			Instance.new("IntValue")
							CashVal.Name							=			"Cash"
							CashVal.Value							=			Profil.Data.Statistiken.Cash
	
	
				coroutine.wrap(function()
							while		task.wait() do
										CashVal.Value				=			Profil.Data.Statistiken.Cash
							end
				end)()
	
				print(Spieler.Name.." ist beigetreten. Spielerprofil:", Profil)
end

local			function PlayerAdded(Spieler : Player)
				local			Profil								=			ProfileStore:LoadProfileAsync("Spieler_"..Spieler.UserId)
				if				not Profil then
								Spieler:Kick("Your profile could not be loaded. Try again later.")
								return
				end
		
				Profil:AddUserId(Spieler.UserId)
				Profil:Reconcile()
				Profil:ListenToRelease(function()
								DatenManager.Profile[Spieler]		=			Profil
								Spieler:Kick("Hey bro, you shouldn't be here (anymore). Feel free to join again.")
				end)
	
				if				Spieler:IsDescendantOf(PLAYERS) then
								DatenManager.Profile[Spieler]		=			Profil
								DoSomethingWithALoadedProfile(Spieler, Profil)
				else
								Profil:Release()
				end
end
local			function PlayerRemoving(Spieler : Player)
				local			Profil								=			DatenManager.Profile[Spieler]
				if				Profil == nil then return end
				Profil:Release()
end

local function allowingRound()
	for i = utils.times.ROUND_TIME, 0, -1 do
		if i == 0 then break end
		
		logicRound()
		
		task.wait(1)
		utils.times.STATUS_TEXT.Value = utils.messages.ROUND_TIME..' '..i..' seconds'
	end
end

local function finishRound()
	for i, player in pairs(playingPlayers) do
		player.player:LoadCharacter()
		
		if player.Character:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') then
			player.Character:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart').CFrame = CFrame.new(game.Workspace.Lobby.SpawnLocation.Position)	
		end
		
		table.remove(playingPlayers, i)
	end
	
	countdown(utils.messages.FINISHED_ROUND, utils.times.FINISH_ROUND)
end

local function onPlayerRemoving(player)
	for i, py in pairs(playingPlayers) do
		if py.player == player then
			table.remove(playingPlayers, i)
			break
		end
	end
	
	local seekers, hidden = utils.splitPlayers(players)
	
	if #hidden == 0 then finishRound() end
	
end

local NPC = script.Parent
local h = NPC.Humanoid
local folder = NPC.Waypoints

local function findAndGoTo(destination)
	local path = PFS:FindPathAsync(NPC.HumanoidRootPart.Position, destination.Position)
	if path.Status == Enum.PathStatus.Success then
		folder:ClearAllChildren()
		for i,v  in ipairs(path:GetWaypoints()) do
			local part = Instance.new("Part", folder)
			part.Name = "Waypoint_" .. i
			part.Size = Vector3.new(1,1,1)
			part.Position = v.Position
			part.Anchored = true
			part.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Really red")
			part.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
			part.CanCollide = false
			part.Transparency = 1
		end
		for i,v  in ipairs(path:GetWaypoints()) do
			h:MoveTo(v.Position)
			h.MoveToFinished:Wait()
			if v.Action == Enum.PathWaypointAction.Jump then
				h.JumpPower = 100 + math.abs(destination.Position.Y - NPC.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Y)
				h.Jump = true
			end
		end
	else
		h:MoveTo(destination.Position)
		if destination.Position.Y - NPC.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Y then
			if math.sqrt(math.pow((destination.Position.X-NPC.HumanoidRootPart.Position.X), 2) + math.pow((destination.Position.Z-NPC.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Z), 2)) <= 100 then
				h.JumpPower = 100 + math.abs(destination.Position.Y - NPC.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Y)
				h.Jump = true
			end
		end
	end
end

--if the player isnt moving it cancells the pathfind
local function checkPlayerMoving()
	local player = game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(NPC)
	if not player then return end
	local lastPos = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
	while wait() do
		if (player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - lastPos).magnitude < 0.1 then
			h:MoveTo(NPC.HumanoidRootPart.Position)
		end
		lastPos = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
	end
end

module.Charge = function(Player, BossHumanoidRootPart, BossHumanoid)
	local PlayerFound = table.find(AttackedPlayersArray, Player.Name)
	if not PlayerFound then
		table.insert(AttackedPlayersArray, PlayerIndexCount, Player.Name)
		PlayerIndexCount += 1
	end
	local Beam = game:GetService("ServerStorage").Arrows:Clone()
	Beam.Parent = workspace
	local Attachment0 = game:GetService("ServerStorage").Attachment0:Clone()
	Attachment0.Parent = workspace
	local Attachment1 = game:GetService("ServerStorage").Attachment1:Clone()
	local PlayerPosition = Player:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart").Position
	local PlayerCFrame = Player:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame
	local LoadRollingAnimation = BossHumanoid:LoadAnimation(AnimationsFolder.Rolling)
	Attachment1.Parent = workspace
	Beam.Attachment0 = Attachment0.Attachment0
	Beam.Attachment1 = Attachment1.Attachment1
	Attachment0.Position = BossHumanoidRootPart.Position - Vector3.new(0, 6, 0)
	Attachment1.Position = PlayerPosition - Vector3.new(0, 2, 0)
	Beam.FaceCamera = true
	Attachment0.Orientation = Vector3.new(0, 0, 90) + BossHumanoidRootPart.Position
	Attachment1.Orientation = Vector3.new(0, 0, 90) + PlayerPosition
	game.Debris:AddItem(Attachment0, 0.5)
	game.Debris:AddItem(Attachment1, 0.5)
	game.Debris:AddItem(Beam, 0.5)
	task.wait(0.5)
	TweenService:Create(BossHumanoidRootPart, TweenInfo.new((PlayerPosition + Vector3.new(0,3,0) -  BossHumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude / 100), {CFrame = PlayerCFrame * CFrame.new(0, 3, 0)}):Play()
	LoadRollingAnimation:Play()
	local RollingSound = SoundsFolder.RocksRolling:Clone()
	RollingSound.Parent = BossHumanoidRootPart
	RollingSound:Play()
	game.Debris:AddItem(RollingSound, RollingSound.TimeLength)
	task.wait((PlayerPosition + Vector3.new(0,3,0) -  BossHumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude / 100)
	LoadRollingAnimation:Stop()
	module.RockDebree(BossHumanoidRootPart.Position, 5)
end

function findTarget()
	local MaxDistance = 100000 -- change the distance in studs that the dummy can see the enemy
	local NearestTarget
	local Distance

	for i, v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("Model") then
			if Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(v) then
				if v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
					local Hrp = v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")

					Distance = math.floor((Hrp.Position - HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude)

					if Distance <= MaxDistance then
						MaxDistance = Distance

						NearestTarget = v
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end

	return NearestTarget
end

    if canDoubleJump == true then

        local jumpVelocity = (player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame.upVector * jumpPower) + Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)

    end
end

local DeleteSuccess , DeleteError = pcall(function()
	DeleteItemEvent.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(plr,items)
		local Inventory = plr.Profile:FindFirstChild("Inventory")
		for _, item in pairs(items) do
			if Inventory:FindFirstChild(item.Class.."s"):FindFirstChild(item.Name) then
				local ToDelete = Inventory:FindFirstChild(item.Class.."s"):FindFirstChild(item.Name)
				if ToDelete:GetAttribute("Locked") == false then
					ToDelete:Destroy()
					Inventory:SetAttribute("ItemsNum", Inventory:GetAttribute("ItemsNum")-1)

					RemoveItemEvent:FireClient(plr,item.Name)
				end
			end
		end		
	end)
end)

-- ======================================================= Lock
LockItemEvent.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player,i,c)
	local profile = player.Profile
	local Inventory = profile.Inventory
	if Inventory:FindFirstChild(c.."s"):FindFirstChild(i) then
		local Item = Inventory:FindFirstChild(c.."s"):FindFirstChild(i)
		Item:SetAttribute("Locked", not Item:GetAttribute("Locked"))
	end
end)

	end

	if Message == true then

	elseif Message == false then
		error("Nitrogen: Message cannot be a boolean.")
	else
		local args = {
			[1] = tostring(Message),
			[2] = "All"
		}

		game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):WaitForChild("DefaultChatSystemChatEvents"):WaitForChild("SayMessageRequest"):FireServer(unpack(args))
	end
end

function LocalPlr:PlaySound(Id, Volume, Looped)
	if tonumber(Id) then
		if tonumber(Volume) then
			if Looped == true then
				local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", workspace)
				Sound.SoundId = Id
				Sound.Volume = Volume
				Sound.Looped = true
			elseif Looped == false then
				local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", workspace)
				Sound.SoundId = Id
				Sound.Volume = Volume
				Sound.Looped = false
			else
				error("Nitrogen: Looped must be a boolean.")
			end
		else
			error("Nitrogen: Volume cannot be a string or boolean.")
		end
	else
		error("Nitrogen: Id cannot be a string or boolean.")
	end
end

	if tonumber(Fov) then
		game.Workspace.CurrentCamera.FieldOfView = Fov

		error("Nitrogen: Fov cannot be a string or boolean.")
	end
end

-- Function to generate LiDAR dots in a vertical pattern from top to bottom
local function generateLiDARDots(density, spacing, delay)
	-- Get the player's camera
	local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
	if not camera then
		return
	end

	-- Calculate the right and up direction vectors
	local right = camera.CFrame.RightVector
	local up = camera.CFrame.UpVector

	-- Generate dots in a vertical pattern from top to bottom
	for j = density, -density, -1 do
		for i = -density, density do
			local dot = Instance.new("Part")
			dot.Shape = Enum.PartType.Ball
			dot.Size = Vector3.new(0.2, 0.2, 0.2)
			dot.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Bright green")
			dot.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
			dot.CanCollide = false
			dot.Anchored = true

			-- Calculate the dot's position based on density and spacing
			local offsetX = i * spacing
			local offsetY = j * spacing

			-- Get the position and direction for each dot
			local dotPosition = camera.CFrame.Position + (camera.CFrame.LookVector * 10) + (right * offsetX * 0.2) + (up * offsetY * 0.2)
			local dotDirection = (dotPosition - camera.CFrame.Position).Unit

			-- Perform a raycast to find objects in the dot's direction, ignoring the player's character
			local raycastParams = RaycastParams.new()
			raycastParams.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Blacklist
			raycastParams.FilterDescendantsInstances = {player.Character}

			local raycastResult = workspace:Raycast(camera.CFrame.Position, dotDirection * 1000, raycastParams)
			if raycastResult then
				-- Set the dot's position to the hit position
				dot.Position = raycastResult.Position
				dot.Transparency = 1 -- Make the dot initially transparent
				dot.Parent = workspace

				-- Tween the transparency to gradually reveal the dot
				local transparencyTween = game.TweenService:Create(dot, TweenInfo.new(delay), { Transparency = 0 })
				transparencyTween:Play()
			end
		end
	end
end

    elseif inputObject.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.A then

    elseif inputObject.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.S then

	self.Instance = instance
	self.Balance = 0
	
	return self
end

function Bank:Init()

		self:OnWorthChange(...)
	end)
end

	self:SetDisplay("$" .. RoundBalance)

--make a script that generates a red orb from this position and makes it go forward
local function makeOrb()
	local orb = Instance.new("Part")
	orb.Name = "Red Orb"
	orb.Size = size
	orb.Position = position.Value
	orb.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Really red")
	orb.Anchored = true
	noise.Parent = orb
	wait(0.1)
	script.Parent:Destroy()
end

--make it a sphere and then make it go towards the CFrame which is the front with a bodyvelocity
local function makeSphere()
	local sphere = Instance.new("Part")
	sphere.Name = "Red Sphere"
	sphere.Size = size
	sphere.Position = position.Value
	sphere.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Really red")
	sphere.Anchored = true
	noise.Parent = sphere
	
	local bv=Instance.new("BodyVelocity",sphere)
	bv.maxForce=Vector3.new(0,math.huge,0)
	bv.velocity=sphere.CFrame.lookVector*100
	
	wait(1.5)
	script.Parent:Destroy()
end

function applyCFs(player: Player, cameraLook: Vector3, mouseLook: Vector3, aimOffset: CFrame)
	local character = player.Character
	if character == nil then return end
	
	local torso = character:FindFirstChild("Torso")
	if torso == nil then return end
	
	local neck = torso:FindFirstChild("Neck")
	local leftShoulder = torso:FindFirstChild("Left Shoulder")
	local rightShoulder = torso:FindFirstChild("Right Shoulder")
	if neck == nil or leftShoulder == nil or rightShoulder == nil then return end
	
	neck.C0 = CFrame.new(0, yOffset, 0) * CFrame.Angles(0, -math.asin(cameraLook.X), 0) * CFrame.Angles(math.asin(cameraLook.Y), 0, 0) * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(90), math.rad(180), 0)
	if character:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Tool") then
		leftShoulder.C0 = aimOffset * CFrame.new(-1,0.5,0) * CFrame.Angles(math.asin(mouseLook.Y),math.rad(-90),0)
		rightShoulder.C0 = aimOffset * CFrame.new(1,0.5,0) * CFrame.Angles(math.asin(mouseLook.Y),math.rad(90),0)

-- create a function for sorting a table alphabetically and apply it to the names table
table.sort(names, function(a,b)
	return a:lower() < b:lower()
end)

local possibleRankings = {}

for i = 1, numOfCompetitors do
	table.insert(possibleRankings, i)
end

-- clone a characterinfo frame into the trackgui for each name in the names table
for i, competitor in ipairs(names) do
	local charInfo = script:FindFirstChild("CharacterInfo"):Clone()
	charInfo.Parent = trackGui.Frame
	charInfo.Name = competitor
	
	-- set the name of the characterinfo frame to the name of the competitor
	charInfo.NameHeader.Text = competitor
	
	local ranking = possibleRankings[math.random(1, #possibleRankings)]
	charInfo.RankingHeader.Text = ranking
	
	-- add the correct suffix to the ranking
	if ranking == 1 then
		charInfo.RankingHeader.Text = charInfo.RankingHeader.Text .. "st"
	elseif ranking == 2 then
		charInfo.RankingHeader.Text = charInfo.RankingHeader.Text .. "nd"
	elseif ranking == 3 then
		charInfo.RankingHeader.Text = charInfo.RankingHeader.Text .. "rd"
	else
		charInfo.RankingHeader.Text = charInfo.RankingHeader.Text .. "th"
	end
	
	charInfo.LayoutOrder = ranking
	
	table.remove(possibleRankings, table.find(possibleRankings, ranking))
end

function round.LoadMap()
	local votedMap = round.ToggleVoting()
	local mapFolder = ServerStorage.Maps:FindFirstChild(votedMap)
	if not mapFolder then
		mapFolder = ServerStorage.Maps.Blons
	end
	
	local newMap = mapFolder:Clone()
	newMap.Parent = workspace.Map 
	
	local spawnBox = workspace.SpawnBox
	local currentFloor = spawnBox.CurrentFloor.SurfaceGui.Frame.TextLabel
	local mud = spawnBox.Mud.Mud
	
	-- TweenService animation to move the mud down
	local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(1, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out)
	local tween = TweenService:Create(mud, tweenInfo, {Position = mud.Position + Vector3.new(0, -10, 0)})
	spawnBox.Mud.BackMud:Destroy()
	tween:Play()

	-- Destroy the mud after the animation finishes
	task.wait(1.15)
	mud:Destroy()
	
	workspace.SpawnBox.Floor:Destroy()
	spawnBox.ElevatorBell:Play()
	currentFloor.Text = "Ground"
	
	-- Destroy the elevator parts with TweenService transition moving upwards using quad easing style
	local elevatorParts = { spawnBox.Front }
	local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(1, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad)

	for i, part in ipairs(elevatorParts) do
		local startPosition = part.Position
		local targetPosition = startPosition + Vector3.new(0, part.Size.Y, 0) -- Move the part upwards

		local tween = TweenService:Create(part, tweenInfo, {
			Position = targetPosition
		})

		tween:Play()

		-- Destroy the part after the tween completes
		tween.Completed:Connect(function()
			part:Destroy()
		end)
	end


		
	local portal = newMap:WaitForChild("Start")
	
	newMap.Base.Humanoid.HealthChanged:Connect(function(health)
		if health <= 0 then
			info.GameRunning.Value = false
			info.Message.Value = "We failed.."
		end
	end)
	
	return newMap
end

-- function to find nearest player
function findNearestPlayer()
	local players = game.Players:GetPlayers()
	local nearestPlayer = nil
	local nearestDistance = math.huge

	for player in ipairs(players) do
		local character = player.Character
		if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
			local distance = (character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - humanoid.RootPart.Position).magnitude
			if distance < nearestDistance then
				nearestPlayer = player
				nearestDistance = distance
			end
		end
	end

	return nearestPlayer
end

			else ""

		detailPriceLabel.Text = object.Price .. " 💲"
	end
end

function ServerFunctions.ApplyDamageToPlayer(player, target, damageAmount)
	-- Get power attribute from the attacker player's character
	local powerAttribute = player:GetAttribute("Power") or 1

	-- Get resistance attribute from the target player's character
	local resistanceAttribute = target:GetAttribute("Resistance") or 1

	-- Get power boost attribute from the attacker player's character
	local powerBoost = player:GetAttribute("PowerBoost") or 0

	-- Get resistance boost attribute from the attacker player's character
	local resistanceBoost = player:GetAttribute("ResistanceBoost") or 0

	-- Calculate the effective power attribute with power boost
	local effectivePowerAttribute = powerAttribute * powerBoost

	-- Calculate the effective resistance attribute with resistance boost
	local effectiveResistanceAttribute = resistanceAttribute * resistanceBoost

	-- Calculate the damage based on effective power and resistance attributes
	local calculatedDamage
	
	calculatedDamage = damageAmount * (effectivePowerAttribute / effectiveResistanceAttribute)

local word = {"D", "R", "A", "G", "O", "N"} -- 0x44 0x52 0x41 0x47 0x4f 0x4e

local properties = {
	["Instance"] = {
		["Name"] = "string"
	},
	["BasePart"] = {
		["Reflectance"] = "number",
		["Transparency"] = "number",
		["RootPriority"] = "number"
	},
	["Hint"] = {
		["Text"] = "string"
	},
	["IntValue"] = {
		["Value"] = "number"
	},
	["NumberValue"] = {
		["Value"] = "number"
	},
	["StringValue"] = {
		["Value"] = "string"
	},
}

local function mutate(n)
	local s
	if type(n) == "number" then
		s = string.pack("n", n)
	elseif type(n) == "string" then
		s = n
	end
	
	local index = math.random(1, s:len())
	local char = s:sub(index, index)
	
	local letter = word[(index % 6) + 1]
	if char:byte() < letter:byte() then
		char = string.char(char:byte() + 1)
	elseif char:byte() > letter:byte() then
		char = string.char(char:byte() - 1)
	end
	
	local former = s:sub(1, index - 1)
	local latter = s:sub(index + 1, s:len())
	
	s = former .. char .. latter
	
	if type(n) == "number" then
		return string.unpack("n", n)
	elseif type(n) == "string" then
		return s
	end
end

local function deconstruct(userdata)
	if typeof(userdata) == "CFrame" then
		return userdata:GetComponents()
	end
	if typeof(userdata) == "Vector3" then
		return userdata.X, userdata.Y, userdata.Z
	end

local function Load(player)
	local succes = nil
	local playerData = nil
	local attempt = 1

	repeat
		succes, playerData = pcall(function()
			return database:GetAsync(player.UserId)
		end)

		attempt += 1
		if not succes then
			warn(playerData)
			task.wait()
		end

	until succes or attempt == 3

	if succes then
		local id = player.UserId
		print("got data")
		if not playerData then
			print("new player")
			playerData = {
				["Wins"] = 0
			}
		end
		data[player.UserId] = playerData
		print(data)
		
		local leaderstats = Instance.new("Folder")
		leaderstats.Name = "leaderstats"
		leaderstats.Parent = player
		
		local wins = Instance.new("IntValue")
		wins.Name = "Wins"
		wins.Value = playerData.Wins 
		wins.Parent = leaderstats
	else
		warn("failed getting data", player.UserId)
		player:Kick("Game failed to get your data, please try again")	
	end
end

	if not isPlayerInGame(player) then
		return
	end

	local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()

	-- Find the humanoid in the character
	local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")

		return
	end

	-- Get the race stats based on the race name
	local raceStats = races[raceName]
	

	-- Apply race-specific stat modifications
	humanoid.WalkSpeed *= raceStats.WalkSpeedMultiplier
	humanoid.MaxHealth *= raceStats.HealthMultiplier
	humanoid.JumpPower *= raceStats.JumpPowerMultiplier

function GetDistance(Position1, Position2)
	local Distance = (Position1.Position - Position2.Position).Magnitude
	
	if Distance > 10 and Tool.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid").Health ~= 0 then
		warn("Potential distance exploit detected. Attack by:", Tool.Parent.Name)
		Tool:Destroy()
		return
	end

function Activated()
	if not Tool.Enabled then
		return
	end
	
	Tool.Enabled = false
	
	local Character = Tool.Parent
	local Humanoid = Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")

	if Humanoid == nil then
		warn("Humanoid not found")
		return
	end

	local Timing = RunService.Stepped:Wait()

	if Timing - LastAttack < 0.2 then
		Lunge()
		Damage = DamageTable.LungeDamage
	else
		Slash()
		Damage = DamageTable.SlashDamage
	end
	
	LastAttack = Timing
	Tool.Enabled = true
end

Create the grid
local grid = {}
for i = 1, gridSizeX do
	grid[i] = {}
	for j = 1, gridSizeY do
		grid[i][j] = {
			visited = false,
			walls = {true, true, true, true} -- top, right, bottom, left
		}
	end
end

-- Helper function to get neighboring cells
local function getNeighbors(cellX, cellY)
	local neighbors = {}
	local directions = {
		{0, -1}, -- top
		{1, 0},  -- right
		{0, 1},  -- bottom
		{-1, 0}  -- left
	}

	for _, dir in ipairs(directions) do
		local nx, ny = cellX + dir[1], cellY + dir[2]
		if nx >= 1 and nx <= gridSizeX and ny >= 1 and ny <= gridSizeY then
			table.insert(neighbors, {nx, ny})
		end
	end

	return neighbors
end

-- Recursive function to generate the maze
local function generateMaze(cellX, cellY)
	local cell = grid[cellX][cellY]
	cell.visited = true

	local neighbors = getNeighbors(cellX, cellY)
	while #neighbors > 0 do
		local randIndex = math.random(#neighbors)
		local neighbor = neighbors[randIndex]
		local nx, ny = neighbor[1], neighbor[2]

		if not grid[nx][ny].visited then
			-- Remove walls between the current cell and the neighbor
			if nx == cellX then
				if ny < cellY then
					cell.walls[1] = false -- remove top wall
					grid[nx][ny].walls[3] = false -- remove bottom wall of the neighbor
				else
					cell.walls[3] = false -- remove bottom wall
					grid[nx][ny].walls[1] = false -- remove top wall of the neighbor
				end
			else
				if nx < cellX then
					cell.walls[4] = false -- remove left wall
					grid[nx][ny].walls[2] = false -- remove right wall of the neighbor
				else
					cell.walls[2] = false -- remove right wall
					grid[nx][ny].walls[4] = false -- remove left wall of the neighbor
				end
			end

			generateMaze(nx, ny) -- Recursively visit the neighbor
		end

		table.remove(neighbors, randIndex)
	end
end

-- Generate the maze starting from the top-left corner
generateMaze(1, 1)

local function renderPolarGraph(rEquation, prescision, iswait)
	graphFolder:ClearAllChildren()

	local function getPoint(theta)
		local r = rEquation(theta)
		local x = r * math.cos(theta)
		local y = r * math.sin(theta)
		return Vector3.new(x, y, 0)
	end

	local function getPoints()
		local points = {}
		for theta = 0, 2 * math.pi, prescision do
			table.insert(points, getPoint(theta))
		end
		return points
	end

	local function renderPoints(points)
		local sound = Instance.new('Sound',basePart)
		sound.SoundId = 'rbxassetid://9040512075'
		sound.Volume = 1
		sound.Looped = true
		sound:Play()
		local attachment1 = Instance.new("Attachment", graphFolder)
		attachment1.CFrame = CFrame.new(points[1])
		for i = 2,#points do
			if(iswait) then
				task.wait()
			end
			local attachment2 = Instance.new("Attachment", graphFolder)
			local theta = (i - 1) * prescision
			local pitch = (points[i].Y + 10) / 20
			sound.Pitch = pitch
			Humanoid.DisplayName = string.format('Computing...\n%s Prescision\nTheta: %.3f\nR: %.3f', to_percent(.1, prescision), theta, rEquation(theta))
			attachment2.CFrame = CFrame.new(points[i])
			local beam = Instance.new("RodConstraint", graphFolder)
			beam.Enabled = true
			beam.Visible = true
			beam.Attachment0 = attachment1
			beam.Attachment1 = attachment2
			beam.Color = BrickColor.Red()
			beam.Thickness = 0.1
			attachment1 = attachment2
		end
		sound:Stop()
	end

	renderPoints(getPoints())
end

local MySpawnTime = script.Parent:FindFirstChild("SpawnTime").Value
local SpawnTimes = {}

local function getAllSpawnTimes()
	table.clear(SpawnTimes)
	for i, v in pairs(script.Parent.Parent:GetChildren()) do
		if v:FindFirstChild("SpawnTime") then
			table.insert(SpawnTimes, v:FindFirstChild("SpawnTime").Value)
		end
	end
	if table.find(SpawnTimes, MySpawnTime) then
		table.remove(SpawnTimes, table.find(SpawnTimes, MySpawnTime))
	end
end

local function isThisNewest()
	for i, v in pairs(SpawnTimes) do
		if v >= MySpawnTime then
			return false
		end
	end
	return true
end



local State = "Idle"

while State == "Idle" or State == "Leaving" do
	wait(0)
	getAllSpawnTimes()
	if isThisNewest() == false then
		State = "Leaving"
	end
	if math.abs(MySpawnTime - DateTime.now().UnixTimestampMillis) >= 3000 then

	end

math.random() es una funcion que se usa para obtener un numero aleatorio entre la cantidad definida

d = el numero en donde empieza la cantidad de numeros aleatorios
a = el numero en donde termina la cantidad de numeros aleatorios

documentation things

ok so the kick/ban codes;
the code is in 2 parts, before and after the "-"
but you should treat it like it's "-#"
with "#" being either a 1 or 0 depending on if its a ban or kick
1 being ban, 0 being kick.
the first part is the type code, for example "X" which is is bypassing client checks
the second part is the location identifier, it should be inserted after the "#", it shoud also be in hex be 4 chars long and manually randomly selected for each kick
so for example, if you want to kick someone for bypassing client checks and the location identifier is "ABCD" then the code would be "X-0ABCD"
if you want to ban someone for the same thing, then it would be "X-1ABCD"
the reason for this is to make it more cryptic and harder to find what caused the kick

local function attach2Parts(part0, part1, position, rotation)

	local joint = Instance.new("Motor6D")
	joint.Name = "customAttachment"
	joint.C0 = CFrame.new(position.x, position.y, position.z) * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(rotation.x), math.rad(rotation.y), math.rad(rotation.z))
	joint.Part0 = part0
	joint.Part1 = part1
	joint.Parent = part0
end

local function switchToWeapon(weapon)
	
	local weapon_handler = pstate.weaponHandler
	
	if weapon_handler.current_weapon ~= weapon.Name then
		if weapon_handler.equipped then
			weapon_handler:remove()
		end
	end
	
	pstate.weaponHandler:equip(weapon)
	
end
