function GenerateTool(level, rarity, category, theme, pos)
	local Barrel = get_Barrel()
	local Body = get_Body()
	local Grip = get_Grip()
	local Attachments = { } --TODO see if barrel or body generated with rails
	
	-- Part actions
	weld(Body, Barrel)
	weld(Body, Grip)
	local Tool = Instance.new("Tool")
	Tool.Name = "Error"
	
	-- Set owner to model that outlines all of the guns of the same rarity
	-- Have to do this to get beyond the limit of 31 highlights
	for k, v in pairs(game.Workspace.Guns:GetChildren()) do
		if v.Name == rarity then
			Tool.Parent = v
		end
	end
	
	-- Rename these so scripts can easily find them later
	Body.Parent = Tool
	Barrel.Parent = Tool
	Grip.Parent = Tool
	Grip.Name = "Handle"
	Body.Name = "Body"
	Barrel.Name = "Barrel"
	for k, v in pairs(Attachments) do
		v.Name = "Attachment"
	end
	
	--Move the parts to fit
	Body.Position = pos
	Barrel.Position = Body.Position + Body.Barrel.Position - Barrel.Origin.Position
	Grip.Position = Body.Position + Body.Grip.Position - Grip.Origin.Position
	
	--Attach a beam and emitter
	get_Beam(rarity, Body)
	
	--Create remotes
	local GunRemote = Instance.new("RemoteEvent")
	GunRemote.Name = "GunRemote"
	GunRemote.Parent = Tool
	
	--Generate stats
	local moduleScript = game.ReplicatedStorage.GunScripts.GunStatsTemplate:Clone()
	moduleScript.Parent = Tool
	moduleScript.Name = "GunStats"
	local module = require(moduleScript)
	local gunTable = module:GetStats()
	
	--Build stats
	gunTable = mergeTable(gunTable,require(Body.Stats).GetStats())
	gunTable = mergeTable(gunTable,require(Barrel.Stats).GetStats())
	gunTable = mergeTable(gunTable,require(Grip.Stats).GetStats())
	
	for index, value in pairs(Attachments) do
		gunTable = mergeTable(gunTable,require(value.Stats:GetStats()))
	end
	
	Tool.Name = gunTable.WeaponNamePrefix.." "..gunTable.WeaponNameAdjective.." "..gunTable.WeaponName
	
	module.SetStats(gunTable)
	module.SetStat("Rarity",rarity)
	module.SetStat("GunAccuracy", average({gunTable.AdsAccuracy, gunTable.HipAccuracy}))
	module.SetStat("GunMagsize", gunTable.DefaultMagsize + gunTable.ExtraMagsize)
	module.SetStat("GunName", Tool.Name)
	module.SetStat("GunReload",2 * gunTable.ReloadSpeed)
	module.SetStat("GunFireRate", 2 * gunTable.FiringSpeed)
	module.SetStat("GunHandling", CalculateHandling())
	module.SetStat("GunPower", CalculatePower())
	
	gunTable =

	local Player_data = D_Lib.Player_Data[player_Acess_Code]
	local Player_Ore_Data = Player_data["player_Ores"]

		print(totalAmount)
		
		player_Cash = player_Cash + totalAmount
		player.leaderstats.Cash.Value = player_Cash
		
		Ore_Amount = 0
		
	end
	
	print("domne")
	warn(Player_data)
	
end

local function InitializeButton(Button: ImageButton)
	local function OnFocused()
		TweenService:Create(Button.UIScale, TweenInfo.new(0.5, Enum.EasingStyle.Elastic, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), { Scale = 1.1 }):Play()
	end
	
	local function OnLostFocus()
		TweenService:Create(Button.UIScale, TweenInfo.new(0.5, Enum.EasingStyle.Elastic, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), { Scale = 1 }):Play()
	end
	
	local function OnPress()
		TweenService:Create(Button.UIScale, TweenInfo.new(0.5, Enum.EasingStyle.Quart, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), { Scale = 0.9 }):Play()
	end
	
	Button.SelectionGained:Connect(OnFocused)
	Button.SelectionLost:Connect(OnLostFocus)
	Button.MouseEnter:Connect(OnFocused)
	Button.MouseLeave:Connect(OnLostFocus)
	Button.MouseButton1Down:Connect(OnPress)
	Button.MouseButton1Up:Connect(OnLostFocus)
end

		local cf = CFrame.new(hrp.Position) * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(x), 0) * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(y), 0, 0)
		local offset = Vector3.new(3, 5, 10)
		local pos = cf:ToWorldSpace(CFrame.new(offset)).Position
		local lookAt = cf:ToWorldSpace(CFrame.new(offset.X, offset.Y - 30, -100)).Position
		local finalCF = CFrame.new(pos, lookAt)

		camera.CFrame = camera.CFrame:Lerp(finalCF, 0.8)

		if humanoid.MoveDirection.Magnitude > 0 and not walk.IsPlaying then
			walk:Play()
		elseif humanoid.MoveDirection.Magnitude <= 0 then
			walk:Stop()
		end

		if char:FindFirstChild("BLOCKING") and not block.IsPlaying then
			block:Play()
		elseif not char:FindFirstChild("BLOCKING") then
			block:Stop()

-- << math.log(x,b) >> -------------------------------------------------------------------------

Que es el logartimo?: 
la logaritmacion es una operacion que se usa para calcular el exponente al que se tiene que elevar
cierto numero para obtener un resultado especifico.

Ejemplos:

x = el numero que quieres potenciar
b = el resultado que quieres obtener

- math.log(16,2) == 4 
el 2 tiene que multiplicarse las veces necesarias para que 16; 4 veces, entonces 2^4 = 16.

-- 2^x = 16
math.log() es para encontrar el valor de la icognita exponente; math.log(16,2), el exponente es 4.

math.random() es una funcion que se usa para obtener un numero aleatorio entre la cantidad definida

d = el numero en donde empieza la cantidad de numeros aleatorios
a = el numero en donde termina la cantidad de numeros aleatorios

- math.random(1,10) == Numero aleatorio del 1 al 10

--[[--

documentation things

ok so the kick/ban codes;
the code is in 2 parts, before and after the "-"
but you should treat it like it's "-#"
with "#" being either a 1 or 0 depending on if its a ban or kick
1 being ban, 0 being kick.
the first part is the type code, for example "X" which is is bypassing client checks
the second part is the location identifier, it should be inserted after the "#", it shoud also be in hex be 4 chars long and manually randomly selected for each kick
so for example, if you want to kick someone for bypassing client checks and the location identifier is "ABCD" then the code would be "X-0ABCD"
if you want to ban someone for the same thing, then it would be "X-1ABCD"
the reason for this is so that the client can't just look up the code and know what it means, they would have to guess or be told by someone who knows.


an entry in the reason list could look like this:
X-0 -  bypassing client checks
P-1 -  using patched exploits (ban)
the first part is the partial code, and the second part is the reason text.
and doing things like this should be avoided:
X-0 -  bypassing client checks
X-1 -  bypassing client checks (ban)
essentially if you have a "bypassing client checks (kick)" entry you may not add one for bans.

reason list:
X-0 -  bypassing client checks
P-1 -  using patched exploits (ban)
S-0 -  spamming
T-0 -  teleport hacking
F-0 -  fly hacking
N-0 -  noclip hacking
C-0 -  speed hacking

function findAdjacentDown(square)
	for i = 1, #squares:GetChildren() do
		local square2 = squares:GetChildren()[i]
		if checkAdjacent(square, square2) and square.Position.Z > square2.Position.Z then
			return square2
		end
	end
	return nil
end

function checkIfConnect(square)
	if square == squareMatch2 then
		return true
	end
	if findAdjacentLeft(square) ~= nil then
		if findAdjacentLeft(square).BrickColor == lime then
			checkIfConnect(findAdjacentLeft(square))
		end
	end
	if findAdjacentDown(square) ~= nil then
		if findAdjacentDown(square).BrickColor == lime then
			checkIfConnect(findAdjacentDown(square))
		end		
	end
	if findAdjacentRight(square) ~= nil then
		if findAdjacentRight(square).BrickColor == lime then
			checkIfConnect(findAdjacentRight(square))
		end
	end
	if findAdjacentUp(square) ~= nil then
		if findAdjacentUp(square).BrickColor == lime then
			checkIfConnect(findAdjacentUp(square))
		end
	end
	return false
end

--[[
	Runs f to all elements of t.
--]]
local function map(f, t)
	local mapped = {}
	for _, v in pairs(t) do
		table.insert(mapped, f(v))
	end
	return mapped
end

local function rotateModelLeft(model: Model)
	model:PivotTo(model:GetPivot() * CFrame.Angles(0, math.pi / 2, 0))
end

--[[
	Returns rotated copy of the cell type.
--]]
local function getLeftRotatedGenerator(cellGenerator)
	-- We do not want to left rotate more than we have to.
	-- Or should we. Because the '==' comparison when determining entropy won't work.
	local leftRotated = {}
	if not leftRotated[cellGenerator] then
		leftRotated[cellGenerator] = function()
			local cell = cellGenerator()
			local rotated = {
				Model = rotateModelLeft(cell.Model),
			}
			rotated.Neighbours[Enum.NormalId.Right] = map(getLeftRotatedGenerator, cell.Neighbours[Enum.NormalId.Back])
			rotated.Neighbours[Enum.NormalId.Left] = map(getLeftRotatedGenerator, cell.Neighbours[Enum.NormalId.Front])
			rotated.Neighbours[Enum.NormalId.Front] = map(getLeftRotatedGenerator, cell.Neighbours[Enum.NormalId.Right])
			rotated.Neighbours[Enum.NormalId.Back] = map(getLeftRotatedGenerator, cell.Neighbours[Enum.NormalId.Left])
			return rotated
		end
	end
	return leftRotated[cellGenerator]
end

local createLeftWall = getLeftRotatedGenerator(createWall)
function createCorner()
	local cornerCell = createEmpty()
	cornerCell.Model = game.ServerStorage.Models.FactoryCells.Corner:Clone()
	cornerCell.Neighbours[Enum.NormalId.Right] = {createWall}
	cornerCell.Neighbours[Enum.NormalId.Back] = {createLeftWall}
end

local createLeftCorner = getLeftRotatedGenerator(createCorner)
function createWall()
	local wallCell = createEmpty()
	wallCell.Model = game.ServerStorage.Models.FactoryCells.WindowWall:Clone()
	wallCell.Neighbours[Enum.NormalId.Left] = {createWall, createCorner}
	wallCell.Neighbours[Enum.NormalId.Right] = {createWall, createLeftCorner}
end

--[[
	Gets all (4) rotations of a cell generator.
--]]
local function getAllRotations(cellGenerator)
	local generators = {}
	for i = 0, 3 do
		local generator = cellGenerator
		for j = 0, i do
			generator = getLeftRotatedGenerator(generator)
		end
		table.insert(generators, generator)
	end
	return generators
end

local proto_handler = {}
	proto_handler.__index = proto_handler

	function proto_handler.new(prototype_obj: Frame, proto)
		local self = setmetatable({}, proto_handler)
		self.holder = prototype_obj:WaitForChild("Opcodes")
		self.localHolder = prototype_obj:WaitForChild("Locals")
		self.title = prototype_obj:WaitForChild("Title")
		self.proto = proto
		return self
	end
	
	
	function proto_handler:add_instruction(instruction)
		local instr_obj = UI_Objects:WaitForChild("Instruction"):Clone()
		instr_obj:SetAttribute("Line", instruction.line)
		instr_obj.Parent = self.holder
		instr_obj.Counter.Text = instruction.PC
		instr_obj.Opcode.Text = instruction.opcode:match("LOP_(.*)")
		instr_obj.A.Text = instruction.A or "-"
		instr_obj.B.Text = instruction.B or "-"
		instr_obj.C.Text = instruction.C or "-"
		instr_obj.D.Text = instruction.D or "-"
		instr_obj.E.Text = instruction.E or "-"
		instr_obj.AUX.Text = instruction.Aux or "-"
		instr_obj.Extra.Text = ""

		if instruction.target and instruction.target.PC then
			instr_obj.Extra.Text = `; goto {instruction.target.PC}`
		end
		return instruction_handler.new(instr_obj, instruction)
	end

	function proto_handler:add_local(_local)
		local local_obj = UI_Objects:WaitForChild("Local"):Clone()
		local_obj.Parent = self.localHolder
		local_obj.Index.Text = _local.reg
		local_obj.Varname.Text = _local.varname
		local_obj.Start.Text = _local.startpc
		local_obj.End.Text = _local.endpc
	end

	function proto_handler:set_name(text)
		local param_str = ""
		if self.proto.numparams > 0 then
			for index = 0, self.proto.numparams - 1 do
				param_str ..= `R{self.proto.locals[index].reg}`
				if index ~= self.proto.numparams - 1 then
					param_str ..= ", "
				end
			end
		end

		if self.proto.is_vararg then
			if param_str == "" then
				param_str = "..."
			else
				param_str ..= ", ..."
			end
		end
		self.title.Text = `<font color="#996CDD">function</font> <font color="#6897BB">{text}</font>(<font weight="regular">{param_str}</font>)`
end

local function onTouch(part, original)
	if(original:GetAttribute("canBounce") == false) then
		return
	end
	
	local player = game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(part.Parent)
	
	if not player then
		return
	end
	
	local character = player.Character

	-- Check if the player and character exist
	if player and character then
		local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")

		-- Add velocity only if the player has a humanoid
		if humanoid then
			local playerPosition = character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
			local direction = (part.position - playerPosition).Unit  -- Get the normalized direction vector
			local velocityToAdd = direction * -125  -- Adjust the velocity multiplier as needed
			
			if velocityToAdd ~= velocityToAdd then
				return
			end
			
			RagdollModule.RagdollPlayer(character, velocityToAdd)
		end
	end
	
	original:SetAttribute("canBounce", false)
	original.Color = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
	
	wait(10)
	
	-- Set original.Color to a random color
	original.Color = Color3.fromRGB(math.random(0, 255), math.random(0, 255), math.random(0, 255))
	
	original:SetAttribute("canBounce", true)
end

function WeaponModule.Speedomatic(Character, Duration)
	local Effect = ReplicatedStorage.Effects.Weapons.Speedomatic
	
	local Bottom = Effect["Beam Part"]:Clone()
	Bottom.Parent = Character.HumanoidRootPart
	Bottom.CFrame = Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame * CFrame.new(0, -2, 0)
	
	local Top = Effect["Beam Holder"]:Clone()
	Top.Parent = Character.HumanoidRootPart
	Top.CFrame =  Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 2, 0)
	
	local Trail = Top.Attachment.Trail
	Trail.Attachment0 = Top.Attachment
	Trail.Attachment1 = Bottom.Attachment
	
	local weld0 = Instance.new("WeldConstraint",Top)
	weld0.Part0 = Top
	weld0.Part1 = Character.HumanoidRootPart
	
	local weld1 = Instance.new("WeldConstraint",Bottom)
	weld1.Part0 = Bottom
	weld1.Part1 = Character.HumanoidRootPart
	
	game.Debris:AddItem(Top,Duration)
	game.Debris:AddItem(Bottom,Duration)

local defaultWalkSpeed = humanoid.WalkSpeed

-- Sprint animation

local sprintAnimation = humanoid:LoadAnimation(script.Sprint)
sprintAnimation.Priority = Enum.AnimationPriority.Movement
local crouchAnimation = humanoid:LoadAnimation(script.Crouch)

local slideAnimation = humanoid:LoadAnimation(script.Slide)
slideAnimation.Priority = Enum.AnimationPriority.Movement

-- Services
local ContextActionService = game:GetService("ContextActionService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")

-- Handler functions
function handleSprint(input)
	if input.UserInputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin and tick() - last_w < 0.3 then
		humanoid.WalkSpeed += defaultWalkSpeed * 1.5
		sprintAnimation:Play()
		Sprint = true
	elseif input.UserInputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
		humanoid.WalkSpeed -= defaultWalkSpeed * 1.5
		sprintAnimation:Stop()
		Sprint = false
	end
end

function handleCrouch(input)
	if input.UserInputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin and tick() - last_w < 0.3 then
		humanoid.WalkSpeed -= defaultWalkSpeed * .5
		crouchAnimation:Play()
	elseif input.UserInputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
		humanoid.WalkSpeed += defaultWalkSpeed * .5
		crouchAnimation:Stop()
	end
end

function handleSlide(input)
	if input.UserInputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin and tick() - last_w < 0.3 then
		humanoid.WalkSpeed += defaultWalkSpeed * 2
		handleSprint(function()
			input.UserInputState = Enum.UserInputState.End
		end)
		slideAnimation:Play()
		-- slowly lower the walk speed back to defaultwalkspeed

local ts = game:GetService("TweenService")
function tweenModel(model :Model,t,frame)
	local val = Instance.new("CFrameValue",model)
	val.Value = model:GetPrimaryPartCFrame()
	
	val.Changed:Connect(function(new)
		model:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(new)
	end)
	local tween = ts:Create(val,TweenInfo.new(t,Enum.EasingStyle.Bounce,Enum.EasingDirection.Out),{Value=frame}) 
	tween:Play()
	tween.Completed:Wait()
	val:Destroy()
end

--// Functions
function Crouch()
    if Humanoid.MoveDirection.Magnitude > 0 then
        CAnim:Play()
        TweenService:Create(Camera,TweenInfo.new(0.5),{FieldOfView = 70}):Play()
        TweenService:Create(Humanoid,TweenInfo.new(0.5),{WalkSpeed = CrouchSpeed}):Play()
    end
end
--// Functions
function Stand()
    CAnim:Stop()
    TweenService:Create(Camera,TweenInfo.new(0.5),{FieldOfView = 70}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(Humanoid,TweenInfo.new(0.5),{WalkSpeed = NormalWalkSpeed}):Play()
end

    if InputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin then

    elseif InputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
        Stand()
    end
end,false,Leftc,RightC)

local function AddHighlight(instance)
	local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
	highlight.FillTransparency = 1
	highlight.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.Occluded
	highlight.OutlineColor = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
	highlight.Parent = instance
	return highlight
end
local function ConnectHighlightEvents(clickDetector, head)
	local highlight
	local function onMouseHoverEnter()
		highlight = AddHighlight(head)
	end
	local function onMouseHoverLeave()
		if highlight then
			highlight:Destroy()
			highlight = nil
		end
	end
	clickDetector.MouseHoverEnter:Connect(onMouseHoverEnter)
	clickDetector.MouseHoverLeave:Connect(onMouseHoverLeave)
end

function findNearestPlayer()
	local playerList = Players:GetPlayers()

	local nearestPlayer = nil
	local distance = nil
	local direction = nil

	for _, player in pairs(playerList) do
		local character = player.Character
		if character then
			local distanceVector = (player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - root.Position)
			if not nearestPlayer then
				nearestPlayer = player
				distance = distanceVector.Magnitude
				direction = distanceVector.Unit
			elseif distanceVector.Magnitude < distance then
				nearestPlayer = player
				distance = distanceVector.Magnitude
				direction = distanceVector.Unit
			end	
		end
	end

	return nearestPlayer, distance, direction
end

local TextService = game:GetService("TextService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local moveTweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(0.2, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out)

local pauseCharacters = {["."] = 0.4, [","] = 0.2}

local Dialogue = {}
local main = script.Parent.Main

function Dialogue:ShowText(Text: string)
	local prompt = main.Prompt

	prompt.MaxVisibleGraphemes = 0

	prompt.Text = Text
	
	if prompt.TextFits then
		repeat
			prompt.MaxVisibleGraphemes += 1
			wait(.01)
		until prompt.MaxVisibleGraphemes == #prompt.Text

	else
		prompt.Text = ""
		local currentCharacters = 0
		prompt.MaxVisibleGraphemes = -1

		coroutine.wrap(function()
			for index = 1, #Text do
				prompt.Text =  string.sub(Text, 1, index)
				
				if not(prompt.TextFits) then
					prompt.Text =  string.sub(Text, 1, index - 1)

					local moveTween = TweenService:Create(prompt, moveTweenInfo, {Position = UDim2.new(0,0,0,prompt.Position.Y.Offset - 25)})
					moveTween:Play()

					prompt.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, prompt.Size.Y.Offset + 25)
					currentCharacters = 0
					wait(0.1)
					prompt.Text =  string.sub(Text, 1, index)

				end
				
				local waitTime = pauseCharacters[string.sub(Text, index, index)] or 0.005
				
				wait(waitTime)
			end
		end)()

		while true do
			repeat wait() until prompt.TextFits == false
			

		end
	end
end

	end)

module.colubrasKilled = function(char)
	local spelleffect = game.ServerStorage.SpellEffects.ColubrasRestrain

	local ray = Ray.new(char.HumanoidRootPart.Position,Vector3.new(0,50,0))
	local intersect,pos = workspace:FindPartOnRayWithIgnoreList(ray,{game.Workspace.Live,game.Workspace.Thrown,game.Workspace.MonsterSpawns})

	local portalPos = char.HumanoidRootPart.Position + Vector3.new(0,50,0)

	if intersect then portalPos = pos end

	local portal = spelleffect.Portal:Clone()
	portal.Position = portalPos
	portal.Particle.Enabled = true	
	portal.Parent = workspace.Thrown
	portal.Open:Play()

	local shadowParts = {}

	for _,part in ipairs(char:GetChildren())do
		if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Transparency == 0 then
			local shadowP = Instance.new("Part")
			shadowP.Size = part.Size
			shadowP.Anchored = true
			shadowP.CanCollide = false
			shadowP.CFrame = part.CFrame
			shadowP.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
			shadowP.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Really black")
			shadowP.Transparency = 0.5
			shadowP.Parent = game.Workspace.Thrown
			TweenService:Create(shadowP,TweenInfo.new(1,Enum.EasingStyle.Quad),{Position=shadowP.Position+Vector3.new(math.random(-5,5),2,math.random(-5,5))}):Play()
			table.insert(shadowParts,shadowP)
		end
	end

	char:Destroy()

	wait(1)


	local numSP = #shadowParts
	for i,part in next,shadowParts do
		TweenService:Create(part,TweenInfo.new(0.5,Enum.EasingStyle.Quart),{Position=portalPos}):Play()
		local sound = portal.GoesIn:Clone()
		sound.Parent = part
		sound:Play()

		game.Debris:AddItem(part,0.5)
		wait(0.5/numSP)
	end
	wait(0.5)
	portal.Particle.Enabled = false
	game.Debris:AddItem(portal,1)
end

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
	force = root.Velocity * Vector3.new(1,0,1)
	if force.Magnitude > 0.001 then
		direction = force.Unit	
		value1 = root.CFrame.RightVector:Dot(direction)
		value2 = root.CFrame.LookVector:Dot(direction)

	else
		value1 = 0
		value2 = 0
	end
	RootJoint.C0 = RootJoint.C0:Lerp(RootJointC0 * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(value2 * 1), math.rad(-value1 * 30), 0), 0.2)
	LeftHipJoint.C0 = LeftHipJoint.C0:Lerp(LeftHipJointC0 * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(value1 * 15), 0, 0), 0.2)
	RightHipJoint.C0 = RightHipJoint.C0:Lerp(RightHipJointC0 * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(-value1 * 15), 0, 0), 0.2)
end)

				local plr=game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(h.Parent)
				if creator==nil or plr==nil or creator.Value~=plr then
					local t=h.Parent:FindFirstChild("Torso")
					if t~=nil then
						local dist=(t.Position-Torso.Position).magnitude
						if dist<closestdist then
							closestdist=dist
							closesttarget=t
						end
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end
	if closesttarget~=nil then
		if not chasing then
			playsound(time)
			chasing=true
			Humanoid.WalkSpeed=runspeed
		end
		Humanoid:MoveTo(closesttarget.Position+(Vector3.new(1,1,1)*(variance*((math.random()*2)-1))),closesttarget)
		if math.random()<.5 then
			attack(time,closesttarget.Position)
		end
	else
		if chasing then
			chasing=false
			Humanoid.WalkSpeed=wonderspeed
		end
		if time>nextrandom then
			nextrandom=time+3+(math.random()*5)
			local randompos=Torso.Position+((Vector3.new(1,1,1)*math.random()-Vector3.new(.5,.5,.5))*40)
			Humanoid:MoveTo(randompos,game.Workspace.Terrain)
		end
	end
	if time>nextsound then
		playsound(time)
	end
	if time>nextjump then
		nextjump=time+7+(math.random()*5)
		Humanoid.Jump=true
	end
	animate(time)
end

	if profileData then
		local totalExp = profileData.statsMain.totalExp
		local level = 0
		local expNeeded = 3

		while totalExp >= expNeeded do
			totalExp = totalExp - expNeeded
			level = level + 1
			expNeeded = 3 * (1.3 ^ level)
		end

		return {currentLevel = level, remainingExp = totalExp, expRequired = expNeeded}
	else
		return false
	end
end

function dataManager:addLevel(plr)
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	if profileData then
		profileData.statsMain.totalExp += dataManager:getLevel(plr).expRequired
	end
end

function dataManager:addExp(plr, exp)
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	if profileData then
		profileData.statsMain.totalExp += exp 
	end
end

function dataManager:addMaterials(plr, mData) -- Negatives work
	-- mData = {Rain = 1, Lightning = 10}...
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	if profileData then
		for i,v in pairs(mData) do
			if profileData.gameMaterials[i] or (v < 0 and profileData.gameMaterials[i] + v < 0) then profileData.gameMaterials[i] = 0 end
			profileData.gameMaterials[i] += v
		end
	end
end
function dataManager:addCoins(plr, am) -- Negatives work
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	if profileData then
		if am < 0 and profileData.gameCurrencies.cloudCoin + am < 0 then profileData.gameCurrencies.cloudCoin = 0 end
		profileData.gameCurrencies.cloudCoin += am
	end
end
function dataManager:addTool(plr, toolName)
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	if profileData and itemsData.aeroTools[toolName] and not profileData.gameItemsOwned.aeroTools[toolName] then
		profileData.gameItemsOwned.aeroTools[toolName] = {}
		local aeroTool = profileData.gameItemsOwned.aeroTools[toolName]
		local aeroToolData = itemsData.aeroTools[toolName]
		aeroTool.toolStats = {
			aeroToolData.itemData.Strength,
			aeroToolData.itemData.Speed,
		}
		aeroTool.toolAttachments = {
			aeroEnhancers = {},
			aeroContainers = {},
			aeroBoosters = {}
		}
	end
end
function dataManager:createAttachments(plr, aData)
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	if profileData then
		for i,v in pairs(aData) do
			if itemsData.attachmentsData[v.attachmentType][v.attachmentName] then
				local attachmentData = itemsData.attachmentsData[v.attachmentType][v.attachmentName]
				local generatedUUID = generateUUID()
				profileData.gameItemsOwned[v.attachmentType][generatedUUID] = {itemName = attachmentData.itemName, itemBoosts = attachmentData.itemRequirements, uniqueId = generatedUUID}
			end
		end
	end
end
function dataManager:deleteAttachments(plr, aData)
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	if profileData then
		for i,v in pairs(aData) do
			if profileData.gameItemsOwned[v.attachmentType][v.uniqueId] then
				profileData.gameItemsOwned[v.attachmentType][v.uniqueId] = nil
			end
		end
	end
end

function LazerModule.Rocks(Folder,RootPart)
	local Rayparams = RaycastParams.new()
	Rayparams.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Blacklist
	
	local cframe = RootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0,-7,0)
	
	local angle = 0
	for i=1, 15 do --make sure second numbe ris amultiple of 360
		local size = math.random(2,3)
		local Rock = Meshes.Rock:Clone()
		Rock.Size = Vector3.new(size, size, size)
		Rock.CFrame = cframe * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(0,math.rad(angle),0) * CFrame.new(0,-size,-6)

		local ray = workspace:Raycast(Rock.CFrame.Position, Rock.CFrame.UpVector * 10, Rayparams)
		if ray then
			Rock.Material = ray.Instance.Material
			Rock.Color = ray.Instance.Color
			Rock.Orientation = Vector3.new(math.random(-180,180),math.random(-180,180),math.random(-180,180))
			Rock.Parent = Folder
			
			tweenservice:Create(Rock, TweenInfo.new(.5),{Position = Rock.Position + Vector3.new(0,size * 2,0)}):Play()
			delay(7.5, function()
				tweenservice:Create(Rock,TweenInfo.new(1),{Transparency = 1}):Play()
			end)

		end
		
		
		angle += 24
	end
			
angle += 24

end

function LazerModule.damage(character,rootpart,damageVal)
	local enitities = workspace.Entities
	
	local bool = true
	delay(4,function()
		bool = false
	end)
	while true do
		if bool == false then
			break
		end

function notificationModule.createNotification(plr, estilo, texto, color, intermision)
	if plr and plr.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("NotificationUIs") then
		local screenUI = plr.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("NotificationUIs")
		if screenUI then
			if estilo == "Informacion" then
				if screenUI:FindFirstChild("InfoTemplate") then
					local newFrame = screenUI.InfoTemplate:Clone()
					local espera = 0
					local origFrameSize = newFrame.Size
					if intermision and intermision > 0 then espera = intermision end
				if texto then newFrame.Info.NotificationText.Text = texto end
			if color then 
				newFrame.Info.BackgroundColor3 = color
				newFrame.Info.Notification.ImageColor3 = color 
			end
			newFrame.Name = "NewFrameInformacion"
			newFrame.Size = UDim2.new(
				newFrame.Size.X.Scale / 2,
				newFrame.Size.X.Offset / 2,
				newFrame.Size.Y.Scale / 2,
				newFrame.Size.Y.Offset / 2
			)
			newFrame.Visible = true
			newFrame.Parent = plr.PlayerGui.NotificationUIs.ScrollingFrame
			
				notificationModule.tweeningUI(newFrame, "SmallBoom", 1, 3, false, intermision)
				task.wait(intermision)
					notificationModule.tweeningUI(newFrame, "Desaparecer", 2.3)
					
				debris:AddItem(newFrame,3)
			end
		else
			warn("No tiene la ScreenUI")
		end
		end
		end
end

local CashOutButton = script.Parent.Cashout
CashOutButton.Visible = false

local CrashValue = script.Parent.CrashValue
local CrashMulti = script.Parent.CrashMulti

local multiplier = 1
local multiplierText = script.Parent.CrashMulti

local maxDuration = 10
local startTime = os.clock()

local countdownText = script.Parent.Countdown

local playerTokens = game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Tokens.Value
-- Define the function to start the game countdown
local function startCountdown()
	startTime = os.clock()

	-- Show the cashout button and set its multiplier value
	CashOutButton.Visible = true
	CashOutButton.Text = "Cashout x" .. tostring(multiplier)

	-- Start the countdown timer
	for i = maxDuration, 0, -1 do
		countdownText.Text = "Starting in " .. tostring(i) .. " seconds..."
		wait(1)
	end

	-- When the countdown is over, start increasing the multiplier
	multiplierText.Text = "Crash Value " .. tostring(multiplier) .. "x"
	while multiplier < 30 do
		if os.clock() - startTime >= 0.1 then
			-- Update the multiplier every second after 3 seconds of waiting
			multiplier = multiplier + 0.01
			multiplierText.Text = "Multiplier: " .. string.format("%.1f", multiplier) .. "x"
           
			-- Player can cashout during the multiplier increase
			CashOutButton.Text = "Cashout x" .. tostring(multiplier)
		end
		wait(1)
	end

	-- After the multiplier stops increasing, the player can no longer cashout
	CashOutButton.Visible = false
end

-- Define the function to handle when the bet button is clicked
local function onBetButtonClicked()
	local tokensToBet = tonumber(TextBox.Text)

	-- Check if the player has enough tokens to bet
	if tokensToBet > 0 and tokensToBet <= playerTokens then
		-- Deduct the tokens from the player's balance
		playerTokens = playerTokens - tokensToBet

		-- Disable the bet button and textbox while the game is running
		BetButton.Visible = false
		TextBox.Visible = false

		-- Start the countdown and multiplier increase
		startCountdown()

		-- Enable the bet button and textbox after the game is finished
		wait(5)
		BetButton.Visible = true
		TextBox.Visible = true
	else
		-- Print a message if the player doesn't have enough tokens
		print("You don't have enough tokens to bet that amount.")
	end
end

function Movement:checkSticking(humanoidRootPart, part)
	--Create a raycast directly behind the humanoidRootPart. If it does not hit a part, trigger the MoveTowardPart function. If it does hit a part, trigger the MoveAroundPart function.
	local raycastParams = RaycastParams.new()
	raycastParams.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Blacklist
	raycastParams.FilterDescendantsInstances = {humanoidRootPart.Parent}
	
	local directionVector = -1 * humanoidRootPart.CFrame.LookVector
	
	local raycastResult = workspace:Raycast(humanoidRootPart.Position, directionVector * 5, raycastParams)
	if not raycastResult then
		return false
	else
		return true
	end
end

end

function onTouched(hit)
	if not cooldown then  -- Check if the cooldown is active
		cooldown = true  -- Set the cooldown to active
		local humanoid = hit.Parent:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
		if humanoid then
			local player = game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(humanoid.Parent)
			if player then
				-- Get the current team of the player
				local currentTeam = player.TeamColor

				-- Check if the player is already in the Really red team
				if currentTeam.Name == "Really red" then
					value = value + 1
				else
					value = value - 1
				end

				-- Update the flag color based on the value
				if value > 0 then
					flaga.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Really red")
				elseif value < 0 then
					flaga.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Lime green")
				else
					flaga.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("White")
				end

				-- Update thevalue in ReplicatedStorage
				game.ReplicatedStorage.Value.Value = value

			
				end
			end
		end
		cooldown = false  -- Set the cooldown to inactive

function Rocket:BuildNode(nodeId: number)
	local node = self.Nodes[nodeId]
	if not node then return end
	
	local block = Blocks[node.BlockId]
	if not block then return end

	local modelTemplate = ReplicatedStorage.Assets.Blocks:FindFirstChild(block.Name)
	local model = modelTemplate:Clone()
	
	local rotation = node.Rotation
	local oppositeFace = SharedConfiguration.OppositeNormalId[rotation.Face]
	local yVector = Vector3.FromNormalId(oppositeFace)
	local xVector = SharedConfiguration.BlockSurfaceVector[oppositeFace](math.abs(math.cos(rotation.Amount)), math.abs(math.sin(rotation.Amount)))
	local zVector = SharedConfiguration.BlockSurfaceVector[oppositeFace](math.abs(math.sin(rotation.Amount)), math.abs(math.cos(rotation.Amount)))
	
	-- bunch of maths, first we get the local position (still need to fix the position when there is a fucking rotation)
	local localPosition = SharedConfiguration.BlockUnit * (node.Position + 
		Vector3.new(
			(xVector * block.Size.X / 2).Magnitude, (yVector * block.Size.Y / 2).Magnitude, (zVector * block.Size.Z / 2).Magnitude
		)
	)
	-- badaboom, we face the orientation
	local cframe = CFrame.lookAt(localPosition, localPosition + Vector3.FromNormalId(rotation and rotation.Face or Enum.NormalId.Front))
	-- we rotate it on the surface
	cframe = cframe:ToWorldSpace(CFrame.fromAxisAngle(Vector3.FromNormalId(rotation.Face), rotation.Amount))
	-- we keep the original rotation
	cframe = cframe:ToWorldSpace(modelTemplate.CFrame.Rotation)
	
	-- and bang, we got the cframe (took me hours to figure this out, so simple ;-;, help me ;-;)
	model.CFrame = self.Origin.CFrame:ToWorldSpace(cframe)
	model.Anchored = false
	
	for neighbourId, _ in pairs(self.Connections[nodeId]) do
		if self.BuiltNodes[neighbourId] then
			local weldConstraint = Instance.new("WeldConstraint")
			weldConstraint.Part0 = self.BuiltNodes[neighbourId]
			weldConstraint.Part1 = model
			weldConstraint.Parent = model
		end
	end
	
	model.Parent = self.Model
	
	self.BuiltNodes[nodeId] = model
end

function Rocket:Rebuild()
	if self.Model then
		self.Model:Destroy()
	end

	self.Model = Instance.new("Model")
	self.BuiltNodes = {}
	for nodeId, _ in pairs(self.Nodes) do
		self:BuildNode(nodeId)
	end
	self.Model.Parent = workspace
end

local RunService		 = game:GetService("RunService")
local MemoryStoreService = game:GetService("MemoryStoreService")

local module = {}

local memStore : MemoryStoreSortedMap = nil
local lockedCache = {}
local mutexCache = {}
local LOCAL_LOCK_CACHE_DURATION = 1

if RunService:IsServer() then
	memStore = MemoryStoreService:GetSortedMap("GlobalMutex")
end

local start 			= workspace:GetServerTimeNow()
local unitCounterDebug 	= 0

local function debugPrint(...)	
	if DEBUG then
		local elapsed = workspace:GetServerTimeNow() - start	
		local opsRate = (unitCounterDebug / elapsed) * 60

		--local msg = ("%.0f ops/min\t %.3fs elapsed\t %.0f ops"):format(opsRate, elapsed, unitCounterDebug)
		--print(msg)
		print(...)
	end	
end

function module.HasMutex(name : string)
	
end

function module.AquireMutex(name : string, expiryTimeSeconds : number)	
	assert(RunService:IsServer(), "Only callable on server")
	local aquired = false
	
	-- Locked state cached
	if (lockedCache[name] or 0) > workspace:GetServerTimeNow() then
		debugPrint("GLOBALMUTEX: Cached, locked. " .. unitCounterDebug)		
		return aquired
	end	
	
	-- Set locked in cache
	lockedCache[name] = workspace:GetServerTimeNow() + LOCAL_LOCK_CACHE_DURATION
	
	
	local success, err = pcall(function()
		memStore:UpdateAsync(name, function(existingMutex)
			aquired = false -- Must reset the state in case the transform function retries
			unitCounterDebug += 1

			if not existingMutex then
				debugPrint("GLOBALMUTEX: Update, no lock. " .. unitCounterDebug)
				aquired = true
				return workspace:GetServerTimeNow() + expiryTimeSeconds
			end		

			debugPrint("GLOBALMUTEX: Update, locked. " .. unitCounterDebug)
			
			return nil
		end, expiryTimeSeconds)
	end)
	
	if not success then
		warn("GLOBALMUTEX: Failed, error: " .. tostring(err))
		return aquired
	end	
	
	mutexCache[name] =

--mouseraycast draws line from ur mouse
local function MouseRaycast(model)
	local mousePosition = UserInputService:GetMouseLocation()
	local mouseRay = camera:ViewportPointToRay(mousePosition.X, mousePosition.Y)
	local raycastParams = RaycastParams.new()

	local blacklist = camera:GetChildren()
	table.insert(blacklist, model)
	raycastParams.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Blacklist
	raycastParams.FilterDescendantsInstances = blacklist

	local raycastResult = workspace:Raycast(mouseRay.Origin, mouseRay.Direction * 500, raycastParams)

	return raycastResult, mousePosition
end

function FindNearestTarget(newTower)
	local maxDistance = 20
	local nearestTarget = nil

	for i, target in ipairs(workspace.Mobs:GetChildren()) do
		local distance = (target.HumanoidRootPart.Position - newTower.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
		if distance < maxDistance then
			nearestTarget = target
			maxDistance = distance
		end
	end

	return nearestTarget
end

local function generateMaze(cellX, cellY)
	local cell = grid[cellX][cellY]
	cell.visited = true

	local neighbors = getNeighbors(cellX, cellY)
	while #neighbors > 0 do
		local randIndex = math.random(#neighbors)
		local neighbor = neighbors[randIndex]
		local nx, ny = neighbor[1], neighbor[2]

		if not grid[nx][ny].visited then
			-- Remove walls between the current cell and the neighbor
			if nx == cellX then
				if ny < cellY then
					cell.walls[1] = false -- remove top wall
					grid[nx][ny].walls[3] = false -- remove bottom wall of the neighbor
				else
					cell.walls[3] = false -- remove bottom wall
					grid[nx][ny].walls[1] = false -- remove top wall of the neighbor
				end
			else
				if nx < cellX then
					cell.walls[4] = false -- remove left wall
					grid[nx][ny].walls[2] = false -- remove right wall of the neighbor
				else
					cell.walls[2] = false -- remove right wall
					grid[nx][ny].walls[4] = false -- remove left wall of the neighbor
				end
			end

			generateMaze(nx, ny) -- Recursively visit the neighbor
		end

		table.remove(neighbors, randIndex)
	end
end

-- Generate the maze starting from the top-left corner
generateMaze(1, 1)

local cellSize = 10
local wallHeight = 10  -- Adjust the height of the walls as needed
local wallThick = 0.2

-- Wall creation function
local function createWall()
	local wall = Instance.new("Part")
	wall.Name = "Wall"
	wall.Anchored = true
	wall.Size = Vector3.new(cellSize, wallHeight, wallThick)
	wall.Color =  Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	wall.Parent = workspace
	return wall
end

-- Door creation function
local function createDoor()
	local door = Instance.new("Part")
	door.Name = "Door"
	door.Anchored = true
	door.Size = Vector3.new(cellSize, wallHeight, wallThick)
	door.Color = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
	door.Transparency = 0.5
	door.CanCollide = false
	door.Parent = workspace
	return door
end

-- Floor creation function
local function createFloor()
	local floor = Instance.new("Part")
	floor.Name = "Floor"
	floor.Anchored = true
	floor.Size = Vector3.new(cellSize, 0.2, cellSize)
	floor.Color = Color3.fromRGB(127, 127, 127)
	floor.Parent = workspace
	return floor
end

local attackanim = tool.AnimationController:LoadAnimation(script.Attack)

tool.Activated:Connect(function()
	local owner = tool.Parent
	local humanoid = owner:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")

	if humanoid then
		local mouse = owner:GetMouse()
		local rayOrigin = tool.Handle.Position
		local rayDirection = (mouse.Hit.Position - rayOrigin).Unit
		local rayDistance = (mouse.Hit.Position - rayOrigin).Magnitude

		local raycastResult = workspace:Raycast(rayOrigin, rayDirection, rayDistance)
		if raycastResult and raycastResult.Instance then
			local hitPart = raycastResult.Instance
			local hitHumanoid = hitPart.Parent:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")

			if hitHumanoid then
				hitHumanoid:TakeDamage(damageAmount)
			end
		end
	end
end)

	

local function onEquipped()
	if not equipped then
		equipped = true
		tool.Parent = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
		equipAnimation:Play()
		idleAnimation:Play()
	end
end

local function onUnequipped()
	if equipped then
		equipped = false
		tool.Parent = nil
		equipAnimation:Stop()
		idleAnimation:Stop()
	end
end

function round.LoadMap()
	local votedMap = round.ToggleVoting()
	local mapFolder = ServerStorage.Maps:FindFirstChild(votedMap)
	if not mapFolder then
		mapFolder = ServerStorage.Maps.Blons
	end
	
	local newMap = mapFolder:Clone()
	newMap.Parent = workspace.Map 
	
	local spawnBox = workspace.SpawnBox
	local currentFloor = spawnBox.CurrentFloor.SurfaceGui.Frame.TextLabel
	local mud = spawnBox.Mud.Mud
	
	-- TweenService animation to move the mud down
	local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(1, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out)
	local tween = TweenService:Create(mud, tweenInfo, {Position = mud.Position + Vector3.new(0, -10, 0)})
	spawnBox.Mud.BackMud:Destroy()
	tween:Play()

	-- Destroy the mud after the animation finishes
	task.wait(1.15)
	mud:Destroy()
	
	workspace.SpawnBox.Floor:Destroy()
	spawnBox.ElevatorBell:Play()
	currentFloor.Text = "Ground"
	
	-- Destroy the elevator parts with TweenService transition moving upwards using quad easing style
	local elevatorParts = { spawnBox.Front }
	local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(1, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad)

	for i, part in ipairs(elevatorParts) do
		local startPosition = part.Position
		local targetPosition = startPosition + Vector3.new(0, part.Size.Y, 0) -- Move the part upwards

		local tween = TweenService:Create(part, tweenInfo, {
			Position = targetPosition
		})

		tween:Play()

		-- Destroy the part after the tween completes
		tween.Completed:Connect(function()
			part:Destroy()
		end)
	end


		
	local portal = newMap:WaitForChild("Start")
	
	newMap.Base.Humanoid.HealthChanged:Connect(function(health)
		if health <= 0 then
			info.GameRunning.Value = false
			info.Message.Value = "We failed.."
		end
	end)
	
	return newMap
end

local function tablefind(t,f)
	for i,v in pairs(t) do
		if not f(v) then
			continue
		end
		
		return i
	end
end

local function lerp(a,b,t)
	return a*(1-t)+b*t
end

local function promptDistance(prompt,cameraPos:Vector3?)
	
	if not cameraPos then
		local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
		local cameraFrame = camera.CFrame
		cameraPos = cameraFrame.Position
	end
	
	local part = prompt.Parent

	local distance = (part.Position-cameraPos).Magnitude
	
	return distance
end

local function playSound(sound)
	
	local new = sound:Clone()
	
	new.Parent = game:GetService("SoundService")
	
	new:Play()
	
	services.debris:AddItem(new,new.TimeLength)
end

local function closestPrompt()
	
	local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
	local cameraFrame = camera.CFrame
	local cameraPos = cameraFrame.Position
	
	local closest = {nil,math.huge}
	
	for _,promptData in pairs(prompts) do
		
		local prompt = promptData.Original
		
		local distance = promptDistance(prompt,cameraPos)
		
		if distance>prompt.MaxActivationDistance then
			continue
		end
		
		if distance<closest[2] then
			continue
		end
		
		closest = {prompt,distance}
	end
	
	return closest[1]
end

local function promptVisible(prox)
	
	local part = prox.Parent
	
	local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
	
	local to = camera.CFrame.Position-part.Position
	
	local params = RaycastParams.new()
	params.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Blacklist
	params.FilterDescendantsInstances = {part,lp.Character}
	
	local info = workspace:Raycast(camera.CFrame.Position,to,params)
	
	return not info
end

local function addProximityPrompt(prox:ProximityPrompt)
	
	local find = table.find(prompts,function(v)
		return v.Original == prox
	end)
	if find then
		return warn("proximity prompt already customized")
	end	
	
	prox.Style = Enum.ProximityPromptStyle.Default--AAAAD

	end)

--@outline Text Box Module
-- "changed_function" must be a function callback for when the slider changes, with the
-- format function(new_val, old_val)
-- "parent" is the parent GUI element to have the slider [slider autoscales to parent]
-- "current_string" is the current string
-- "min_length" is the minimum length the text can be <number>
-- "max_length" is the max length the text can be <number>
-- "all_caps_only" is a bool asking to make all of the text capitalized
-- "remove_special_characters" automatically removes special characters if set to true
-- <textBoxOption>
local textBoxOption = require(script.TextBoxOption)

function guisystem.textbox(changed_function, parent, current_string, min_length, max_length, all_caps_only, remove_special_characters)
	return textBoxOption.new(changed_function, parent, current_string, min_length, max_length, all_caps_only, remove_special_characters)
end

--@outline Settings Module
-- "changed_function" must be a function callback for when the slider changes, with the
-- format function(new_val, old_val)
-- "parent" is the parent GUI element to have the slider [slider autoscales to parent]
-- "current_dictionary_structure" is a dictionary specifically structured to create the menu
-- "categorize_dict" is a bool whether or not to categorize the dict into button-operated sections
-- "have_apply_button" is a bool whether or not to have an apply button
-- "default_dict_structure" is the default dictionary structure (can be nil if have_apply_button is false)

	return rgb1.R == rgb2.R and rgb1.G == rgb2.G and rgb1.B == rgb2.B
end

function swait(num)
	if num==0 or num==nil then
		game:service'RunService'.Heartbeat:wait(0)
	else
		for i=0,num do
			game:service'RunService'.Heartbeat:wait(0)
		end
	end
end

function rayCast(Pos, Dir, Max, Ignore)  -- Origin Position , Direction, MaxDistance , IgnoreDescendants
	return game:service("Workspace"):FindPartOnRay(Ray.new(Pos, Dir.unit * (Max or 999.999)), Ignore)
end

function auraexplode(Color)
	local sound = Instance.new("Sound",Torso)
	sound.SoundId = "rbxassetid://2814354338"
	sound.Volume = 1
	sound.Pitch = 0.9
	sound:Play()
	local prt=Instance.new("Part",Torso)
	prt.Anchored=true
	prt.CanCollide=false
	prt.Material="Neon"
	prt.BrickColor=BrickColor.new(Color)
	prt.Size=Vector3.new(1,1,1)
	prt.CFrame=CFrame.new(Torso.Position)*CFrame.Angles(math.rad(90),0,0)
	local msh=Instance.new("SpecialMesh",prt)
	msh.MeshType="Sphere"
	msh.Scale=Vector3.new(2,2,2)
	local prt2=Instance.new("Part",Torso)
	prt2.Anchored=true
	prt2.CanCollide=false
	prt2.Material="Neon"
	prt2.BrickColor=BrickColor.new(Color)
	prt2.Size=Vector3.new(1,1,1)
	prt2.CFrame=CFrame.new(Torso.Position)*CFrame.Angles(math.rad(90),0,0)
	local msh2=Instance.new("SpecialMesh",prt2)
	msh2.MeshId="rbxassetid://3270017"
	msh2.Scale=Vector3.new(2,2,2)
	coroutine.wrap(function()
	for i=0,10 do swait() 
			msh.Scale=msh.Scale+Vector3.new(4.5,4.5,4.5) prt.Transparency=i/10 
			msh2.Scale=msh2.Scale+Vector3.new(5,5,5) 
			prt2.Transparency=i/10 
		end 
		wait() 
		prt:Destroy() 
		prt2:Destroy() 
	end)()
	sound.Ended:Connect(function()
		sound:Destroy()
	end)
end

function auraexplode2(Color)
	local prt2=Instance.new("Part",Torso)
	prt2.Anchored=true
	prt2.CanCollide=false
	prt2.Material="Neon"
	prt2.BrickColor=BrickColor.new(Color)
	prt2.Size=Vector3.new(1,1,1)
	prt2.CFrame=CFrame.new(Torso.Position)*CFrame.Angles(math.rad(90),0,0)
	local msh2=Instance.new("SpecialMesh",prt2)
	msh2.MeshId="rbxassetid://3270017"

		for i=0,10 do swait() 
			msh2.Scale=msh2.Scale+Vector3.new(19,19,19) 
			prt2.Transparency=i/10 
		end 
		wait()  
		prt2:Destroy() 
	end)()
end

function Activated()
	if not Tool.Enabled or not ToolEquipped or not CheckIfAlive() then
		return
	end
	Tool.Enabled = false
	local Tick = RunService.Stepped:wait()
	if (Tick - LastAttack < 0.2) then
		Lunge()
	else
		Attack()
	end
	LastAttack = Tick
	--wait(0.5)
	Damage = DamageValues.BaseDamage
	local SlashAnim = (Tool:FindFirstChild("R15Slash") or Create("Animation"){
		Name = "R15Slash",
		AnimationId = BaseUrl .. Animations.R15Slash,
		Parent = Tool
	})
	
	local LungeAnim = (Tool:FindFirstChild("R15Lunge") or Create("Animation"){
		Name = "R15Lunge",
		AnimationId = BaseUrl .. Animations.R15Lunge,
		Parent = Tool
	})
	Tool.Enabled = true
end

function CheckIfAlive()
	return (((Player and Player.Parent and Character and Character.Parent and Humanoid and Humanoid.Parent and Humanoid.Health > 0 and Torso and Torso.Parent) and true) or false)
end

function Equipped()
	Character = Tool.Parent
	Player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(Character)
	Humanoid = Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	Torso = Character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	if not CheckIfAlive() then
		return
	end
	ToolEquipped = true
	Sounds.Unsheath:Play()
end

function Unequipped()
	Tool.Grip = Grips.Up
	ToolEquipped = false
end

function checkSight(c)
	local ray = Ray.new(bhrp.Position,(c.HumanoidRootPart.Position - bhrp.Position).Unit * 1000)
	local hit,position = workspace:FindPartOnRayWithIgnoreList(ray,{script.Parent})

	if hit then
		if hit:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") or hit.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") or hit.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
			if math.abs(hit.Position.Y - bhrp.Position.Y) < 2 then
				return true
			else
				return false
			end
		else
			return false
		end
	else
		return false
	end
end

local function nearestChar()
	while task.wait(.05) do
		local nearChar, nearDist = nil, nil
		local distance
		local firstPos

		for i,v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
			pcall(function()
				if game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayerFromCharacter(v) and v:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid").Health > 0 then
					findPath:ComputeAsync(bhrp.Position, v.HumanoidRootPart.Position)
					if findPath.Status == Enum.PathStatus.Success then
						distance = 0
						for i,waypoint in ipairs(findPath:GetWaypoints()) do
							if i ~= 1 then
								distance = distance + (waypoint.Position - firstPos).Magnitude
							end
							if waypoint.Action == Enum.PathWaypointAction.Jump then
								if char ~= nil then
									bhum.Jump = true
								end
							end
							firstPos = waypoint.Position
						end
						if nearDist == nil then
							nearDist = distance
							nearChar = v
						else
							if distance < nearDist then
								nearDist = distance
								nearChar = v
							end
						end
					end
				else
					char = nil
				end
			end)
		end
		char = nearChar
	end
end

local function ElevatorDown()
    for i=1,20 do
        wait(0.2)
        Elevator.CFrame=Elevator.CFrame-Vector3.new(0,2,0)
    end
end

function module.VeerLeftSecond(jetClone,jetspeed,jetBV)
	local x = 0
	while wait() do
		if Humanoid.Health <= 0 then
			break
		end
		if x < 30 then
			x = x + 0.1
			local y1 = x ^ 2
			local y = y1 * 0.1
			local y2 = 315 - y
			--local y3 = y + 240
			local Convo = y * math.pi
			local Convo2 = y2 * math.pi
			local radians = Convo / 180
			local radians2 = Convo2 / 180
			jetClone.Main.CFrame = CFrame.new(jetClone.Main.Position.X,jetClone.Main.Position.Y,jetClone.Main.Position.Z) * CFrame.Angles(0,-radians2,-radians)
			jetBV.Velocity = -jetClone.Main.CFrame.LookVector * jetspeed
		elseif x >= 30 then
			break
		end
	end
	for i = 1, 90 do
		if Humanoid.Health <= 0 then
			break
		end
		jetClone.Main.CFrame *= CFrame.Angles(0,0,math.rad(1))
		wait()
	end
end

-- make a function where jetClone.Main veers up and to the left
function module.VeerUpLeft(jetClone,jetspeed,jetBV)
	local x = 0
	while wait() do
		if Humanoid.Health <= 0 then
			break
		end
		if x < 30 then
			x = x + 0.1
			local y1 = x ^ 2
			local y = y1 * 0.1 
			local Convo = y * math.pi 
			local radians = Convo / 180 
			
			jetClone.Main.CFrame = CFrame.new(jetClone.Main.Position.X,jetClone.Main.Position.Y,jetClone.Main.Position.Z) * CFrame.Angles(0,-radians,math.rad(-45))
			
			jetBV.Velocity = -jetClone.Main.CFrame.LookVector * jetspeed
			
		elseif x >= 30 then -- if the jet has veered for more than or equal to thirty seconds, break out of the loop and stop moving.
		
			break
			
		end
		
	end
	
	for i=1,90 do -- rotate the jet back to its original position after it has finished veering up and left.
	
		if Humanoid.Health <= 0 then -- if the player dies while this is happening, break out of the loop.
		
			break
			
		end
		
		jetClone.Main.CFrame *= CFrame.Angles(0,math.rad(1),math.rad(45)) 
		
		wait()
		
	end
	
end

local function getMouseLocation()
	local mouse = UserInputService:GetMouseLocation()
	
	local unitRay = workspace.CurrentCamera:ScreenPointToRay(mouse.X, mouse.Y)
	return unitRay.Origin + (unitRay.Direction * 50)
	
	--Please explain why we need to return the unitRay.Origin + (unitRay.Direction * 50): 
	--This is because the unitRay.Origin is where the ray starts, and we want it to start at the camera.
	--The unitRay.Direction is a vector that points in the direction of where the mouse is pointing on screen.
	--We multiply this by 50 so that it goes far enough to hit something in our game world.

function getClosest()
	local closestPlayer = getClosestPlayer()
	local closestPart = findClosestPart(game.Workspace.enemies,char.HumanoidRootPart)
	if not closestPlayer then return closestPart end
	if not closestPart then return closestPlayer end
	return (closestPlayer.Position - char.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude < (closestPart.Position - char.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude and closestPlayer or closestPart

local function rayCast(pos,dir,max,distanceIgnoreList)
    local distance = 0
    local ignoreList = {}
    if distanceIgnoreList then for i,v in pairs(distanceIgnoreList) do table.insert(ignoreList,v) end end
    while true do
        local hit,pos2,norm = workspace:FindPartOnRayWithIgnoreList(Ray.new(pos,dir*max),ignoreList,false,true)
        if hit == nil then break end
        if hit.CanCollide == true and hit.Transparency ~= 1 then return {hit,pos2,norm} end --if it hits a wall or something else that blocks the bullet, stop the loop and return the part it hit.
        table.insert(ignoreList,hit) --add the part to ignore list so we don't check it again.
        distance = (pos-pos2).magnitude --update how far along the raycast is.
        if distance >= max then break end --stop checking after reaching max range.
    end
    return {nil,nil,nil}
end

--[[--

documentation things

ok so the kick/ban codes;
the code is in 2 parts, before and after the "-"
but you should treat it like it's "-#"
with "#" being either a 1 or 0 depending on if its a ban or kick
1 being ban, 0 being kick.
the first part is the type code, for example "X" which is is bypassing client checks
the second part is the location identifier, it should be inserted after the "#", it shoud also be in hex be 4 chars long and manually randomly selected for each kick
so for example, if you want to kick someone for bypassing client checks and the location identifier is "ABCD" then the code would be "X-0ABCD"
if you want to ban someone for the same thing, then it would be "X-1ABCD"
the reason for this is so that the client can't just look up the code and know what it means, they would have to guess or be told by someone who knows.


an entry in the reason list could look like this:
X-0 -  bypassing client checks
P-1 -  using patched exploits (ban)
the first part is the partial code, and the second part is the reason text.
and doing things like this should be avoided:
X-0 -  bypassing client checks
X-1 -  bypassing client checks (ban)
essentially if you have a "bypassing client checks (kick)" entry you may not add one for bans.

reason list:
X-0 -  bypassing client checks
P-1 -  using patched exploits (ban)
S-0 -  spamming
T-0 -  teleport hacking
F-0 -  fly hacking
N-0 -  noclip hacking
C-0 -  speed hacking
D-0 -  damage hacking
R-0 -  remote kill hacking 
B-1 -  ban evasion (ban)
E-1 -  reload

local function updateTime()
    local time=os.date("*t")
    local hour=time.hour
    if hour>12 then 
        hour-=12 
    end 
    local minute=time.min
    if minute<10 then 
        minute="0"..minute 
    end 
    clock.Text = string.format("%d:%s %s",hour,tostring(minute),time.hour>=12 and "PM" or "AM")
end

function onSpawn(character)
	
	local player = game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(character)
	local count = player:WaitForChild("InventoryCount").Value
	local pickaxe = player.Pickaxe.Value
	local backpack = player.BackpackItem.Value
	
	local newPickaxe = game.ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild(pickaxe):Clone()
	newPickaxe.Parent = player.Backpack
	
	local newBackpack = game.ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild(backpack):Clone()
 	player.Character.Humanoid:AddAccessory(newBackpack)
	
	local capacity = newBackpack.Capacity.Value
	
	capacityEvent:FireClient(player, capacity)
	makeAccessoriesNoCollision(player)
	
	
end

function formatTime(seconds)
	local minutes = math.floor(seconds / 60)
	local remainingSeconds = seconds % 60
	return string.format("%d:%02d", minutes, remainingSeconds)
end

local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")

local runForward = Enum.KeyCode.W
local runBackward = Enum.KeyCode.S
local runLeft = Enum.KeyCode.A
local runRight = Enum.KeyCode.D

local isRunning = false
local runTriggerKey = Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift
local runAnimPlaying = false

local Run = script.Parent.AnimHandler.Run
local RunTrack = Humanoid:LoadAnimation(Run)

local walkSpeed = 7
local runSpeed = 30

--ANIMATION
--play

function checkRunAnim()
	local isShiftPressed = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(runTriggerKey)
	local isForwardPressed = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(runForward)
	local isBackPressed = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(runBackward)
	local isLeftPressed = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(runLeft)
	local isRightPressed = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(runRight)

	if isShiftPressed and (isForwardPressed or isBackPressed or isLeftPressed or isRightPressed) then
		if not runAnimPlaying then
			RunTrack:Play()
			runAnimPlaying = true
		end
	else
		RunTrack:Stop()
		runAnimPlaying = false
	end
end

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(checkRunAnim)
UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(checkRunAnim)

--WALKSPEED
--run
UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
	if input and input.KeyCode == runTriggerKey then
		Humanoid.WalkSpeed = runSpeed
		isRunning = true
	end
end)
--walk
UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
	if input and input.KeyCode == runTriggerKey then
		Humanoid.WalkSpeed = walkSpeed
		isRunning = false
	end
end)

--[[ Dictonary

-- Buttons

-- on
- True: The button is active.
- False: The button is inactive.

-- enabled
- True: The button is usable.
- False: The button is unusable.


-- type
- Plunger: Press it once to make something happen. Press it again to do it again if you feel like it.
- Toggle: Press it once to turn something on, press it again to turn it off.
- Sequence: Press it once to go to the first state, press it again for the second state and so on. When you reach the last state, it will loop back to the first. Texture is unless on the first state.
- Hold: Press and hold to do something. Release to stop doing that thing.

-- RECOMENDATIONS:

- TYPES:
- Plunger: Use a decal with one button on it.
- Toggle: A decal with one or two buttons is recommended.
- Sequence: A decal with two or more buttons is recommended.
- Hold: A decal with one button is recommended.

- ON:
- If on is true, it's best to have the button light up.
- If on is false, it's best to have the button not light up.

local function MakeAccessoriesShiny(player)
	player.CharacterAppearanceLoaded:Connect(function(char)
		local hum = char:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
		for i,v in pairs(char:GetChildren()) do
			if v:IsA("Accessory") then
				if v.Handle then
					v.Handle.Material = "SmoothPlastic"
				end
			end
		end
	end)
end

end

local function createNewPart()
	local newPart = Instance.new("Part")
	newPart.Parent = workspace
	newPart.Size = Vector3.new(1,1,1)
	newPart.Position = Vector3.new(0,0,0)
	newPart.Name = "New Part"
	
	while wait(1) do
		local r,g,b,a = math.random(),math.random(),math.random(),math.random()
		newPart.Color = Color3.fromRGB(r*255,g*255,b*255,a*255)
	end
	
end



--while the part is getting bigger change its color and then make it smaller each second passes by
local function createNewPart()
	local newPart = Instance.new("Part")
	newPart.Parent = workspace
	newPart.Size = Vector3.new(1,1,1)
	newPart.Position = Vector3.new(0,0,0)
	newPart.Name = "New Part"
	
	while wait(1) do
		local r,g,b,a = math.random(),math.random(),math.random(),math.random()
		newPart.Color = Color3.fromRGB(r*255,g*255,b*255,a*255)
	end
	
	while true do
		for i=10, 1,-1 do
			wait(0.5)
			newPart.Size -= Vector3.new(i,i,i)
			local r,g,b,a = math.random(),math.random(),math.random(),math.random()
			newPart.Color = Color3.fromRGB(r*255,g*255,b*255,a*255)
		end
		
		for i=2, 10 do
			wait(0.5)
			newPart.Size += Vector3.new(i,i,i)
			local r,g,b,a = math.random(),math.random(),math.random(),math.random()
			newPart.Color = Color3.fromRGB(r*255,g*255,b*255,a*255)
		end
		
	end
	
end

local function createNewPart()
	local newPart = Instance.new("Part")
	newPart.Parent = workspace
	newPart.Size = Vector3.new(1,1,1)

end

local function updateTime()
    local time=os.date("*t")
    local hour=time.hour
    if hour>12 then 
        hour-=12 
    end 
    local minute=time.min
    if minute<10 then 
        minute="0"..minute 
    end 
    clock.Text = string.format("%d:%s %s",hour,tostring(minute),time.hour>=12 and "PM" or "AM")
end

function onAim()
	
	--Make sure the player character exists
	if player.Character then
		
		--Get the player position
		local rootPart = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart
		local playerPostion = rootPart.Position
		
		-- Get the mouse position
		local mousePosition = Vector3.new(mouse.Hit.x, playerPostion.y, mouse.Hit.z)
		
		-- Angle the player towards the mouse
		rootPart.CFrame = CFrame.lookAt(playerPostion, mousePosition)
		
	end
	
end

		if player.Character then
		local vectorForce = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.VectorForce
		local particle1 = player.Character.Wing.ParticleEmitter
		local particle2 = player.Character.Wing2.ParticleEmitter
		local fire = player.Character.Fire.Fire
		local fire1 = player.Character.Fire1.Fire
		
		-- If the key is pressed down
		if inputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin then
			vectorForce.Force = forwardVector * acceleration

			particle1.Enabled = false
			particle2.Enabled = false
			fire.Enabled = false
			fire1.Enabled = false
		end

	end
	
end

-- If maps are installed, check InstalledMapInfo for "Difficulty" in every model. After finding every number, connect them with "Difficulties" corresponding to their number.
function module:GetDifficulty(map)
    local Difficulty = "Unknown"
    if map:FindFirstChild("Map") then
        for _,v in pairs(map.Map:GetChildren()) do
            if v:IsA("Model") and v.Name ~= "SpawnPoints" then
                if v:FindFirstChild("Difficulty") then
                    Difficulty = Difficulties[v.Difficulty.Value]
                end
            end
        end
    else 	
		log:LogError("Cannot find difficulty number. (DifficultyLib-EC01")
    end
    
    return Difficulty or "Unknown"
end

function checkAdjacent(square1, square2)
	local x1 = square1.Position.X
	local z1 = square1.Position.Z
	local x2 = square2.Position.X
	local z2 = square2.Position.Z
	return (math.abs(x1 - x2) <= 0.01 and math.abs(z1 - z2) <= 0.8) or (math.abs(x1 - x2) <= 0.8 and math.abs(z1 - z2) <= 0.01)	
end

function findAdjacentLeft(square)
	for i = 1, #squares:GetChildren() do
		local square2 = squares:GetChildren()[i]
		if checkAdjacent(square, square2) and square.Position.X > square2.Position.X then
			return square2
		end
	end
	return nil
end

function IsTeamMate(Player1, Player2)
	return (Player1 and Player2 and not Player1.Neutral and not Player2.Neutral and Player1.TeamColor == Player2.TeamColor)
end

function TagHumanoid(humanoid, player)
	local Creator_Tag = Instance.new("ObjectValue")
	Creator_Tag.Name = "creator"
	Creator_Tag.Value = player
	Debris:AddItem(Creator_Tag, 2)
	Creator_Tag.Parent = humanoid
end

function UntagHumanoid(humanoid)
	for i, v in pairs(humanoid:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("ObjectValue") and v.Name == "creator" then
			v:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

function Blow(Hit)
	if not Hit or not Hit.Parent or not CheckIfAlive() or not ToolEquipped then
		return
	end
	local RightArm = Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") or Character:FindFirstChild("RightHand")
	if not RightArm then
		return
	end
	local RightGrip = RightArm:FindFirstChild("RightGrip")
	if not RightGrip or (RightGrip.Part0 ~= Handle and RightGrip.Part1 ~= Handle) then
		return
	end
	local character = Hit.Parent
	if character == Character then
		return
	end
	local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	if not humanoid or humanoid.Health == 0 then
		return
	end
	local player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(character)
	if player and (player == Player or IsTeamMate(Player, player)) then
		return
	end
	UntagHumanoid(humanoid)
	TagHumanoid(humanoid, Player)
	humanoid:TakeDamage(Damage)	
end

local Whitelist = {

}

function check(id)
	if table.find(Whitelist,id) then
		return true
	end
	return false
end

function AdminEvent(myself,p,cmd,args)
	cmd = cmd:lower()
	if check(myself.UserId) then
		for i,player in pairs(p) do
			if cmd == "kick" then
				player:Kick("You have been kicked! \n Reason: \n" .. args[1])	
			end
		end
	end
end

function AdminFunction(myself,p,cmd,args)
	cmd = cmd:lower()
	if check(myself.UserId) then 
		for i,player in pairs(p) do
			if cmd == "kill" then
				player.Character.Humanoid.Health = 0
			end
		end
	end
end

	return settingsDir and settingsDir:FindFirstChild(name) and settingsDir[name].Value
end

local normalSpeed = getSetting("Walking speed") or 18 -- The player's walking speed (Roblox default is 16)
local sprintSpeed = getSetting("Running speed") or 26 -- The player's speed while sprinting

inputService.InputBegan:Connect(function (key)
	if key.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift or key.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.RightShift then
		running = true
		if char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then	
			char.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = sprintSpeed
		end
	end
end)

inputService.InputEnded:Connect(function (key)
	if key.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift or key.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.RightShift then
		running = false
		if char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then	
			char.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = normalSpeed
		end
	end
end)

	print("Going To office")
	
	Stop_Animations()
	Track_Camera_Hallway:Play()
	HRP.CFrame = Position_HallWay
	Bonnie_Moved()
	wait(Min_Wait, Max_Wait)
	
	local Chance1 = math.random(1, 2)
	
	if Chance1 == 1 then

		Track_Deactivated:Play()
		HRP.CFrame = Position_Closet
		Bonnie_Moved()
		wait(Min_Wait, Max_Wait)
	else
		On_The_Attack_Office()
	end
	
end

local function getItemDescription(itemName)
	-- Add your logic to fetch the item description based on the item name
	-- Return the item description
	return "This is the description for " .. itemName
end

local function examineItem(slot)
	-- Get the item from the slot
	local itemName = slot.Text

	-- Find the item in the inventory data
	for _, child in ipairs(InventoryData:GetChildren()) do
		if child.Name == itemName then
			-- Update the ItemN and ItemD text labels with item information
			local examineItemGUI = Inventory.Parent.ExamineItem
			local itemNLabel = examineItemGUI.ItemN
			local itemDLabel = examineItemGUI.ItemD
			itemNLabel.Text = "Item Name: " .. itemName
			itemDLabel.Text = "Item Description: " .. getItemDescription(itemName)  -- Replace getItemDescription with the appropriate function to fetch the item description
			break
		end
	end

	-- Show the Examine Item GUI
	Inventory.Parent.ExamineItem.Visible = true
end

	local nextSlot = getNextAvailableSlot()
	if nextSlot then
		nextSlot.Text = item.Name
		nextSlot.Visible = true
		occupiedSlots[tonumber(nextSlot.Name:sub(5))] = true  -- Mark the slot as occupied
		item:SetAttribute("InInventory", true)  -- Set attribute to indicate item is in inventory
	else
		print("Inventory is full!") -- Handle when the inventory is full
	end
end)

	if not item:GetAttribute("InInventory") then  -- Check if the item was removed from inventory
		item:Destroy()
	end
end)

	local guid = HttpService:GenerateGUID()
	
	
	hurtboxes[guid] = self
	
	Collider:SetAttribute(HURTBOX_ID, guid)
	Collider.Color = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
	Collider.CanCollide = false
	Collider.Anchored = true 
	Collider.Transparency = 1
	Collider.Size = size
	Collider.CFrame = center
	Collider.Parent = game.Workspace
	
	Collider.WeldConstraint.Part0 = Collider
	
	if _G.DEV_MODE then
		Collider.Transparency = 0.5
	end
	
	
	function self.destroy()

		hurtboxes[guid] = nil

function levitate( )
local part = workspace.GrayBlock
while true do
part.CFrame = CFrame.new(part.Position + Vector3.new(0,1,0))
wait()
part.CFrame = CFrame.new(part.Position - Vector3.new(0,1,0))
wait()
end
end

local function ClearContainer()
	for _, child in ipairs(itemContainer:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("TextButton") then
			child:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

local function UpdateDetailFrame(object)
	local isVisible = object ~= nil
	detailFrame.ViewportFrame.Visible = isVisible
	detailStatsContainer.Visible = isVisible
	detailItemName.Visible = isVisible
	buyButton.Visible = isVisible
	
	if object then
		detailItemName.Text = object.DisplayName
		detailStatsLabel.Text = 
			if object.Damage > 0 then object.Damage 
			elseif object.Heal > 0 then object.Heal 
			elseif object.Amount > 0 then object.Amount
			else ""
		detailStatsLabel.Visible = detailStatsLabel.Text ~= ""
		detailPriceLabel.Text = object.Price .. " 💲"
	end
end

function inventory:Click()
	UpdateDetailFrame(self)
end

function inventory.Hide()
	inventoryGUI.Visible = false
end

function SetProperty(Inst,Table)
	if not Inst.Connections then
		Inst.Connections={}
	end

	function Inst:Disconnect()
		for _,v in pairs(Inst.Connections) do
			if v and typeof(v) == "RBXScriptConnection" then
				v:Disconnect()
			end
		end
	end

	local ratelimit = 30
	local rate = 0
	for Property,Value in pairs(Table) do
		table.insert(Inst.Connections,Inst.GetPropertyChangedSignal(tostring(Property)):Connect(function()
			print("Property changed: "..Property.." setting value to: "..tostring(Value))
			rate+=1
			task.delay(0.1,function()
				rate-=1
			end)
			if rate == ratelimit then Inst() end
			if Inst[Property] ~= Value then
				Inst[Property] = Value
				task.defer(function()
					Inst[Property] = Value
				end)
			end
		end))
	end
end

	AI.Awareness.GetOwnTiles = function()
		local tiles = {}
		for i,v in pairs(workspace.CurrentMap.Tiles:GetChildren()) do
			if v.Name == "Tile" and v.BrickColor == AI.AITeam.TeamColor then
				table.insert(tiles, v)
			end
		end
		
		return tiles
	end
	
	AI.Awareness.QueryTileTeam = function(tile)
		if tile.BrickColor == AI.AITeam.TeamColor then
			return AI.AIEnum.TileType.AI
		elseif tile.BrickColor == AI.HumanTeam.TeamColor then
			return AI.AIEnum.TileType.Human
		else
			return AI.AIEnum.TileType.Empty
		end	
	end
	
	AI.Awareness.GetClosestHumanTile = function(AITile)
		local closestTile = nil
		local closestDistance = math.huge
		
		for i,v in pairs(workspace.CurrentMap.Tiles:GetChildren()) do
			if v.Name == "Tile" and v.BrickColor == AI.HumanTeam.TeamColor then
				local distance = (v.Position - AITile.Position).magnitude
				
				if distance < closestDistance then
					closestDistance = distance
					closestTile = v
				end
			end	
		end
		
		return closestTile, closestDistance		
	end
	
	AI.Awareness.GetExpandableLocationsFromTile = function(userTile)
		local validTiles = {}
		-- check all tiles next to the soldier using returnTileAtPosition, if they are the team's color, then add 1 to valid tiles
		for x = -12, 12, 12 do
			for z = -12, 12, 12 do
				local tile = findTileByPosition(userTile.Position.X + x, userTile.Position.Y, userTile.Position.Z + z)
				if tile then
					if AI.Awareness.QueryTileTeam(tile) == AI.AIEnum.TileType.Empty then
						table.insert(validTiles, tile)
					end
				end
			end
		end
		
		return validTiles
	end
	
	AI.Awareness.GetClosestTilesArray = function()
		--return array of all tiles the AI can expand to in a form of: {Tile instance, distance to closest player tile}
		--use the GetExpandableLocationsFromTile in combination with GetClosestHumanTile
		local tiles = AI.Awareness.GetOwnTiles()
		local closestTiles = {}
		
		for i,v in pairs(tiles) do
			local possibleTiles = AI.Awareness.GetExpandableLocationsFromTile(v)
			for _, tile in pairs(possibleTiles) do
				local closestHumanTile, distanceToClosestHumanTile = AI.Awareness.GetClosestHumanTile(v)
				if closestHumanTile then
					table.insert(closestTiles, {v, distanceToClosestHumanTile})
				end
			end
		end
		
		return closestTiles	
	end

LastAttack = 0

function Activated()
	if not Tool.Enabled or not ToolEquipped or not CheckIfAlive() then
		return
	end
	Tool.Enabled = false
	local Tick = RunService.Stepped:wait()
	if (Tick - LastAttack < 0.2) then
		Lunge()
	else
		Attack()
	end
	LastAttack = Tick
	--wait(0.5)
	Damage = DamageValues.BaseDamage
	local SlashAnim = (Tool:FindFirstChild("R15Slash") or Create("Animation"){
		Name = "R15Slash",
		AnimationId = BaseUrl .. Animations.R15Slash,
		Parent = Tool
	})
	
	local LungeAnim = (Tool:FindFirstChild("R15Lunge") or Create("Animation"){
		Name = "R15Lunge",
		AnimationId = BaseUrl .. Animations.R15Lunge,
		Parent = Tool
	})
	Tool.Enabled = true
end

function CheckIfAlive()
	return (((Player and Player.Parent and Character and Character.Parent and Humanoid and Humanoid.Parent and Humanoid.Health > 0 and Torso and Torso.Parent) and true) or false)
end

function Equipped()
	Character = Tool.Parent
	Player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(Character)
	Humanoid = Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	Torso = Character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	if not CheckIfAlive() then
		return
	end
	ToolEquipped = true
	Sounds.Unsheath:Play()
end

function Unequipped()
	Tool.Grip = Grips.Up
	ToolEquipped = false
end

local function TryRunModule(module)
	if module:IsA("ModuleScript") then
		local ret = require(module)
		if (type(ret) == "function") then
			ret(ChatService)
		end
	end
end

local modules = Chat:WaitForChild("ChatModules")
modules.ChildAdded:connect(function(child)
	local success, returnval = pcall(TryRunModule, child)
	if not success and returnval then
		print("Error running module " ..child.Name.. ": " ..returnval)
	end
end)

for _, module in pairs(modules:GetChildren()) do
	local success, returnval = pcall(TryRunModule, module)
	if not success and returnval then
		print("Error running module " ..module.Name.. ": " ..returnval)
	end
end

		channel.Speakers[plr.Name] =

function populatehumanoids(mdl)
	if mdl.ClassName=="Humanoid" then
		table.insert(humanoids,mdl)
	end
	for i2,mdl2 in ipairs(mdl:GetChildren()) do
		populatehumanoids(mdl2)
	end
end

function playsound(time)
	nextsound=time+5+(math.random()*5)
	local randomsound=sounds[math.random(1,#sounds)]
	randomsound.Volume=.5+(.5*math.random())
	randomsound.Pitch=.5+(.5*math.random())
	randomsound:Play()
end

while sp.Parent~=nil and Humanoid and Humanoid.Parent~=nil and Humanoid.Health>0 and Torso and Head and Torso~=nil and Torso.Parent~=nil do
	local _,time=wait(1/3)
	humanoids={}
	populatehumanoids(game.Workspace)
	closesttarget=nil
	closestdist=sightrange
	local creator=sp:FindFirstChild("creator")
	for i,h in ipairs(humanoids) do
		if h and h.Parent~=nil then
			if h.Health>0 and h.Parent.Name~=sp.Name and h.Parent~=sp then
				local plr=game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(h.Parent)
				if creator==nil or plr==nil or creator.Value~=plr then
					local t=h.Parent:FindFirstChild("Torso")
					if t~=nil then
						local dist=(t.Position-Torso.Position).magnitude
						if dist<closestdist then
							closestdist=dist
							closesttarget=t
						end
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end
	if closesttarget~=nil then
		if not chasing then
			playsound(time)
			chasing=true
			Humanoid.WalkSpeed=runspeed
		end
		Humanoid:MoveTo(closesttarget.Position+(Vector3.new(1,1,1)*(variance*((math.random()*2)-1))),closesttarget)
		if math.random()<.5 then
			attack(time,closesttarget.Position)
		end
	else
		if chasing then
			chasing=false
			Humanoid.WalkSpeed=wonderspeed
		end
		if time>nextrandom then
			nextrandom=time+3+(math.random()*5)
			local randompos=Torso.Position+((Vector3.new(1,1,1)*math.random()-Vector3.new(.5,.5,.5))*40)
			Humanoid:MoveTo(randompos,game.Workspace.Terrain)
		end
	end
	if time>nextsound then
		playsound(time)
	end
	if time>nextjump then
		nextjump=time+7+(math.random()*5)
		Humanoid.Jump=true
	end
	animate(time)
end
if sp~=nil then

end

function ButtonTuched(hit, button)
	if hit.Parent:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
		local player = players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(hit.Parent)
		if player then
			isTouching = false
			wait(0.1)
			isTouching = true
			if player:FindFirstChild("Datastore")then
				local data = player:WaitForChild("Datastore")
				local money  = data:WaitForChild("Money")
				local multiplier = data:WaitForChild("Multiplier")
				local rebirth = data:WaitForChild("Rebirth")
				if button.Parent.Parent == buttons.Multiplier then
					while isTouching == true do 
						if money.Value >= button.Price.Value then
							money.Value -= button.Price.Value 
							multiplier.Value += (button.Effect.Value * (rebirth.Value + 1))
							task.wait(0.25)
						else
							task.wait(0.1)
						end
					end
				end
			end	

		end
	end
end

-- randomstring function
function randomstring(length)
    local str = ""
    for i = 1, length do
        str = str .. string.char(math.random(97, 122))
    end
    return str
end

-- discord nitro generator function
function generateNitroCode()
    local nitro = ""
	for i = 1, 16 do
		local randomStr = randomstring(1)
		local randomNum = math.random(0,9)
		local ran = math.random(0,1)
		
		if ran == 0 then
    	    nitro = nitro .. tostring(randomNum)
		else
			nitro = nitro .. tostring(randomStr)
		end
	end
    return "discord.gift/" .. nitro
end

--oscilloscope graph render
local function renderOscilloscopeGraph(equation, prescision, iswait)
	graphFolder:ClearAllChildren()
	--local points = {}
	local function getPoints()
		local points = {}
		for t = 0, 2 * math.pi, prescision do
			table.insert(points, Vector3.new(t,equation(t),0))
		end
		return points
	end
	
	--local points = getPoints()
	local function renderPoints(points)
		local sound = Instance.new('Sound',basePart)
		sound.SoundId = 'rbxassetid://9040512075'
		sound.Volume = 1
		sound.Looped = true
		sound:Play()
		
		local attachment1 = Instance.new("Attachment", graphFolder)
		attachment1.CFrame = CFrame.new(points[1])
		
		for i=2,#points do
			if(iswait) then
				task.wait()
			end
			
			local attachment2 = Instance.new("Attachment", graphFolder)
			
			Humanoid.DisplayName = string.format('Computing...\n%s Prescision\nT: %.3f\nY: %.3f', to_percent(.1, prescision), points[i].X, equation(points[i].X))
			
			local beam = Instance.new("RodConstraint", graphFolder)
			beam.Enabled=true
			beam.Visible=true
			
			if(i%2==0) then --even number of points so we can use the last two attachments to calculate the slope and direction of the line segment.
				local slopeVector=(attachment2.WorldPosition-attachment1.WorldPosition).Unit
				
				if(slopeVector.Magnitude>0.01) then --if magnitude is too small it will cause errors in calculations.
					local angle=math.atan(slopeVector.Y/slopeVector.X)+((slopeVector.X<0 and math.pi or 0)) --atan returns values between -pi/2 and pi/2 so we need to add pi if x is negative.
					
					angle=angle+(i==#points and math.pi*3/4 or (i==#points-1 and math.pi*5/4 or math.pi)) --last point needs a different angle than all other points because there are no more segments after it. second to last point also needs a different angle because it's used for calculating the last segment.
					
					angle=angle+math.rad(90)--rotate by 90 degrees so that z axis is pointing out of screen instead of up/down.
					
					local rotation=CFrame.Angles(0,angle,0)--create rotation matrix from angle.
					
					basePart.CFrame=CFrame.new(basePart.Position)*rotation--rotate basepart by rotation matrix created above.
					
					wait()--wait one frame for changes to take effect before rendering next segment.
				end
