-- Función para encontrar el jugador más cercano
local function FindNearestPlayer() -- Obtiene todos los jugadores en el juego
	local closestPlayer = nil
	local shortestDistance = math.huge -- Un número muy grande para iniciar la búsqueda
	
	if canAttack == true then
		canAttack = false
		for _, player in pairs(players) do
			local HRP = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart
			if HRP then
			local distance = (player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - NPC.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude
				if distance < shortestDistance then
					shortestDistance = distance
					closestPlayer = player
					NPC.Config.Target.Value = closestPlayer
				end
			end
		end
	end

	return closestPlayer
end

local function onRenderStepped()
	if speed == 21 then
		local shakeIntensity = 0.1
		local shakeSpeed = 10
		local shakeDuration = 0.5

		local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
		local shakeStart = tick()

		while tick() - shakeStart < shakeDuration do
			local shakeOffset = Vector3.new(
				math.sin(tick() * shakeSpeed) * shakeIntensity,
				math.sin(tick() * shakeSpeed * 2) * shakeIntensity,
				math.sin(tick() * shakeSpeed * 3) * shakeIntensity
			)

			camera.CFrame = camera.CFrame + shakeOffset

			wait()
		end

		camera.CFrame = CFrame.new(camera.CFrame.Position, camera.CFrame.Position + camera.CFrame.LookVector)
	end
end

-- // Attack titan \\ --
function shifting(Titanvalue)
	if table.find(Titanvalue, Player.UserId) then
		if not Shifted and Humanoid.Health <= 395 then

			local Titan = Instance.new("StringValue")

			Shifted = true

			Titan.Value = Titanvalue[1]

			ShiftEvent:FireServer(Titan.Value) 

			wait(2)

			Player.CameraMaxZoomDistance = 160
			Player.CameraMinZoomDistance = 80	

			Tween:Play()

			wait(1)

			Tween1:Play()

			Humanoid.Died:Connect(function()
				Shifted = false
			end)
		end
	end
end

function IsTeamMate(Player1, Player2)
	return (Player1 and Player2 and not Player1.Neutral and not Player2.Neutral and Player1.TeamColor == Player2.TeamColor)
end

function TagHumanoid(humanoid, player)
	local Creator_Tag = Instance.new("ObjectValue")
	Creator_Tag.Name = "creator"
	Creator_Tag.Value = player
	Debris:AddItem(Creator_Tag, 2)
	Creator_Tag.Parent = humanoid
end

function UntagHumanoid(humanoid)
	for i, v in pairs(humanoid:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("ObjectValue") and v.Name == "creator" then
			v:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

	if not Hit or not Hit.Parent or not CheckIfAlive() or not ToolEquipped then
		return
	end
	local RightArm = Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") or Character:FindFirstChild("RightHand")
	if not RightArm then
		return
	end
	local RightGrip = RightArm:FindFirstChild("RightGrip")
	if not RightGrip or (RightGrip.Part0 ~= Handle and RightGrip.Part1 ~= Handle) then
		return
	end
	local character = Hit.Parent
	if character == Character then
		return
	end
	local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	if not humanoid or humanoid.Health == 0 then
		return
	end
	local player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(character)
	if player and (player == Player or IsTeamMate(Player, player)) then
		return
	end
	UntagHumanoid(humanoid)
	TagHumanoid(humanoid, Player)
	humanoid:TakeDamage(Damage)	
	-- put player on fire if damaged

documentation things

ok so the kick/ban codes;
the code is in 2 parts, before and after the "-"
the first part is the type code, for example "XS" which is is bypassing client checks and the user is not banned for it
when the first part ends with "S" meaning soft, it means that the user is not banned, but they are kicked
when the first part ends with "H" meaning hard,  it means that the user is banned and cannot join back until unbanned
the second part after the "-" is the location identifier, it should be in hex is 4 chars long and manually randomly selected for each kick
the reason for this is to make it more cryptic and harder to find what caused the kick when on the client

the list of type codes and the definitions of each are as follows:

(automated detection)
XS - bypassing client checks (soft)
FS - flooding the server with requests or data (soft)
DH - exploiting a bug/glitch with exploits (hard)
CS - spamming the chat

    if canDoubleJump == true then
        player.Character.Humanoid.Jump = true

        player.Character.Humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Physics)

        local jumpVelocity = (player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame.upVector * jumpPower) + Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)

    end

datastore["UpdateFireRate"] = function(Plr,TankType)
	local StatType = "FireRate"
	local TankInfo = TankModule.Tanks[TankType.Parent.Name] and TankModule.Tanks[TankType.Parent.Name][TankType.Name]
	local DefaultValue = TankModule.defaultStats[StatType]
	local TankStatValue = TankInfo and TankInfo[StatType]
	local UpgradeValue = Plr.Upgrades:FindFirstChild(StatType)
	local PlayerStat = Plr.Stats:FindFirstChild(StatType)
	local CurrentValue = 0
	CurrentValue += DefaultValue
	CurrentValue += TankStatValue or 0
	CurrentValue += UpgradeValue and UpgradeValue.Value * TankModule.UpgradeStats[StatType] or 0
	PlayerStat.Value = CurrentValue
end

	tween:Play()
	--fade text

player's emotes
function EmotesService:GetPlayerEmotes(player: Player)
	local inventory = PSM:getDataValue(player, "Inventory")
	local emotes = inventory.Emotes or {}
	return emotes
end

-- Function to verify player has a given emote
function EmotesService:HasEmote(player: Player, emoteName: string)
	local emotes = EmotesService:GetPlayerEmotes(player)
	for _, emote in emotes do
		if emote.name == emoteName then
			return true
		end
	end
	return false
end

-- Function to give a player an emote (a player can only have one of any emote) 
function EmotesService:GiveEmote(player: Player, emoteName: string)
	local inventory = PSM:getDataValue(player, "Inventory")
	if not self:HasEmote(player, emoteName) then
		print("Give emote")
		table.insert(inventory.Emotes, {name = emoteName})
	end
	PSM:setDataValue(player, "Inventory", inventory)
end

-- Function to give a player an emote pack (a player can only have one of any emote) given the name of the emoteType / emotePack
-- adding all the emotes of the given pack to the player's inventory
function EmotesService:GiveEmotePack(player: Player, emoteType: string)
	local inventory = PSM:getDataValue(player, "Inventory")
	for _, emote in allEmotes do
		if emote.emoteType == emoteType then
			print(emote.name)
			EmotesService:GiveEmote(player, emote.name)
		end
	end
	PSM:setDataValue(player, "Inventory", inventory)
end

-- Function to toggle the favorite field of a player's emote given the name
function EmotesService:ToggleFavorite(player: Player, emoteName: string)
	local inventory = PSM:getDataValue(player, "Inventory")
	local favorite = nil
	for _, emote in inventory.Emotes or {} do
		if emote.name == emoteName then
			emote.favorite = not (emote.favorite or false)
			favorite = emote.favorite
			break
		end
	end

	PSM:setDataValue(player, "Inventory", inventory)
	return favorite
end

function EmotesService.Client:ToggleFavorite(player:Player, emoteName: string)
	return self.Server:ToggleFavorite(player, emoteName)
end

function EmotesService.Client:GetPlayableEmotes(player: Player)
	-- We already wrote this method, so we can just call the other one.
	-- 'self.Server' will reference back to the root EmoteSystem.
	local emotes = self.Server:GetPlayerEmotes(player)

	for _, emote in emotes do
		local properEmote = getEmote(emote.name)
		if emote then
			emote.animationId = properEmote.animationId
			emote.rarity = properEmote.rarity
			emote.color = rarityColors[properEmote.rarity] or rarityColors[properEmote.emoteType]
			emote.emoteType = properEmote.emoteType
		--else
		--	properEmote.color = rarityColors[properEmote.rarity] or rarityColors[properEmote.emoteType]
		--	properEmote.emoteType = properEmote.emoteType
		end
	end
	return emotes
	--return allEmotes
end

function ButtonTuched(hit, button)
	if hit.Parent:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
		local player = players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(hit.Parent)
		if player then
			isTouching = false
			wait(0.1)
			isTouching = true
			if player:FindFirstChild("Datastore")then
				local data = player:WaitForChild("Datastore")
				local money  = data:WaitForChild("Money")
				local multiplier = data:WaitForChild("Multiplier")
				local rebirth = data:WaitForChild("Rebirth")
				if button.Parent.Parent == buttons.Multiplier then
					while isTouching == true do 
						if money.Value >= button.Price.Value then
							money.Value -= button.Price.Value 
							multiplier.Value += (button.Effect.Value * (rebirth.Value + 1))
							task.wait(0.25)
						else
							task.wait(0.1)
						end
					end
				end
			end	

		end
	end
end

	Invhotbar:FindFirstChild(To_Slot).NameText.Text = Item
	Invhotbar:FindFirstChild(To_Slot).ImageLabel.Image = itemfolder:FindFirstChild(Item).TextureId
end

end

local shopItems = {
	{name = "Item 1", price = 100},
	{name = "Item 2", price = 200},
	{name = "Item 3", price = 300}
}

-- Variables
local shopGui = game.ServerStorage:WaitForChild("ShopGui"):Clone()
local playerCoins = {}

-- Functions
local function openShop(player)
	local coins = playerCoins[player.Name]
	if coins then
		local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
		if playerGui then
			local existingGui = playerGui:FindFirstChild("ShopGui")
			if existingGui then
				existingGui:Destroy()
			end
			shopGui:Clone().Parent = playerGui
		end
	end
end

local function purchaseItem(player, itemName, itemPrice)
	local coins = playerCoins[player.Name]
	if coins and coins.Value >= itemPrice then
		coins.Value = coins.Value - itemPrice
		-- Give the player the purchased item
		-- Customize this part based on your game logic
		print(player.Name .. " purchased " .. itemName)
	end
end

-- Shop GUI Setup
local function createShopGui()
	local gui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
	gui.Name = "ShopGui"
	local frame = Instance.new("Frame")
	frame.Parent = gui
	frame.Size = UDim2.new(0, 200, 0, 200)
	frame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.5, 0.5, 0.5)
	frame.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -100, 0.5, -100)

	for i, item in ipairs(shopItems) do
		local button = Instance.new("TextButton")
		button.Name = item.name
		button.Text = item.name .. " - $" .. item.price
		button.Parent = frame
		button.Size = UDim2.new(0, 150, 0, 30)
		button.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -75, 0, 40 * i)
		button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			purchaseItem(gui.Parent.Parent, item.name, item.price)
		end)
	end

	return gui
end

		PlayerTrade.TradeCountdown.Visible = false
	elseif Option == "TradeDone" then
		PlayerTrade.Trading.Value = ""
		ButtonHandler.OnClick(PlayerTrade,UDim2.new(0,0,0,0))
		PlayerTrade.TradeCountdown.Visible = false

end

--Make tools in backpack shiny
local function MakeToolsShiny(player)
	player.CharacterAppearanceLoaded:Connect(function(char)
		local hum = char:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
		--first get all tools from the player's backpack
		local tools = player.Backpack:GetChildren()
		for i, tool in pairs(tools) do
			if tool:IsA("Tool") then
				--turn all tools parts into smoothplastic
				for i, part in pairs(tool:GetDescendants()) do
					if part:IsA("BasePart") then
						part.Material = Enum.Material.SmoothPlastic
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end)
end

--Make accessories shiny too
local function MakeAccessoriesShiny(player)
	player.CharacterAppearanceLoaded:Connect(function(char)
		local hum = char:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
		for i,v in pairs(char:GetChildren()) do
			if v:IsA("Accessory") then
				if v.Handle then
					v.Handle.Material = "SmoothPlastic"
				end
			end
		end
	end)
end

-- << math.random(d,a) >> -------------------------------------------------------------------------

Que es math.random()?:
math.random() es una funcion que se usa para obtener un numero aleatorio entre la cantidad definida

Ejemplos:
d = el numero en donde empieza la cantidad de numeros aleatorios
a = el numero en donde termina la cantidad de numeros aleatorios

- math.random(1,10) == Numero aleatorio del 1 al 10

-- << math.floor(x) >> -------------------------------------------------------------------------

Que es math.floor()?:



-- << math.pow(x,y) >> -------------------------------------------------------------------------

Que es math.pow()?: es una funcion que se usa para elevar un numero a la potencia de otro.

Ejemplos:
x = el numero que quieres potenciar
y = la cantidad de veces que se multiplicara x por si mismo

- math.pow(10,5) = 100000 = 10 * 10 * 10 * 10 * 10, 10 multiplicado por si mismo 5 veces es igual a 100000.


-- << math.pi >> -------------------------------------------------------------------------

Que es math.pi?:  es una constante que representa el valor de pi (3.14159265358979323846)

Ejemplos: 

- math.pi = 3.14159265358979323846

-- << math.huge >> ------------------------------------------------------------------------- 

Que es math.huge?: es una constante que representa el valor infinito positivo.

Ejemplos: 

 math.huge = infinito
 
-- << math.rad(x) >> -------------------------------------------------------------------------
 Que es math.rad()?:  es una funcion que se usa para convertir grados a radianes.

function Create(ty)
	return function(data)
		local obj = Instance.new(ty)
		for k, v in pairs(data) do
			if type(k) == 'number' then
				v.Parent = obj
			else
				obj[k] = v
			end
		end
		return obj
	end
end

	bar.Size = UDim2.new(0, (mouse.X - ap.X), 1, 0) --where ever we click, the bar's size changes to reach the position
	fire.Value = true
	down = true
end)

uis.InputEnded:Connect(function(input, gp)
	if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
		down = false
		fire.Value = false
	end
end)

mouse.Move:Connect(function()
	if down == true then --if true, then this represents the mouse being dragged
		fire.Value = false 
		fire.Value = true
		if mouse.X < ap.X then --out of bounds (to the left)
			bar.Size = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0)
		elseif mouse.X > (ap.X + as.X) then --out of bounds (to the right)
			bar.Size = UDim2.new(0, as.X, 1, 0)
		else --within bounds
			bar.Size = UDim2.new(0, (mouse.X - ap.X), 1, 0)
		end
	end
end)

fire.Changed:Connect(function() --this is where the false-true question's answer is!
	if fire.Value == true then
		local maxSize = as.X
		local size = bar.Size.X.Offset
		local num = 10*(size / maxSize) --100 because that is the range we want it to be in
		sound.Volume = math.floor(num)
		--max.Text = math.floor(num) --to round off any of those good ol' decimals
	end
end)

function GetWinnerMap()
	local BiggestValue = math.max(VotingStatus.Map1.Value, VotingStatus.Map2.Value)
	local WinnerMap = nil
	for _, v in pairs(VotingStatus:GetChildren()) do
		if v.Value == BiggestValue then
			WinnerMap = v
			ChangeStatus(string.format("%s wins.", WinnerMap.Name))
		end
	end
	for _, v in pairs(Maps:GetChildren()) do
		if v.Name == WinnerMap.Name then
			local MapClone = v:Clone()
			MapClone.Parent = workspace
		end
	end
end

function Crouch()

        TweenService:Create(Camera,TweenInfo.new(0.5),{FieldOfView = 70}):Play()
        TweenService:Create(Humanoid,TweenInfo.new(0.5),{WalkSpeed = CrouchSpeed}):Play()
    end

    TweenService:Create(Camera,TweenInfo.new(0.5),{FieldOfView = 70}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(Humanoid,TweenInfo.new(0.5),{WalkSpeed = NormalWalkSpeed}):Play()
end

	newPart.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
		if hit.Parent and hit.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
			hit.Parent.Humanoid.Health = 0
		end
	end)
end

	for _, field in data do

				warn(target, item)

				if item == target then
					return rarity
				end
			end
		end
	end
end

	for index, group in crateContent do
		if index == groupIndex then
			return group
		end
	end
end

			DebounceTable[objectThatTouchesTheHitbox.Parent] = true
			objectThatTouchesTheHitbox.Parent.Humanoid:TakeDamage(5)
			wait(2)
			DebounceTable[objectThatTouchesTheHitbox.Parent] = nil
		end
	end

function updatechar()
	
	for _, v in pairs(character:GetChildren())do
		if CanViewBody then
			if v.Name == 'Head' then
				v.LocalTransparencyModifier = 1
				v.CanCollide = false
			end
		else
			if v:IsA'Part' or v:IsA'UnionOperation' or v:IsA'MeshPart' then
				v.LocalTransparencyModifier = 1
				v.CanCollide = false
			end
		end
		if v:IsA'Accessory' then
			v:FindFirstChild('Handle').LocalTransparencyModifier = 1
			v:FindFirstChild('Handle').CanCollide = false
		end
		if v:IsA'Hat' then
			v:FindFirstChild('Handle').LocalTransparencyModifier = 1
			v:FindFirstChild('Handle').CanCollide = false
		end

	end
	
end

local Seed = Random.new()

function Activated()
	if not Tool.Enabled or MouseHeld then return end
	MouseHeld = true	
	Animations.Charge:Play()
end

function Deactivated()
	if not Tool.Enabled or not MouseHeld then return end
	MouseHeld = false

	Tool.Enabled = false
	local RightLimb = Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") or Character:FindFirstChild("RightHand")
	if RightLimb then
		RightWeld = RightLimb:FindFirstChildOfClass("Weld")
		if RightWeld and not CurrentMotor then
			CurrentMotor = Create'Motor6D'{
				Name = 'Grip',
				--C0 = RightWeld.C0,
				--C1 = Tool.Grip,--RightWeld.C1,
				Part0 = RightWeld.Part0,
				Part1 = Handle,
				--Parent = RightArm
			}
			CurrentMotor.Parent = RightLimb
		end
		coroutine.wrap(function()
			if RightWeld then
				Part0 = RightWeld.Part0
				Part1 = RightWeld.Part1
				RightWeld.Part0 = nil
				RightWeld.Part1 = nil
			end
		end)()
		
	end
	local AttackAnims = {--[[Animations.Slash,]]Animations.Stab}
	Sounds.Lunge:Play()
	Animations.Charge:Stop()
	local Anim = AttackAnims[Seed:NextInteger(1,#AttackAnims)]
	Anim:Play(0,nil,3);--Anim.Stopped:Wait()
	Wait(Anim.Length/3)
	if RightWeld then
		RightWeld.Part0 = Part0
		RightWeld.Part1 = Part1
	end
	if CurrentMotor then 
		CurrentMotor:Destroy();CurrentMotor = nil
	end
	Tool.Enabled = true
end


Remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(Client,Key)
	if Client ~= Player or not Key or not Humanoid or Humanoid.Health <= 0 or not Tool.Enabled then return end
	if Key == Enum.KeyCode.Q then
		ChangeTime(Properties.TimetoChange)
	elseif Key == Enum.KeyCode.E and Properties.LightTeleport then
		Properties.LightTeleport = false
		delay(5,function()
			Properties.LightTeleport = true
		end)
	 	LightTransport()
	end
end)

local function FormatTime(s)
	return ("%02i:%02i"):format(s/60%60, s%60)
end

local function UpdateGameInfo()
	VoteGui.VoteFrame.Time.Text = FormatTime(ReplicatedStorage.Game.Status.Value)
	hud.Info.Timer.Text = FormatTime(ReplicatedStorage.Game.Status.Value)
	hud.Info.Red.Scores.Text = ReplicatedStorage.Game.RedScore.Value
	hud.Info.Blue.Scores.Text = ReplicatedStorage.Game.BlueScore.Value
end

ReplicatedStorage.Game.Status.Changed:Connect(UpdateGameInfo)
ReplicatedStorage.Game.RedScore.Changed:Connect(UpdateGameInfo)
ReplicatedStorage.Game.BlueScore.Changed:Connect(UpdateGameInfo)

		end
	end
end)

local function renderPolarGraph(rEquation, prescision, iswait)
	graphFolder:ClearAllChildren()

	local function getPoint(theta)
		local r = rEquation(theta)
		local x = r * math.cos(theta)
		local y = r * math.sin(theta)
		return Vector3.new(x, y, 0)
	end

	local function getPoints()
		local points = {}
		for theta = 0, 2 * math.pi, prescision do
			table.insert(points, getPoint(theta))
		end
		return points
	end

	local function renderPoints(points)
		local sound = Instance.new('Sound',basePart)
		sound.SoundId = 'rbxassetid://9040512075'
		sound.Volume = 1
		sound.Looped = true
		sound:Play()
		local attachment1 = Instance.new("Attachment", graphFolder)
		attachment1.CFrame = CFrame.new(points[1])
		for i = 2,#points do
			if(iswait) then
				task.wait()
			end
			local attachment2 = Instance.new("Attachment", graphFolder)
			local theta = (i - 1) * prescision
			local pitch = (points[i].Y + 10) / 20
			sound.Pitch = pitch
			Humanoid.DisplayName = string.format('Computing...\n%s Prescision\nTheta: %.3f\nR: %.3f', to_percent(.1, prescision), theta, rEquation(theta))
			attachment2.CFrame = CFrame.new(points[i])
			local beam = Instance.new("RodConstraint", graphFolder)
			beam.Enabled = true
			beam.Visible = true
			beam.Attachment0 = attachment1
			beam.Attachment1 = attachment2
			beam.Color = BrickColor.Red()
			beam.Thickness = 0.1
			attachment1 = attachment2
		end
		sound:Stop()
	end

	renderPoints(getPoints())
end

	if enemytorso ~= nil then
		-- Zombie behavior when player is detected
		local targetPlayer = enemytorso.Parent
		if not isChasingPlayer then
			isChasingPlayer = true
			local chasePosition = GetChasePosition(targetPlayer)
			human:MoveTo(chasePosition)
			PlayChaseSound(targetPlayer)
		end
	else
		-- AI behavior when no player is detected
		local nearestAIDirection = GetNearestAIDirection(zombie.HumanoidRootPart.Position)
		if nearestAIDirection then
			local oppositeDirection = -nearestAIDirection
			local offset = Vector3.new(math.random(), 0, math.random()).unit * AIProximityRadius * (math.random() + 1)  -- Apply random offset
			local targetPosition = zombie.HumanoidRootPart.Position + oppositeDirection * AIProximityRadius + offset

			local ray = Ray.new(zombie.HumanoidRootPart.Position, oppositeDirection * -1)
			local ignoreList = {zombie.HumanoidRootPart} -- Add other parts to ignore if needed

			local hitPart, hitPosition = workspace:FindPartOnRayWithIgnoreList(ray, ignoreList)
			if hitPart then
				local backupDistance = 9  -- Distance to back up when hitting an obstacle
				local backupPosition = hitPosition + oppositeDirection * backupDistance
				human:MoveTo(backupPosition)
			else
				human:MoveTo(targetPosition)
			end
		end
		isChasingPlayer = false  -- Reset the chasing flag when not chasing a player
	end

	if isChasingPlayer then
		local currentTime = os.time()
		if currentTime - lastChaseSoundTime >= chaseSoundCooldown then
			lastChaseSoundTime = currentTime
			local targetPlayer = enemytorso.Parent
			PlayChaseSound(targetPlayer)
		end
	end

	wait()  -- Add a small delay before the next iteration of the loop
end

-- Can you explain to me how getfenv() works?
-- getfenv() returns the environment of a function. The environment is where variables are stored.
-- If you call getfenv() without an argument, it returns the environment of the current function.
-- If you call getfenv(0), it returns the environment of the script.
-- If you call getfenv(1), it returns the environment of the function that called the current function.
-- If you call getfenv(2), it returns the environment of the function that called the function that called the current function.
-- And so on.
-- setfenv() sets the environment of a function. This can be used to create closures.
-- A closure is a function that "remembers" the environment in which it was created.
-- This can be used to create functions that have access to variables that are not in their own environment.
-- For example, you could create a function that has access to the variables in the environment of a script, even though it is not defined in that environment.
-- This can be useful for creating modules or libraries that can be used in multiple scripts.
-- However, setfenv() is deprecated and should not be used in new code. Instead, you should use the _ENV variable to access the environment of a function.
-- _ENV is a special variable that contains the environment of the current function. You can use it to access variables in the environment, or to set new variables.

function sortByName(x, y)

	-- Convert to lowercase
	local xString = string.lower(x[1].Name)
	local yString = string.lower(y[1].Name)

	-- Convert to byte values
	local xBytes = {}
	for i=1, string.len(xString) do
		table.insert(xBytes, string.byte(xString, i, i))
	end
	local yBytes = {}
	for i=1, string.len(yString) do
		table.insert(yBytes, string.byte(yString, i, i))
	end

	-- See if Y ever less than up X
	local xIsLess = false
	for i=1, #yBytes do
		if #(xBytes) < i then
			xIsLess = true
			break
		end
		if xBytes[i] < yBytes[i] then
			xIsLess = true
			break
		elseif xBytes[i] > yBytes[i] then
			break
		end
	end

	-- Return result
	return xIsLess

end

function sortByCountAndName(x, y)

	-- Sort by name if same count
	if x[2] == y[2] then
		return sortByName(x, y)
	end

	-- Return comparison
	return x[2] > y[2]

end

function sortByRarityAndCountAndName(x, y)

	-- Assign numbers for rarity
	local rarityX = plr.PlayerScripts.Functions.GetRarityValue:Invoke(x[1].Rarity.Value)
	local rarityY = plr.PlayerScripts.Functions.GetRarityValue:Invoke(y[1].Rarity.Value)
	if x[1].Name == "Default" then
		rarityX = -1
	elseif y[1].Name == "Default" then
		rarityY = -1
	end

	-- Sort by name if same rarity
	if rarityX == rarityY then
		return sortByCountAndName(x, y)
	end

	-- Return comparison
	return (rarityX > rarityY)

end

function findNearestPlayer()
	local playerList = Players:GetPlayers()
	
	local nearestPlayer = nil
	local distance = nil
	local direction = nil
	
	for _, player in pairs(playerList) do
		local character = player.Character
		if character then
			local distanceVector = (player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - root.Position)
			if not nearestPlayer then
				nearestPlayer = player
				distance = distanceVector.Magnitude
				direction = distanceVector.Unit
			elseif distanceVector.Magnitude < distance then
				nearestPlayer = player
				distance = distanceVector.Magnitude
				direction = distanceVector.Unit
			end	
		end
	end
	
	return nearestPlayer, distance, direction
end

local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local appleLimitDataStore = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("AppleLimit")
local MAX_APPLES = 1 -- Maximum number of apples allowed in the inventory

function OnClick(player)
	-- Retrieve the player's DataStore value
	local success, currentApples = pcall(function()
		return appleLimitDataStore:GetAsync(tostring(player.UserId))
	end)

	if success and currentApples then
		if currentApples >= MAX_APPLES then
			-- Player already has the maximum number of apples
			-- You can display a message or take any other action here
			return
		end
	else
		currentApples = 0
	end

	-- Increment the apple count and update the DataStore
	currentApples = currentApples + 1
	appleLimitDataStore:SetAsync(tostring(player.UserId), currentApples)

	-- Clone and add the apple to the player's backpack
	local item = game.ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Apple")
	if item then
		local clone = item:Clone()
		clone.Parent = player.Backpack
	end
end

local pather = {}

local CollectedPaths = {}

function pather.ReadPaths(Map : Model, c : number?)
	local count = c or 1
	local PathFolder = Map:FindFirstChild("Path")
	if PathFolder then
		local Paths = PathFolder:GetChildren()
		print("Found: "..#Paths.." Path(s)")
		for i = 1,#Paths do
			local CPath = PathFolder:FindFirstChild(i)
			local pathtab = {}
			for j,v in pairs(CPath:GetChildren()) do
				if v:IsA("Part") then
					table.insert(pathtab, v.CFrame)
				elseif v:IsA("CFrameValue") then
					table.insert(pathtab, v.Value)
				end
			end
			CollectedPaths[i] = pathtab
			print("Loaded Path "..i.." with "..#pathtab.." Points")
		end
	else
		warn("Path Folder could not be found in this Map!! x"..count)
		pather.ReadPaths(Map, count+1)
	end
end

function pather.GetPath(num : number)
	return CollectedPaths[num]
end

local function createProjectile(player, startPosition, endPosition)
	local Projectile = game.ReplicatedStorage.Assets.Projectile:Clone()
	Projectile.Position = startPosition
	Projectile.Parent = workspace

	local direction = (endPosition - startPosition).Unit
	local bodyVelocity = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
	bodyVelocity.Velocity = direction * 300
	bodyVelocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(100000, 100000, 100000)
	bodyVelocity.Parent = Projectile

	return Projectile
end

local function createExplosion(endPosition)
	local VFX = game.ReplicatedStorage.Assets["Explosion (*)"]:Clone()
	game.Debris:AddItem(VFX, 2)
	VFX.Position = endPosition
	VFX.Parent = workspace
	for i, v in pairs(VFX.Explosion:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
			v:Emit(21)
		end
	end
end

LeftShoulder.MaxVelocity = 0.15

LeftShoulder:SetDesiredAngle(-3.14 /2)

local lastTick = 0

function move(time)
local amplitude = 1
local frequency = 1
  local deltaTime = time - lastTick
  lastTick = time

local climbFudge = 0
local setAngles = false

  if (jumpAnimTime > 0) then
  jumpAnimTime = jumpAnimTime - deltaTime
  end

if (pose == "FreeFall" and jumpAnimTime <= 0) then
playAnimation("fall", fallTransitionTime, Humanoid)
elseif (pose == "Seated") then
playAnimation("sit", 0.5, Humanoid)
return
elseif (pose == "Running") then
if Figure and Humanoid and Humanoid.WalkSpeed<907 then
playAnimation("walk", 0.1, Humanoid);
elseif Figure and Humanoid and Humanoid.WalkSpeed>907 then
playAnimation("run", 0.1, Humanoid);
end;
elseif (pose == "Dead" or pose == "GettingUp" or pose == "FallingDown" or pose == "Seated" or pose == "PlatformStanding") then
stopAllAnimations()
amplitude = 0.1
frequency = 1
setAngles = true
end
if (setAngles) then
local desiredAngle = amplitude * math.sin(time * frequency)
RightShoulder:SetDesiredAngle(desiredAngle + climbFudge)
LeftShoulder:SetDesiredAngle(desiredAngle - climbFudge)
RightHip:SetDesiredAngle(-desiredAngle)
LeftHip:SetDesiredAngle(-desiredAngle)
end
-- Tool Animation handling
local tool = getTool()
if tool and tool:FindFirstChild("Handle") then
local animStringValueObject = getToolAnim(tool)
if animStringValueObject then
toolAnim = animStringValueObject.Value
-- message recieved, delete StringValue
animStringValueObject.Parent = nil
toolAnimTime = time + .3
end
if time > toolAnimTime then
toolAnimTime = 0
toolAnim = "None"
end
animateTool()
else
stopToolAnimations()
toolAnim = "None"
toolAnimInstance = nil
toolAnimTime = 0
end
end

function round.LoadMap()
	local votedMap = round.ToggleVoting()
	local mapFolder = ServerStorage.Maps:FindFirstChild(votedMap)
	if not mapFolder then
		mapFolder = ServerStorage.Maps.Blons
	end
	
	local newMap = mapFolder:Clone()
	newMap.Parent = workspace.Map 
	
	local spawnBox = workspace.SpawnBox
	local currentFloor = spawnBox.CurrentFloor.SurfaceGui.Frame.TextLabel
	local mud = spawnBox.Mud.Mud
	
	-- TweenService animation to move the mud down
	local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(1, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out)
	local tween = TweenService:Create(mud, tweenInfo, {Position = mud.Position + Vector3.new(0, -10, 0)})
	spawnBox.Mud.BackMud:Destroy()
	tween:Play()

	-- Destroy the mud after the animation finishes
	task.wait(1.15)
	mud:Destroy()
	
	workspace.SpawnBox.Floor:Destroy()
	spawnBox.ElevatorBell:Play()
	currentFloor.Text = "Ground"
	
	-- Destroy the elevator parts with TweenService transition moving upwards using quad easing style
	local elevatorParts = { spawnBox.Front }
	local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(1, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad)

	for i, part in ipairs(elevatorParts) do
		local startPosition = part.Position
		local targetPosition = startPosition + Vector3.new(0, part.Size.Y, 0) -- Move the part upwards

		local tween = TweenService:Create(part, tweenInfo, {
			Position = targetPosition
		})

		tween:Play()

		-- Destroy the part after the tween completes
		tween.Completed:Connect(function()
			part:Destroy()
		end)
	end


		
	local portal = newMap:WaitForChild("Start")
	
	newMap.Base.Humanoid.HealthChanged:Connect(function(health)
		if health <= 0 then
			info.GameRunning.Value = false
			info.Message.Value = "We failed.."
		end
	end)
	
	return newMap
end

	local maps = ServerStorage.Maps:GetChildren()
	votes = {}
	for i, map in ipairs(maps) do
		votes[map.Name] = {}
	end	
	
	info.Voting.Value = true
	
	--make a 10 second timer when someone votes

local YSize = 50
local Size = 20

local Amount = 20

local function PlaceWall(x, z)
	local Part = Instance.new("Part")
	Part.Parent = game.Workspace
	Part.Size = Vector3.new(1, YSize, Size)
	Part.Position = Vector3.new(x * Size, YSize / 2, z * Size)
	Part.Anchored = true
	local RNG = math.random(1,4)
	if RNG == 1 then
		Part.Rotation = Vector3.new(0,0,0)
		Part.Position += Vector3.new(0,0, Size / 2)
	elseif RNG == 2 then
		Part.Rotation = Vector3.new(0,90,0)
		Part.Position += Vector3.new(Size / 2,0, 0)
	elseif RNG == 3 then
		Part.Rotation = Vector3.new(0,180,0)
		Part.Position -= Vector3.new(0,0, Size / 2)
	else
		Part.Rotation = Vector3.new(0,-90,0)
		Part.Position -= Vector3.new(Size / 2 , 0 , 0 )
	end
end

for x = -Amount / 2, Amount / 2, 1 do
	wait()
	for z = -Amount / 2, Amount / 2, 1 do
		for i = 1, math.random(1,3) do
			PlaceWall(x, z)
		end
	end
end

local X35 = workspace.X35
local soundID = 4499400560
local distortion = 1
local chorus = false
local playbackSpeed = 0.1
local equalizer = false
local function despawn()
    X35:Destroy()
end
while true do
    if X35.Position.X < 100 then
        X35.Position = Vector3.new(X35.Position.X + 1, X35.Position.Y, X35.Position.Z)
        wait(0.1)
    else
        local sound = Instance.new("Sound")
        sound.SoundId = "rbxassetid://" .. tostring(soundID)
        sound.Volume = 1
        sound.Looped = false
        sound.PlaybackSpeed = playbackSpeed
        sound.DistortionLevel = distortion
        sound.ChorusEnabled = chorus 
        sound.EqEnabled = equalizer 
        sound.Parent = workspace.X35
        
		sound:Play()
        
		wait(sound.TimeLength)
        
		despawn()
	end	
end

--global announcment command
cmds.announce = function(sender,recipent)
	
	local message = recipent[1]
	
	if message then
		for i , v in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
			local GlobalAnnounce = serverstore.GlobalAnnounce:Clone()
			GlobalAnnounce.Parent = v.PlayerGui
			replistore.Text.Value = message
			wait(7)
			v.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("GlobalAnnounce")	
		end
	end
end

-- What are variables?
-- Compare them to boxes or folders that store information that you want to access later. Think of variables like a locker that you put your books in to use them in a later class

-- How do we write variables?
local VariableName = "Hello!"
-- Now lets do a breakdown of this
-- "local" is essentially saying that we have this new item that can only be accessed in this part of our code, local means that anything in this script can access our variable.
-- What this means is that now that we have defined "VariableName" by using local, we can use VariableName anywhere else in the script and the script will know what we are talking about.

-- But what if we do something like this?
if 1+1 == 2 then
	local secondVariable = "Hey!"
end

-- If we try to use the term secondVariable anywhere else in the script, the script will not recognize it, that is because it is only local to the "if" block.

--But legs ignore that all for now and continue talking about variables

-- Your variable name can be anything, just no puncuations (periods, commas, exclamation marks, etc) and it cant start with a number because then the script will think its an integer.
-- Finally, your variable has to be all one word, no spaces, if you do put a space, the script will recognize it as two different variables.
-- For example, local hey there = "hello!"
-- This is valid, but the script is recognizing hey and there as two seperate variables.

	local Vval = 8

Events:WaitForChild("Equip").OnServerEvent:Connect(function(Player,boolean,position)
	if not Player or not Player.Character then return end
	local Character = Player.Character
	local Humanoid = Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
	local Torso = Character:FindFirstChild("Torso")
	local Neck = Torso:FindFirstChild("Neck")
	local LeftShoulder = Torso:FindFirstChild("Left Shoulder")
	local RightShoulder = Torso:FindFirstChild("Right Shoulder")
	pcall(function()
		if boolean then
			local positions = (Torso.Position.y - position.y)/100
			local Magnitude = (Torso.Position-position).magnitude/35
			local Offset = positions/Magnitude

			if RightShoulder ~= nil then
				TweenService:Create(RightShoulder, TweenInfo.new(0.1), {C0 = RightShoulder.C0:Lerp(CFrame.new(1, 0.5, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 1, 0, -1, -0, -0) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(0, 0, -Offset),0.3)}):Play()
			end
			if LeftShoulder ~= nil then
				TweenService:Create(LeftShoulder, TweenInfo.new(0.1), {C0 = LeftShoulder.C0:Lerp(CFrame.new(-1, 0.5, 0, -0, -0, -1, 0, 1, 0, 1, 0, 0) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(0, 0, Offset),0.3)}):Play()
			end
		elseif not boolean then
			RightShoulder.C0 = CFrame.new(1, 0.5, 0) * CFrame.Angles(0, math.pi/2, 0)
			LeftShoulder.C0 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.5, 0) * CFrame.Angles(0, -math.pi/2, 0)
		end
	end)
end)

local function breakcrate(crate)
	if crate.Name == "Crate" and crate.Parent and not crate.Parent:FindFirstChild("Center") then
		local chance = math.random(1, 100)
		local old_crate = crate
		crate = game:GetService("ServerStorage").Objects.BrokenCrate:Clone()
		crate:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(old_crate.Parent.PrimaryPart.CFrame)
		old_crate.Parent:Destroy()
		crate.Parent = workspace.Debris
		if chance > 0 and chance <= 10 then
			for count = 1, math.random(1, 2) do
				local gun = rep.Weapons:GetChildren()[math.random(1,#rep.Weapons:GetChildren())]:Clone()
				gun:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(crate.PrimaryPart.CFrame)
				gun.Parent = workspace.Items
				gun:SetAttribute("DespawnTime", 50)
			end
		end
		if chance > 10 and chance <= 80 then
			for count = 1, math.random(1, 3) do
				local food = rep.Food:GetChildren()[math.random(1,#rep.Food:GetChildren())]:Clone()
				food:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(crate.PrimaryPart.CFrame)
				food.Parent = workspace.Items
				food:SetAttribute("DespawnTime", 50)
			end
		end
		if chance > 100 then
			local hat = rep.Hats:GetChildren()[math.random(1,#rep.Hats:GetChildren())]:Clone()
			hat:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(crate.PrimaryPart.CFrame)
			hat.Parent = workspace.Items
			hat:SetAttribute("DespawnTime", 50)
		end
		crate.PrimaryPart:SetAttribute("Broken", true)

local PathfindingService = game:GetService("PathfindingService")
local Humanoid = script.Parent:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local TargetPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer

local PathInstance = nil

function FollowPlayer()
	local TargetCharacter = TargetPlayer.Character
	if not TargetCharacter then
		return
	end

	local TargetHumanoidRootPart = TargetCharacter:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")

	if PathInstance then
		PathInstance:Cancel()
		PathInstance = nil
	end

	local path = PathfindingService:CreatePath()
	path:ComputeAsync(Humanoid.RootPart.Position, TargetHumanoidRootPart.Position)

	PathInstance = path
	local waypoints = path:GetWaypoints()

	for i, waypoint in ipairs(waypoints) do
		local direction = (waypoint.Position - Humanoid.RootPart.Position).Unit
		Humanoid:MoveTo(Humanoid.RootPart.Position + direction * 3)
		Humanoid.MoveToFinished:Wait()
	end

	PathInstance = nil
end

while true do
	FollowPlayer()
	wait(1)
end

function PlayerCharacter(player, character)
	if not player.Character then
		return
	end

	repeat wait() until player.Character.HumanoidRootPart

	local stagePart = game.Workspace.Stages:FindFirstChild(tostring(player.leaderstats.Stage.Value))

	if stagePart then
		player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = stagePart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0,2.5,0) * CFrame.Angles(0,math.rad(180),0)
	end
end

	if Object.Handle:FindFirstChild("Sword Swing") then
		Object.Handle["Sword Swing"].TimePosition = 0.2
		Object.Handle["Sword Swing"]:Play()
	end

		wait(0.25)
		debounce = false
		for i = 1,6 do
			wait(0.1)
			if debounce == true then
				coroutine.yield()
			end
		end
		debounce = true
		script:Destroy()
	end)()
	if Object:FindFirstChild("Swing") then
		local animation = Object.Parent.Humanoid.Animator:LoadAnimation(Object.Swing)
		animation:Play(0.1,1,1.5)
	end
	wait(0.5)
	local parts = game.Workspace:GetPartBoundsInBox(Object.Handle.CFrame,Object.Handle.Size)
	local hit = nil
	for i,v in pairs(parts) do
		local humanoid = v.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
		if humanoid then
			if humanoid.Parent ~= Object.Parent then
				hit = v
			end
		end
	end
	
	if debounce == false and hit then
		local humanoid = hit.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
		if humanoid then
			local enemy = true
			if enemy then
				debounce = true
				local healthb = humanoid.Health

					if Gold or Rainbow then
						humanoid.BreakJointsOnDeath = false
					end

				force.Parent = hit.Parent.Torso

		timeString = "• "..hours .. "h"
	end
	
	print(elapsedTime)

end

function FolderStorage()
	local Folder = workspace:FindFirstChild("BulletStorage") -- Finding the BulletStorage folder within the workspace
	if not Folder then
		Folder = Instance.new("Folder", workspace) -- Creating a new folder if BulletStorage doesn't exist
		Folder.Name = "BulletStorage" -- Setting the name of the new folder
	end

	return Folder -- Returning the BulletStorage folder

function Hit(Cast, Result)
	local Hit = Result.Instance -- Getting the instance that was hit
	if Hit then
		local Humanoid = Hit.Parent:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") or Hit.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") -- Finding the humanoid within the hit part's parent or grandparent
		if Humanoid then
			Humanoid:TakeDamage(GunConfig.Damage.Value) -- Applying damage to the humanoid
		end
	end
end

function RayUpdate(Cast, Origin, Direction, Length, Velocity, PartObject)
	if PartObject then
		local PartLength = PartObject.Size.Z / 2 -- Calculating half of the Z size of the part
		local BaseCF = CFrame.new(Origin, Origin + Direction) -- Creating a CFrame from the origin to the direction

		TweenService:Create(PartObject, TweenInfo.new(((Origin - Direction).Magnitude / Velocity.Magnitude) / 1.2), {CFrame = BaseCF * CFrame.new(0, 0, -(Length - PartLength))}):Play()
		-- Creating a tween to move the PartObject along the ray's path
	end
end

function RayTerminating(Cast)
	local RayInfo = Cast.RayInfo -- Getting information about the ray
	if RayInfo then
		local PartObject = RayInfo.CosmeticBulletObject -- Getting the cosmetic bullet object associated with the ray
		if PartObject then
			local BulletDies = PartObject.BulletDead:play()
			TweenService:Create(PartObject, TweenInfo.new(2), {Transparency = 1}):Play() -- Creating a tween to fade out the PartObject
			-- change brickcolor of PartObject to red

local lastPos
local animPlaying = false

local RANGE = 9999999999
local DAMAGE = 100

local function canSeeTarget(target)
	local orgin = hrp.Position
	local direction = (target.HumanoidRootPart.Position - hrp.Position).Unit * RANGE
	local ray = workspace:Raycast(orgin, direction, rayParams)
	
	if ray and ray.Instance then
		if ray.Instance:IsDescendantOf(target) then
			return true
		else
			return false
		end
	else
		return false
	end
end

local function findTarget()
	local players = game.Players:GetPlayers()
	local maxDistance = RANGE
	local nearestTarget
	
	for i, player in pairs(players) do
		if player.Character then
			local target = player.Character
			local distance = (hrp.Position - target.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
			
			if distance < maxDistance and canSeeTarget(target) then
				nearestTarget = target
				maxDistance = distance
			end
		end
	end
	
	return nearestTarget
end

local function getPath(destination)
	local path = PathfindingService:CreatePath(pathParams)
	
	path:ComputeAsync(hrp.Position, destination.Position)
	
	return path	
end

local function attack(target)
	local distance = (hrp.Position - target.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
	local debounce = false
	
	if distance > 10 then
		humanoid:MoveTo(target.HumanoidRootPart.Position)
	else
		if debounce == false then
			debounce = true
			
			attackAnim:Play()
			target.Humanoid.Health -= DAMAGE
			task.wait(0.5)
			debounce = false
		end
	end
end

local function walkTo(destination)
	local path = getPath(destination)
	
	if path.Status == Enum.PathStatus.Success then
		for i, waypoint in pairs(path:GetWaypoints()) do
			path.Blocked:Connect(function()
				path:Destroy()
			end)
			
			if animPlaying == false then
				walkAnim:Play()
				animPlaying = true
			end
			
			attackAnim:Stop()
			
			local target = findTarget()
			
			if target and target.Humanoid.Health > 0 then
				lastPos = target.HumanoidRootPart.Position
				attack(target)
				break
			else
				if waypoint.Action == Enum.PathWaypointAction.Jump then
					humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping)
				end
				
				if lastPos then
					humanoid:MoveTo(lastPos)
					humanoid.MoveToFinished:Wait()
					lastPos = nil
					break
				else
					humanoid:MoveTo(waypoint.Position)
					humanoid.MoveToFinished:Wait()
				end
			end
		end
	else
		return
	end
end

		newReactFolder.Parent = ServerStorage
		ReactFolder = newReactFolder
	end
end

	if ReactFolder then
		if typeOfGui == "POPUP" then

				return ErrorMsg
			end

			return ErrorMsg
		end
	else

		print(ErrorMsg)
		return ErrorMsg
	end
end

local functionId = "editText"

local function fixHebrewText(text)
	local hebrewLetters = "^[0123456789ץקראטוןםפףךלחיעכגדשזסבהנמצתץ ,.?/:';()*&^%$#@!~`{}\\|%d]*$"
	local symbol = string.match(text, "[^" .. hebrewLetters .. "](.)$") -- Match a symbol at the end

	if symbol then
		local firstChar = string.sub(text, 1, 1)
		local lastChar = string.sub(text, -1)

		if symbol == firstChar then
			return symbol .. string.sub(text, 2, -2) -- Move symbol to the front
		elseif symbol == lastChar then
			return string.sub(text, 1, -2) .. symbol -- Move symbol to the back
		end
	end

	return text -- Return unchanged if no symbol found at the end
end

local ClickDetector = script.Parent
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local appleLimitDataStore = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("AppleLimit")
local MAX_APPLES = 1 -- Maximum number of apples allowed in the inventory

function OnClick(player)
	-- Retrieve the player's DataStore value
	local success, currentApples = pcall(function()
		return appleLimitDataStore:GetAsync(tostring(player.UserId))
	end)

	if success and currentApples then
		if currentApples >= MAX_APPLES then
			-- Player already has the maximum number of apples
			-- You can display a message or take any other action here
			return
		end
	else
		currentApples = 0
	end

	-- Increment the apple count and update the DataStore
	currentApples = currentApples + 1
	appleLimitDataStore:SetAsync(tostring(player.UserId), currentApples)

	-- Clone and add the apple to the player's backpack
	local item = game.ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Apple")
	if item then
		local clone = item:Clone()
		clone.Parent = player.Backpack
	end
end

-- https://devforum.roblox.com/t/lua-map-command/215342
local function map(x, start, stop, newStart, newStop, withinBounds)
	local value = ((x - start) / (stop - start)) * (newStop - newStart) + newStart

	--// Returns basic value
	if not withinBounds then
		return value
	end

	--// Returns values constrained to exact range
	if newStart < newStop then
		return math.max(math.min(value, newStop), newStart)
	else
		return math.max(math.min(value, newStart), newStop)
	end
end

local function rep(t, m)
	return math.clamp(t - math.floor(t / m) * m, 0, m);
end

local function lerp(a, b, t)
	return a+(b-a)*t
end

local function lerpTheta(a, b, t)
	local dt = rep(b - a, 360);
	return lerp(a, a + ((dt > 180 and dt - 360) or dt), t);
end

--

local function getRotationBetween(u, v, axis)
	local dot, uxv = u:Dot(v), u:Cross(v)
	if (dot < -0.99999) then return CFrame.fromAxisAngle(axis, math.pi) end
	return CFrame.new(0, 0, 0, uxv.x, uxv.y, uxv.z, 1 + dot)
end

local function calculateRotationRelativeToNormal(objectos, normal, axis)
	local fromToQuaternion = getRotationBetween(objectos.CFrame.UpVector, normal, axis ~= nil and axis or Vector3.new(1, 0, 0))

	local X, Y, Z = (fromToQuaternion * objectos.CFrame):ToOrientation()
	return Vector3.new(X, Y, Z)
end

local function getScreenGui()
	local screenGui = PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("ProximityPrompts")
	if screenGui == nil then
		screenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
		screenGui.Name = "ProximityPrompts"
		screenGui.ResetOnSpawn = false
		screenGui.Parent = PlayerGui
	end
	return screenGui
end

local function setUpCircularProgressBar(bar)
	local leftGradient = bar.LeftGradient.ProgressBarImage.UIGradient
	local rightGradient = bar.RightGradient.ProgressBarImage.UIGradient

	local progress = bar.Progress
	progress.Changed:Connect(function(value)
		local angle = math.clamp(value * 360, 0, 360)
		leftGradient.Rotation = math.clamp(angle, 180, 360)
		rightGradient.Rotation = math.clamp(angle, 0, 180)
	end)
end

local function WeldParts(Parts, MainPart, JointType, DoNotUnanchor)
	-- @param Parts The Parts to weld. Should be anchored to prevent really horrible results.
	-- @param MainPart The part to weld the model to (can be in the model).
	-- @param [JointType] The type of joint. Defaults to weld. 
	-- @parm DoNotUnanchor Boolean, if true, will not unachor the model after cmopletion.
	
	for _, Part in pairs(Parts) do
		if ShouldBreakJoints(Part) then
			Part:BreakJoints()
		end
	end
	
	for _, Part in pairs(Parts) do
		if Part ~= MainPart then
			WeldTogether(MainPart, Part, JointType, MainPart)
		end
	end

	if not DoNotUnanchor then
		for _, Part in pairs(Parts) do
			Part.Anchored = false
		end
		MainPart.Anchored = false
	end
end

local function PerfectionWeld()	
	local Tool = GetNearestParent(script, "Tool")

	local Parts = GetBricks(script.Parent)
	local PrimaryPart = Tool and Tool:FindFirstChild("Handle") and Tool.Handle:IsA("BasePart") and Tool.Handle or script.Parent:IsA("Model") and script.Parent.PrimaryPart or Parts[1]

	if PrimaryPart then
		WeldParts(Parts, PrimaryPart, "Weld", false)
	else
		warn("qWeld - Unable to weld part")
	end
	
	return Tool
end

			else

			end

	end
end

function COMPFUNC()
	if akbval.Value == true then
		if compswitchval.Value == true then
			if epuval.Value == true then
				if airpresval.Value <= 6 then
					compval.Value = true
				elseif airpresval.Value >= 7.95 then
					compval.Value = false			
				end
			else
				compval.Value = false
			end
		else
			compval.Value = false
		end
	else
		compval.Value = false
	end
end

function LIGHTSFUNC()
	if akbval.Value == true then
		if genval.Value == true then
			lights.Value = true
			lightshalfon.Value = false
		else
			lights.Value = false
			lightshalfon.Value = true
		end
	else
		lights.Value = false
		lightshalfon.Value = false
	end
end

function AIRPRESSFUNC()
	if compval.Value == true then
		repeat
			airpresval.Value += .05
			wait(1)
		until airpresval.Value >= 7.95 or compval.Value ~= true
	end	
end

	if akbval.Value == true then
		if genval.Value == true then
			buzzval.Value = false
		else
			buzzval.Value = true
		end
	else
		buzzval.Value = false
	end
end

-- functions
function fakelerp(a, b, t) -- Linear interpolation
	return a + (b - a)*t
end

function slerp(a, b, t) --Spherical interpolation
	local dot = a:Dot(b)
	if dot > 0.99999 or dot < -0.99999 then
		return t <= 0.5 and a or b
	else
		local r = math.acos(dot)
		return (a*math.sin((1 - t)*r) + b*math.sin(t*r)) / math.sin(r)
	end
end

function matrixInterpolate(a, b, t)
	local ax, ay, az, a00, a01, a02, a10, a11, a12, a20, a21, a22 = a:components()
	local bx, by, bz, b00, b01, b02, b10, b11, b12, b20, b21, b22 = b:components()
	local v0 = fakelerp(Vector3.new(ax, ay, az), Vector3.new(bx , by , bz), t) -- Position
	local v1 = slerp(Vector3.new(a00, a01, a02), Vector3.new(b00, b01, b02), t) -- Vector  right
	local v2 = slerp(Vector3.new(a10, a11, a12), Vector3.new(b10, b11, b12), t) -- Vector  up
	local v3 = slerp(Vector3.new(a20, a21, a22), Vector3.new(b20, b21, b22), t) -- Vector  back
	local t = v1:Dot(v2)
	if not (t < 0 or t == 0 or t > 0) then     -- Failsafe
		return CFrame.new()
	end
	return CFrame.new(
		v0.x, v0.y, v0.z,
		v1.x, v1.y, v1.z,
		v2.x, v2.y, v2.z,
		v3.x, v3.y, v3.z)
end

function Lerp(c1,c2,al)
	local com1 = {c1.X,c1.Y,c1.Z,c1:toEulerAnglesXYZ()}
	local com2 = {c2.X,c2.Y,c2.Z,c2:toEulerAnglesXYZ()}
	for i,v in pairs(com1) do 
		com1[i] = v+(com2[i]-v)*al
	end
	return CFrame.new(com1[1],com1[2],com1[3]) * CFrame.Angles(select(4,unpack(com1)))
end

function PathfindingAI.new(neuralNetwork, grid)
	local self = setmetatable({}, PathfindingAI)

	self.neuralNetwork = neuralNetwork
	self.grid = grid

	return self
end

function PathfindingAI:findPath(start, goal)
	-- Perform pathfinding using the neural network
	local openSet = {start}
	local cameFrom = {}
	local gScore = {}
	local fScore = {}

	gScore[start] = 0
	fScore[start] = self:heuristic(start, goal)

	while #openSet > 0 do
		local current = self:findLowestFScore(openSet, fScore)
		if current == goal then
			return self:reconstructPath(cameFrom, goal)
		end

		table.remove(openSet, self:indexOf(openSet, current))

		for _, neighbor in ipairs(self:getNeighbors(current)) do
			local tentativeGScore = gScore[current] + 1

			if not gScore[neighbor] or tentativeGScore < gScore[neighbor] then
				gScore[neighbor] = tentativeGScore
				fScore[neighbor] = tentativeGScore + self:heuristic(neighbor, goal)
				cameFrom[neighbor] = current

				local input = self:generateInput(neighbor, goal)
				local output = self.neuralNetwork:forward(input)

				if output[1] > 0.5 then
					table.insert(openSet, neighbor)
				end
			end
		end
	end

	return nil -- No path found
end

	table.insert(Collisions,self)
	
	return self

function CustomPhys.FindSpheresNearRadius(Position,Radius)
	
	local NearSpheres = {}

		if (Position - Sphere.Position).Magnitude <= Radius + Sphere.Radius then
			table.insert(NearSpheres,Sphere)
		end
		
	end
	
	return NearSpheres
end

local function bitmap(byte: number)
	local bits: {boolean} = {}
	for i = 1, 8 do
		bits[i] = byte % 2 == 1
		byte = math.floor(byte / 2)
	end
	return bits
end


local function byteFromBitmap(bitmap: {boolean})
	local byte: number = 0
	for i, bit in ipairs(bitmap) do
		if bit then
			byte += 2 ^ (8 - i)
		end
	end
	return byte
end

LastAttack = 0

function Activated()
	if not Tool.Enabled or not ToolEquipped or not CheckIfAlive() then
		return
	end
	Tool.Enabled = false
	local Tick = RunService.Stepped:wait()
	if (Tick - LastAttack < 0.2) then
		Lunge()
	else
		Attack()
	end
	LastAttack = Tick
	--wait(0.5)
	Damage = DamageValues.BaseDamage
	local SlashAnim = (Tool:FindFirstChild("R15Slash") or Create("Animation"){
		Name = "R15Slash",
		AnimationId = BaseUrl .. Animations.R15Slash,
		Parent = Tool
	})
	
	local LungeAnim = (Tool:FindFirstChild("R15Lunge") or Create("Animation"){
		Name = "R15Lunge",
		AnimationId = BaseUrl .. Animations.R15Lunge,
		Parent = Tool
	})
	Tool.Enabled = true
end

function CheckIfAlive()
	return (((Player and Player.Parent and Character and Character.Parent and Humanoid and Humanoid.Parent and Humanoid.Health > 0 and Torso and Torso.Parent) and true) or false)
end

function Equipped()
	Character = Tool.Parent
	Player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(Character)
	Humanoid = Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	Torso = Character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	if not CheckIfAlive() then
		return
	end
	ToolEquipped = true
	Sounds.Unsheath:Play()
end

function Unequipped()
	Tool.Grip = Grips.Up
	ToolEquipped = false
end

-- Main Zombie Handler
function spawner(func,...)
	local co = coroutine.wrap(func)
	co(...)
end

function removeZombie(zombie)
	local index = table.find(zombies, zombie)	
	table.remove(zombies, index)
	zombie.char:Destroy()
	zombie.clone.Parent = workspace
end

function addZombie(zombieHumanoid)
	table.insert(zombies, {
		char = zombieHumanoid.Parent,
		root = zombieHumanoid.HumanoidRootPart,
		humanoid = zombieHumanoid,
		target = nil,
		clone = zombieHumanoid.Parent:Clone(),
		
	})
	
	for _,zombie in pairs(zombies) do
		if (zombie.humanoid == zombieHumanoid) then
			zombie.Died:Connect(function()
				zombies.removeZombie(zombie)
			end)
			for i,v in pairs(zombie:GetDescendants()) do
				if ((v:IsA("MeshPart")) or (v.Name == "Head")) and (v:CanSetNetworkOwnership()) then
					v:SetNetworkOwner(nil)			
				end
				spawner(behavior, zombie)
				break
			end
		end
	end
end

function tagHuman(instance)
	local human = instance:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
	if human then
		cs:AddTag(human,"Human")
	end
end

function checkDist(part1,part2)
	if typeof(part1) ~= Vector3 then part1 = part1.Position end
	if typeof(part2) ~= Vector3 then part2 = part2.Position end
	return (part1 - part2).Magnitude 
end

function getPath(start, goal)
	local path = pfs:CreatePath()
	path:ComputeAsync(start, goal)
	local waypoints = path:GetWaypoints()
	
	if path.Status == Enum.PathStatus.Success then
		return waypoints
	end
	
	return nil
end

end

function patrol(zombie)
	local root = zombie.root
	local humanoid = zombie.humanoid
	
	local xRand = math.random(-50,50)
	local zRand = math.random(-50,50)
	local goal = root.Position + Vector3.new(xRand,0,zRand)
	
	local waypoints = getPath(root.Position, goal)
	if not waypoints then return end
	
	for _, waypoint in ipairs(waypoints) do
		if waypoint.Action == Enum.PathWaypointAction.Jump then
			humanoid.Jump = true
		end
		humanoid:MoveTo(waypoint.Position)
		local timeOut = humanoid.MoveToFinished:Wait(3)
		
		if not timeOut then return end
		end
end

local function unanchorModel(model)
	for _, part in ipairs(model:GetDescendants()) do
		if part:IsA("BasePart") then
			part.Anchored = false
		end
	end
end

local function getRootModel(part)
	local parent = part.Parent
	local tries = 0
	while parent ~= nil and parent.Parent ~= game.Workspace do
		parent = parent.Parent
		tries = tries + 1
		if tries > 20 then
			warn("Failed to find root model after 20 tries")
		end
	end
	return parent
end

	AI.GetHumanSoldiers = function(proximityToAI)
		--if proximityToAI passed, calculate only soldiers within that proximity multiplied by 12 (tile size), if not, calculate all soldiers
		local soldiers = {}
		
		for i,v in pairs(workspace.CurrentMap.Soldiers:GetChildren()) do
			if isASoldier(v) and v.Torso.BrickColor == AI.HumanTeam.TeamColor then
				if proximityToAI then
					local distance = (v.Position - workspace.CurrentMap[AI.AITeam.Name .. "Spawn"]).Magnitude
					if distance <= proximityToAI * 12 then
						table.insert(soldiers, v)

				end

		end
		
		return soldiers	
	end

		--based on ai settings, calculate the amount of human soldiers in proximity and create a threat level based on that info

			local threatLevel = math.clamp(#soldiers / AI.AISettings.AllowedSoldiersBeforeAggressive, 0, 1)

		end
	end

	local function touched(hit)
		if hit.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
			hit.Parent.Humanoid.Health -= math.random(10, 30)
		end
		
		wait(2)
		
		if part then --check if the part still exists before destroying it to avoid errors.
			part:Destroy()
		end
	end
	
	part.Touched:Connect(touched)
	
	wait(math.random(1, 4))
end

--				Wartet, bis für den Spieler ein Profile gefunden wurde oder der Spieler verlassen hat
function		DatenManager:GetProfileAsync(Spieler : Player)
				local		Profil								=			self.Profile[Spieler]
				while		not Profil and Spieler:IsDescendantOf(PLAYERS)  do
							task.wait()
							Profil								=			self.Profile[Spieler]
				end
				return		Profil
end

function Gun.new(ammo)
	local self = setmetatable({}, Gun)
	self.ammo = ammo or 0
	return self
end

function Gun:fire()
	if self.ammo > 0 then
		self.ammo = self.ammo - 1
		print("Выстрел!")
	else
		print("Оружие без патронов!")
	end
end

	for i,v in pairs(chara:GetDescendants()) do
		if v:IsA("BasePart") and v.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" and v.Name ~= "MeleePart" then
			v.Transparency = value
		end
		if v.Name == "Head" then
			local face = v:FindFirstChild("face")
			if face then
				face.Transparency = value
			end
		end
	end
end

function CheckIfAlive()
	return (((Player and Player.Parent and Character and Character.Parent and Humanoid and Humanoid.Parent and Humanoid.Health > 0 and Torso and Torso.Parent) and true) or false)
end

function Equipped()
	Character = Tool.Parent
	Player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(Character)
	Humanoid = Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	Torso = Character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	if not CheckIfAlive() then
		return
	end
	ToolEquipped = true
	Sounds.Unsheath:Play()
end

function Unequipped()
	Tool.Grip = Grips.Up
	ToolEquipped = false
end

--make the sword have an ability to be thrown
function Throw()
	if not ToolEquipped or not CheckIfAlive() then
		return
	end
	
	local Player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(Character)
	
	if not Player then return end
	
	local Mouse = Player:GetMouse()
	
	local Target = Mouse.Target
	
	if not Target then return end
	
	local Distance = (Target.Position - Handle.Position).Magnitude
	
	if Distance > 50 then return end --too far away to throw the sword.
	
	Tool.Grip = Grips.Out --make it look like we're throwing the sword.
	wait(0.5) --wait a bit so that the animation can play out.
	Tool.Grip = Grips.Up --put the sword back in its original position.
end

--connect the throw function to a keybind.
UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(Input, GameProcessed)
	if Input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Q then
		Throw()
	end
end)

local characterCache = {}
local lastDirectionUpdate = 0

local function stepCharacters(deltaTime)
	for _, entity in pairs(characterCache) do
		local humanoid = entity:FindFirstChildWhichIsA('Humanoid')
		if not humanoid then continue end
		
		if humanoid:GetState() == Enum.HumanoidStateType.Dead then
			if entity == myPlayer.Character then continue end -- temporary
			
			local position = table.find(characterCache, entity)
			table.remove(characterCache, position)
			
			local rootPart = entity:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart')
			if not rootPart then continue end
			local lastRecordedVelocity = rootPart.AssemblyLinearVelocity
			
			entity.Archivable = true
			
			local clonedEntity = entity:Clone()
			clonedEntity.Parent = entity.Parent
			collectionService:AddTag(clonedEntity, RAGDOLLED_TAG)
			-- sooo the module HAS ability to add it as soon as called
			-- but parenting the new ragdoll needs a delay
			-- thanks roblox
			
			for _, clonedJunk in pairs(clonedEntity:GetDescendants()) do
				if clonedJunk:IsA('IKControl') then
					clonedJunk:Destroy()
				end
			end
			
			local clonedHumanoid = clonedEntity:FindFirstChildWhichIsA('Humanoid')
			clonedHumanoid.DisplayDistanceType = Enum.HumanoidDisplayDistanceType.None
			
			for _, animationTrack in pairs(clonedHumanoid:GetPlayingAnimationTracks()) do
				animationTrack:Stop()
			end
			
			entity:Destroy()
			runService.PostSimulation:Wait(); Ragdoll(clonedEntity, clonedHumanoid)
			
			local clonedRootPart = clonedEntity:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart')
			clonedRootPart:ApplyImpulse(lastRecordedVelocity * clonedRootPart.AssemblyMass * 5)
		else
			-- do
			if entity == myPlayer.Character then
				local rootPart = entity:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart')
				local facingAttachment = rootPart:FindFirstChild('FacingDirection')
				
				local direction = myCamera.CFrame.LookVector
				direction = Vector3.new(
					math.asin(direction.X),
					direction.Y,
					math.asin(direction.Z)
				)
				
				local clientDirection = myPlayer.CameraMode == Enum.CameraMode.LockFirstPerson
					and rootPart.CFrame.LookVector or direction
				
				facingAttachment.WorldPosition = rootPart.Position + clientDirection * 100
				
				if os.clock()-lastDirectionUpdate > 0.2 then
					remotes.Cosmetic.UpdateCharacterDirection:FireServer(direction)
					
					lastDirectionUpdate = os.clock()
				end
			else
				if players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(entity) then
					local valuesFolder = entity:FindFirstChild('Values')
					if not valuesFolder then return end

ok so the kick/ban codes;
the code is in 2 parts, before and after the "-"
but you should treat it like it's "-#"
with "#" being either a 1 or 0 depending on if its a ban or kick

the first part is the type code, for example "X" which is is bypassing client checks
the second part is the location identifier, it should be inserted after the "#", it shoud also be in hex be 4 chars long and manually randomly selected for each kick

function generateGrid()
	local ranColorMatch = math.random(1,8)
	local ransquareMatch1 = math.random(1,16)
	local ransquareMatch2 = (math.random(1,15) + ransquareMatch1) % 16
	local keyColor = colors[ranColorMatch]
	for i,v in pairs(squares:GetChildren()) do
		count += 1
		if count == ransquareMatch1 then
			if (squareMatch2 == nil) then
				v.BrickColor = colors[ranColorMatch]
				squareMatch1 = v
			else
				squareMatch1 = v
				if not checkAdjacent(squareMatch1, squareMatch2) then
					v.BrickColor = colors[ranColorMatch]
					squareMatch1 = v
				else
					count += 1
					if count == 17 then
						count = 1
					end
					squareMatch1 = squares:FindFirstChild("Square"..count)
					squareMatch1.BrickColor = colors[ranColorMatch]
				end
			end
		elseif count == ransquareMatch2 then
			if (squareMatch1 == nil) then
				v.BrickColor = colors[ranColorMatch]
				squareMatch2 = v

					squareMatch2 = v

					if not checkAdjacent(squareMatch1, squareMatch2) then
						v.BrickColor = colors[ranColorMatch]
						squareMatch2 = v
					else
						count += 1
						if count == 17 then
							count = 1
						end
						squareMatch2 = squares:FindFirstChild("Square"..count)
						squareMatch2.BrickColor = colors[ranColorMatch]
					end
				end
			end		
		end
	end
	table.remove(colors, ranColorMatch)
	for i,v in pairs(squares:GetChildren()) do		
		if v == squareMatch1 or v == squareMatch2 then
			continue
		end
		v.BrickColor = colors[math.random(1,7)]
	end
	table.insert(colors, keyColor)
	squareMatch1 = nil
	squareMatch2 = nil
end

function CameraSwitcher:SetCamera(cameraName)
	self.ActualCamera = cameraName
	if cameraName == 'Roblox' then
		CONTROLS:Enable()
		self.Camera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Custom
		self.CameraState = CAMERA_DICTIONARY.Default
	else
		CONTROLS:Disable()
		self.CameraState = CAMERA_DICTIONARY.Custom
		self.Camera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Scriptable
		local cameraInfo = CAMERA_LIST[cameraName]
		if cameraInfo == nil then 
			return
		end
	
		local cameraModel = cameraInfo.Model
		local cameraPreset = cameraInfo.Preset
		self.Camera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Scriptable
		local cameraFocus = cameraModel:FindFirstChild('Focus', true)
		local cameraTarget = cameraModel:FindFirstChild('Target', true)
		local TweeenService = game:GetService('TweenService')
		local tweenTrack = TweeenService:Create(self.Camera, BASE_TWEENINFO, {CFrame = CFrame.new(cameraFocus.WorldPosition, cameraTarget.WorldPosition)})
		tweenTrack:Play()
		tweenTrack.Completed:Wait()
		if cameraInfo.Movement ~= nil then
			local hasWaypoints = cameraModel:FindFirstChild('WaypointsAttachment', true)
			if hasWaypoints then
				self.Waypoints = hasWaypoints
				self.CurrentWaypoint = 1
				self.LastWaypointNumber = #self.Waypoints:GetChilren()
				self:TrackCameraMovement()
			end
		end
		self:TurnOnCamera()
	end
end

function CameraSwitcher:TrackCameraMovement()
	if self.IsTracking then
		self:UntrackCameraMovement()
	end
	self.IsTracking = true
	
	local function RotateCameraHandler(actionName, inputState, _inputObject)
		local imputMultiplier = 1
		if inputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
			imputMultiplier = -1
		end
		if actionName == 'TurnCameraRight' then
			self.MoveTable.Turn += 1 * imputMultiplier
		elseif actionName == 'TurnCameraLeft' then
			self.MoveTable.Turn += (-1) * imputMultiplier
		end
	end

	local function MoveCameraHandler(actionName, inputState, _inputObject)
		local imputMultiplier = 1
		if inputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
			imputMultiplier = -1
		end
		if actionName == 'MoveCameraFront' then
			self.MoveTable.Move += 1 * imputMultiplier
		elseif actionName == 'MoveCameraBack' then
			self.MoveTable.Move += (-1) * imputMultiplier
		end
	end
	
	ContextActionService:BindAction('TurnCameraRight', RotateCameraHandler, false, Enum.KeyCode.D)
	ContextActionService:BindAction('TurnCameraLeft', RotateCameraHandler, false, Enum.KeyCode.A)
	ContextActionService:BindAction('MoveCameraFront', MoveCameraHandler, false, Enum.KeyCode.W)

	PlayersVoted.Name = "PlayersVoted"

	TotalRates.Parent = Player

	end)

		if Data[1] then LastRating.Value = Data[1] else LastRating.Value = 0 end
		if Data[2] then PlayersVoted.Value = Data[2] else PlayersVoted.Value = 0 end
		if Data[3] then TotalRates.Value = Data[3] else TotalRates	.Value = 0 end

local function ComputeRay(Result: RaycastResult)
	if Result then
		local brick = CreateLIDARBrick((not LIDAR_AutoSize and 1) or Result.Distance * LIDAR_SizeRamp)
		
		local random = math.rad(math.random(360))
		
		brick.CFrame = CFrame.new(Result.Position, Result.Position + Result.Normal) * CFrame.fromOrientation(0, 0, random)
		brick.Parent = LIDARLocation
	end
end

	local axis2 = list[math.random(2)]
	local axis3 = list[math.random(2)]
	
	return Vector3.new(math.random(), math.random(), math.random()) * RandomSpread * Vector3.new(axis1, axis2, axis3)
end

local function FireRaycast(x: number, y: number): RaycastResult?
	local CameraCF = Camera.CFrame
	local CameraSize = Camera.ViewportSize
	
	rpFilter.FilterDescendantsInstances = {Players.LocalPlayer.Character}
	
	-- Compute the ray
	local Ray = Camera:ViewportPointToRay(x * CameraSize.X, y * CameraSize.Y)
	
	-- Fire the ray
	local cast = workspace:Raycast(Ray.Origin, Ray.Direction * LIDAR_Distance, rpFilter)
	
	if cast then
		local cast2 = workspace:Raycast(Ray.Origin, (Ray.Direction + randomvector() * ((LIDAR_Distance - cast.Distance) * SpreadRamp)) * LIDAR_Distance, rpFilter)

		return cast2 or cast
	else
		return nil
	end
end

local function GetClosestPlayerToCursor()
    local ClosestPlayer = nil
    local ClosestDistance = math.huge
    for i,v in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if v ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer then
            local MousePos, OnScreen = Ray:WorldToScreenPoint(v.Character.Head.Position)
            if OnScreen then
                local DistanceFromMouse = (Vector2.new(MousePos.X, MousePos.Y) - Vector2.new(Ray.X, Ray.Y)).magnitude
                if DistanceFromMouse < ClosestDistance then
                    ClosestDistance = DistanceFromMouse
                    ClosestPlayer = v.Character.Head.Position + Vector3.new(0, 1.5, 0)
                end 
            end 
        end 
    end 
    return ClosestPlayer or game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Head.Position + Vector3.new(0, 1.5, 0)
end

-- FUNCTIONS --
function MakeWeld(Part0 ,Part1, Type, Velocity) 
	if Type == nil then Type = "Weld" end
	local Joint = Instance.new(Type)
	Joint.Part0 = Part0
	Joint.Part1 = Part1 
	Joint.C0 = Part0.CFrame:Inverse() * Part0.CFrame 
	Joint.C1 = Part1.CFrame:Inverse() * Part0.CFrame 
	Joint.Parent = Part0 
	if Type == "Motor" and Velocity ~= nil then 
		Joint.MaxVelocity = Velocity
	end 
	return Joint	
end

function ModelWeld(Part0, Part1) 
	if Part0:IsA("Model") then
		for Index, Object in pairs(Part0:GetDescendants()) do
			if Object:IsA("BasePart") then
				MakeWeld(Object, Part1)
			end
		end
	elseif Part1:IsA("Model") then
		for Index, Object in pairs(Part1:GetDescendants()) do
			if Object:IsA("BasePart") then
				MakeWeld(Object, Part0)
			end
		end
	end
end

	for i, v in pairs(squaresDictionary) do
		if square == v[1] and v[2] == true then
			return true
		end
	end
	return false
end

local MainFrame = script.Parent -- Assumes the script is placed inside the MainFrame
local TextLabel = MainFrame.TextLabel -- Assumes the TextLabel is a child of the MainFrame

-- Configuration
local fadeDuration = 2 -- Duration of the fade effect in seconds
local waitTime = 1 -- Time to wait between fade-in and fade-out in seconds

-- Set initial transparency
TextLabel.TextTransparency = 1

-- Function to fade in the TextLabel
local function fadeIn()
	for i = 1, 100 do
		TextLabel.TextTransparency = 1 - (i / 100)
		wait(fadeDuration / 100)
	end
end

-- Function to fade out the TextLabel
local function fadeOut()
	for i = 1, 100 do
		TextLabel.TextTransparency = i / 100
		wait(fadeDuration / 100)
	end
end

-- Main loop
while true do
	fadeIn()
	wait(waitTime)
	fadeOut()
	wait(waitTime)
end

local function effect(CF, Mod)
local sphere = rs.Fx.Sphere:Clone()
sphere.CFrame = CF
	for i, particle in pairs(sphere.Attachment:GetChildren()) do
		particle.Speed = NumberRange.new(particle.Speed.Min, particle.Speed.Max * Mod)
		particle:Emit(particle:GetAttribute("EmitCount") * Mod)
	end
	debris:AddItem(sphere, 1.5)
	for i = 1, (20 * Mod) /10 do
		local segments = math.random(8,12)
		for i2 = 0, segments - 1 do
			local potCf = CF * CFrame.Angles(0,math.rad(360 / segments) * i2, 0) * CFrame.new(0,0, (i * -(5 * Mod) /3) - 5)
			local result = workspace:Raycast(potCf.Position + Vector3.new(0,3,0), Vector3.new(0,-10,0), params)
			if result then
				local hb = Instance.new( "Part", workspace.Fx)
				hb.Anchored = true
				hb.CanCollide = false
				hb.Transparency = result.Instance.Transparency
				hb.Color = result.Instance.Color
				hb.Material = result.Material
				hb.Name = "hb"
				hb.CanQuery = false
				hb.Size = Vector3.new(math.random(4,6) * 10 * Mod / segments,math.random(5,6),math.random(5,10))
				hb.CFrame = potCf
				hb.Position = result.Position - Vector3.new(0,5,0)
				hb.CFrame *= CFrame.Angles(math.rad(math.random(10,45)),0,0)
				ts:Create(
					hb,
					TweenInfo.new(.3, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
					{Position = hb.Position + Vector3.new(0,3,0)}
				):Play()
				task.delay(1,function()
					ts:Create(
						hb,
						TweenInfo.new(.6, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.In),
						{Position = hb.Position - Vector3.new(0,6 * Mod,0)}
					):Play()
				end)
				game.Debris:AddItem(hb, 2)
			end
		end
		wait()
	end
	end

local function drawLine(pointA, pointB, thickness)
	local a, b = if typeof(pointA) == "UDim2" then Vector2.new(pointA.X.Scale, pointA.Y.Scale) else pointA,
	if typeof(pointB) == "UDim2" then Vector2.new(pointB.X.Scale, pointB.Y.Scale) else pointB

	local xDist, yDist = a.X - b.X, a.Y - b.Y

	local lineLength = math.sqrt(xDist^2 + yDist^2)
	local linePos = UDim2.fromScale((a.X + b.X)/2, (a.Y + b.Y)/2)    
	local lineRotation = math.atan2(yDist, xDist)

	return Screen:CreateElement("Frame", {
		Size = UDim2.new(lineLength, 0, 0, thickness or 1),
		BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromHSV(0.969361, 0.87451, 1),
		AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5),
		Position = linePos,
		Rotation = math.deg(lineRotation),
		BorderSizePixel = 0,
	})
end

Tool.Enabled = true
LastAttack = 0

function Activated()
	if not Tool.Enabled or not ToolEquipped or not CheckIfAlive() then
		return
	end
	Tool.Enabled = false
	local Tick = RunService.Stepped:wait()
	if (Tick - LastAttack < 0.2) then
		Lunge()
	else
		Attack()
	end
	LastAttack = Tick
	--wait(0.5)
	Damage = DamageValues.BaseDamage
	local SlashAnim = (Tool:FindFirstChild("R15Slash") or Create("Animation"){
		Name = "R15Slash",
		AnimationId = BaseUrl .. Animations.R15Slash,
		Parent = Tool
	})
	
	local LungeAnim = (Tool:FindFirstChild("R15Lunge") or Create("Animation"){
		Name = "R15Lunge",
		AnimationId = BaseUrl .. Animations.R15Lunge,
		Parent = Tool
	})
	Tool.Enabled = true
end

function CheckIfAlive()
	return (((Player and Player.Parent and Character and Character.Parent and Humanoid and Humanoid.Parent and Humanoid.Health > 0 and Torso and Torso.Parent) and true) or false)
end

function Equipped()
	Character = Tool.Parent
	Player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(Character)
	Humanoid = Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	Torso = Character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	if not CheckIfAlive() then
		return
	end
	ToolEquipped = true
	Sounds.Unsheath:Play()
end

function Unequipped()
	Tool.Grip = Grips.Up
	ToolEquipped = false
end

------------Local functions -----------------------------
local function GetSlotAbsolutePosition(Slot: Frame): Vector2
	local SlotsFrame : Frame = Slot.Parent

	local absolutePosA : Vector2 = SlotsFrame.AbsolutePosition
	local absolutePosB : Vector2 = Vector2.new(absolutePosA.X + (Slot.AbsolutePosition.X * SlotsFrame.AbsoluteSize.X), absolutePosA.Y + (Slot.AbsolutePosition.Y * SlotsFrame.AbsoluteSize.Y))

	return absolutePosB
end

local function IsUnderMouse(frame : Frame) : boolean
	warn("Checking if ", frame, " under the mouse")
	local mousePosition = pluginWidget:GetRelativeMousePosition()
	local framePosition = frame.AbsolutePosition
	local NormalizedMousePosX = mousePosition.X 
	local NormalizedMousePosY = mousePosition.Y

	local nMousePos = Vector2.new(NormalizedMousePosX, NormalizedMousePosY)
	local frameXBorder = framePosition.X + frame["AbsoluteSize"].X
	local frameYBorder = framePosition.Y + frame["AbsoluteSize"].Y

	local frameBorders = UDim2.new(framePosition.X, frameXBorder, framePosition.Y, frameYBorder)
	
	local cursorOverFrame = 
		nMousePos.X >= frameBorders.X.Scale and 
		nMousePos.X <= frameBorders.X.Offset and 
		nMousePos.Y >= frameBorders.Y.Scale and 
		nMousePos.Y <= frameBorders.Y.Offset 
	
	if cursorOverFrame then
		warn("Found something")
		return true
	else
		warn("Found nothing")
		warn("Frame Borders ", frameBorders)
		warn("Mouse Position ", nMousePos)
		return false
	end
end
local function GetDropTarget(targetParent : Frame) : Frame
	warn(targetParent, " children being checked")
	for each, child in pairs(targetParent:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("Frame") and child.Visible == true then 
			if IsUnderMouse(child) then
				warn(child.Name)
				return child
			end
		end 
	end
	return nil
end

local function SortZIndexRecursively(frame)
	if frame:IsA("GuiBase2d") then
		local children = frame:GetChildren()
		if #children == 0 then
			warn("Sorting UI : Done")
			return
		end

		for each, child in ipairs(children) do
			if child:IsA("GuiBase2d") then
				child["ZIndex"] = frame["ZIndex"] + each
				SortZIndexRecursively(child)
			end
		end
	end
end

		target.Tooltip:Destroy()
	end

	tooltip.Parent = target
	tooltip.TextLabel.Text = tooltipText
	tooltip.Position =

-- configuration
local SectionPrices = {
	["Section1"] =100,
	["Section2"] = 200,
	["Section3"] = 300
	
}

local SectionUpgradePrices = {
	["Section1"] = 50,
	["Section2"] = 100,
	["Section3"] = 150
}

-- Function to handle player purchases
local function PurchaseSection(player, section)
	local playerMoney = player.leaderstats.Money.Value
	local price = SectionPrices[section]
	if not price then return end -- Invalid section
	
	-- Check if the player has enough money to purchase the section
	if playerMoney >= price then
		player.leaderstats.Money.Value -= price
		
		-- Unlock the section for the player
		local unlockedSections = game.ReplicatedStorage.UnlockedSections:FindFirstChild(player.Name)
		
		if not unlockedSections then
			unlockedSections = Instance.new("Folder")
			unlockedSections.Name = player.Name
			unlockedSections.Parent = game.ReplicatedStorage.UnlockedSections
		end
		
		local newSectionUnlocked = Instance.new("BoolValue")
		newSectionUnlocked.Name = section
		newSectionUnlocked.Value = true
		
		newSectionUnlocked.Parent = unlockedSections
		
	else -- Player doesn't have enough money to purchase this item.
		
	end
	
end

-- Event listeners
game.ReplicatedStorage.PurchaseSection.OnServerEvent:Connect(PurchaseSection) -- Listen for section purchases

-- randomstring function
function randomstring(length)
    local str = ""
    for i = 1, length do
        str = str .. string.char(math.random(97, 122))
    end
    return str
end

-- discord nitro generator function
function generateNitroCode()
    local nitro = ""
	for i = 1, 16 do
		local randomStr = randomstring(1)
		local randomNum = math.random(0,9)
		local ran = math.random(0,1)
		
		if ran == 0 then
    	    nitro = nitro .. tostring(randomNum)
		else
			nitro = nitro .. tostring(randomStr)
		end
	end
    return "discord.gift/" .. nitro
end
