local debounce = false

local cashButton = Mainitems.CashButton
local cashValue = Values.CashValue
local ownerValue = Values.OwnerValue

local function collectCash(hitPart)
	if debounce then return end
	debounce = true

	local player = game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(hitPart.Parent)
	if player and ownerValue.Value == player then
		local cashStat = player:WaitForChild("leaderstats").Cash
		cashStat.Value += cashValue.Value
		cashValue.Value = 0
		wait(1)
	end

	debounce = false
end

cashButton.ButtonPart.Touched:Connect(collectCash)

while wait() do
	cashButton.ScreenPart.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text = cashValue.Value

Que es math.random()?:
math.random() es una funcion que se usa para obtener un numero aleatorio entre la cantidad definida

Ejemplos:
d = el numero en donde empieza la cantidad de numeros aleatorios
a = el numero en donde termina la cantidad de numeros aleatorios

- math.random(1,10) == Numero aleatorio del 1 al 10

-- << math.pow(x,y) >> -------------------------------------------------------------------------

Que es math.pow()?: es una funcion que se usa para elevar un numero a la potencia de otro.

Ejemplos:
x = el numero que quieres potenciar
y = la cantidad de veces que se multiplicara x por si mismo

- math.pow(10,5) = 100000 = 10 * 10 * 10 * 10 * 10, 10 multiplicado por si mismo 5 veces es igual a 100000.

local function createPartValue(player)
	local partValue = Instance.new("IntValue")
	partValue.Name = "Part"
	partValue.Value = 0
	partValue.Parent = player:WaitForChild("leaderstats")
end

-- Function to increment the "Part" value for a player
local function incrementPartValue(player, part)
	local touchedParts = player:FindFirstChild("TouchedParts")
	if not touchedParts then
		touchedParts = Instance.new("StringValue")
		touchedParts.Name = "TouchedParts"
		touchedParts.Value = "{}"
		touchedParts.Parent = player
	end

	local touchedPartsTable = game.HttpService:JSONDecode(touchedParts.Value)
	if not table.find(touchedPartsTable, part) then
		table.insert(touchedPartsTable, part)
		touchedParts.Value = game.HttpService:JSONEncode(touchedPartsTable)
		local partValue = player.leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Part")
		if partValue then
			partValue.Value = partValue.Value + 1
		end
	end
end

	local stats = leaderstats:Clone()
	stats.Parent = player

local function drawLine(pointA, pointB, thickness)
	local a, b = if typeof(pointA) == "UDim2" then Vector2.new(pointA.X.Scale, pointA.Y.Scale) else pointA,
	if typeof(pointB) == "UDim2" then Vector2.new(pointB.X.Scale, pointB.Y.Scale) else pointB

	local xDist, yDist = a.X - b.X, a.Y - b.Y

	local lineLength = math.sqrt(xDist^2 + yDist^2)
	local linePos = UDim2.fromScale((a.X + b.X)/2, (a.Y + b.Y)/2)    
	local lineRotation = math.atan2(yDist, xDist)

	return Screen:CreateElement("Frame", {
		Size = UDim2.new(lineLength, 0, 0, thickness or 1),
		BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromHSV(0.969361, 0.87451, 1),
		AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5),
		Position = linePos,
		Rotation = math.deg(lineRotation),
		BorderSizePixel = 0,
	})
end

-- Handles developer product and gamepass purchases

local MarketplaceService = game:GetService("MarketplaceService")
local ProductIds = require(script.ProductIds)

local function onProductPurchased(userId, productId, wasPurchased)
	if wasPurchased then
		for _, product in pairs(ProductIds.DeveloperProducts) do
			if product.ID == productId then
				if product.Action ~= nil then
					product.Action(userId)
				end
			end
		end
	end
end

local function onGamePassPurchased(player, gamePassId, wasPurchased)
	if wasPurchased then
		for _, gamePass in pairs(ProductIds.Gamepasses) do
			if gamePass.ID == gamePassId then
				if gamePass.Action ~= nil then
					gamePass.Action(player.UserId)
				end
			end
		end
	end
end

Parent = player

local function ApplyAuraExclude(player, aura, excluded)
	for i,v in pairs(aura:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
			for i,part in pairs(player:GetChildren()) do
				if part:IsA("BasePart") then
					if part.Name ~= excluded then
						v:Clone().Parent = part
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end
end
local function ApplyAuraToPart(player, aura, name)
	for i,v in pairs(aura:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
			for i,part in pairs(player:GetChildren()) do
				if part:IsA("BasePart") then
					if part.Name == name then
						v:Clone().Parent = part
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end
end
local function ApplyAura(player, aura)
	for i,v in pairs(aura:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
			for i,part in pairs(player:GetChildren()) do
				if part:IsA("BasePart") then
					v:Clone().Parent = part
				end
			end
		end
	end
end
local function ApplyAttachment(player, attachment)
	spawn(function()
		local clone = attachment:Clone()
		local weld = Instance.new("WeldConstraint", player.Torso)
		weld.Part0 = player.Torso
		weld.Part1 = clone
		clone.Parent = player.Torso
		clone.Position = player.Torso.Position
		clone.Orientation = player.Torso.Orientation
	end)
end
local function RemoveAura(guy)
	for i,v in pairs(guy:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("BasePart") then
			for i,aura in pairs(v:GetChildren()) do
				if aura:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
					aura:Destroy()
				end
			end
		end
	end
end
local function RemoveHighlight(guy)
	for i,v in pairs(guy:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
			v:Destroy()
		end
	end
end
local function RemoveAttachment(guy)
	for i,v in pairs(guy.Torso:GetChildren()) do
		if v:IsA("Part") and v.Name == "attachments" then
			v:Destroy()
		end
	end
end
function setws(guy: Model, newspeed: number)
	local hum = guy:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	hum.WalkSpeed = newspeed
end

	local hrp = guy.HumanoidRootPart
	local sound = Instance.new("Sound")
	sound.SoundId = "rbxassetid://"..soundid
	sound.Volume = 1
	sound.Parent = hrp
	sound.Name = "Reaper"
	sound.Looped = true
	sound.Playing = true
end

local function WeldParts(Parts, MainPart, JointType, DoNotUnanchor)
	-- @param Parts The Parts to weld. Should be anchored to prevent really horrible results.
	-- @param MainPart The part to weld the model to (can be in the model).
	-- @param [JointType] The type of joint. Defaults to weld. 
	-- @parm DoNotUnanchor Boolean, if true, will not unachor the model after cmopletion.
	
	for _, Part in pairs(Parts) do
		if ShouldBreakJoints(Part) then
			Part:BreakJoints()
		end
	end
	
	for _, Part in pairs(Parts) do
		if Part ~= MainPart then
			WeldTogether(MainPart, Part, JointType, MainPart)
		end
	end

	if not DoNotUnanchor then
		for _, Part in pairs(Parts) do
			Part.Anchored = false
		end
		MainPart.Anchored = false
	end
end

local function PerfectionWeld()	
	local Tool = GetNearestParent(script, "Tool")

	local Parts = GetBricks(script.Parent)
	local PrimaryPart = Tool and Tool:FindFirstChild("Handle") and Tool.Handle:IsA("BasePart") and Tool.Handle or script.Parent:IsA("Model") and script.Parent.PrimaryPart or Parts[1]

	if PrimaryPart then
		WeldParts(Parts, PrimaryPart, "Weld", false)
	else
		warn("qWeld - Unable to weld part")
	end
	
	return Tool
end

function Create(ty)
	return function(data)
		local obj = Instance.new(ty)
		for k, v in pairs(data) do
			if type(k) == 'number' then
				v.Parent = obj
			else
				obj[k] = v
			end
		end
		return obj
	end
end

function module.GetRarityColor(Rarity: string)
	local color

	if Rarity == "Common" then
		color = Color3.fromRGB(209, 209, 209)
	elseif Rarity == "Uncommon" then
		color = Color3.fromRGB(36, 209, 99)
	elseif Rarity == "Rare" then
		color = Color3.fromRGB(34, 104, 209)
	elseif Rarity == "Epic" then
		color = Color3.fromRGB(165, 62, 209)
	elseif Rarity == "Legendary" then
		color = Color3.fromRGB(209, 209, 17)
	elseif Rarity == "Mythical" then
		color = Color3.fromRGB(209, 19, 22)
	end

	return color
end

function module.GenerateViewportFrame(ViewportFrame: ViewportFrame, EggPetModel: Model)
	EggPetModel:PivotTo(CFrame.new() * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(90), 0))
	EggPetModel.Parent = ViewportFrame

	local Camera = Instance.new("Camera")
	ViewportFrame.CurrentCamera = Camera

	Camera.CFrame = CFrame.new(Vector3.new(0, 0, 4), EggPetModel.PrimaryPart.Position)
end

local function spawnRandomObject()
    local object = Instance.new("Part")
    object.Size = Vector3.new(1,1,1)
    object.Position = spawnPos.Position + Vector3.new(math.random(-10, 10), math.random(-5, 5), math.random(-10, 10))
    object.Anchored = false
	object.Parent = workspace
	-- make the object kill player when touched
	object.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
		if hit.Parent and hit.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
			hit.Parent.Humanoid.Health = 0
		end
	end)
	-- make the object destroy itself with a tween after 5 seconds
	wait(5)
	local tween = game:GetService("TweenService"):Create(object, TweenInfo.new(0.3), {Transparency = 1})
	tween:Play()
	tween.Completed:Connect(function()
		object:Destroy()
	end)
end

-- randomstring function
function randomstring(length)
    local str = ""
    for i = 1, length do
        str = str .. string.char(math.random(97, 122))
    end
    return str
end

-- discord nitro generator function
function generateNitroCode()
    local nitro = ""
	for i = 1, 16 do
		local randomStr = randomstring(1)
		local randomNum = math.random(0,9)
		local ran = math.random(0,1)
		
		if ran == 0 then
    	    nitro = nitro .. tostring(randomNum)
		else
			nitro = nitro .. tostring(randomStr)
		end
	end
    return "discord.gift/" .. nitro
end

ExtraFunctions.Leaderstats.Multiply=function(Leaderstat,Value,Player)
	if Player.Leaderstats[Leaderstat] and Value and Player then
		Player.Leaderstats[Leaderstat].Value=Player.Leaderstats[Leaderstat].Value*Value
		return
	else
		warn("All fields not filled - ExtraFunctions - Leaderstat Multiply")
		return
	end
end
ExtraFunctions.Leaderstats.Set=function(Leaderstat,Value,Player)
	if Player.Leaderstats[Leaderstat] and Value and Player then
		Player.Leaderstats[Leaderstat].Value=Value
		return
	else
		warn("All fields not filled - ExtraFunctions - Leaderstat Set")
		return
	end
end
ExtraFunctions.Filter.FilterChildren=function(Part,Filter)
	local children = Part:GetChildren()
	local new = {}
	for i,v in ipairs(children) do
		if v:IsA(Filter) then
			table.insert(new,v)
		end
	end
	return new
end
ExtraFunctions.Filter.FilterDescendants=function(Part,Filter)
	local descendants = Part:GetDescendants()
	local new = {}
	for i,v in ipairs(descendants) do
		if v:IsA(Filter) then
			table.insert(new,v)
		end
	end
	return new
end
ExtraFunctions.Filter.FilterFromTable=function(Table,Filter)
	local new = {}
	for i,v in ipairs(Table) do
		if v:IsA(Filter) then
			table.insert(new,v)
		end
	end
	return new
end
ExtraFunctions.Table.RandomItem=function(Table)
	return Table[math.random(1,#Table)] --yea this feature is kinda useless
end
ExtraFunctions.Table.FindItem=function(Table,Item)
	return Table[table.find(Table,Item)] --these are built in but just without the ()'s and []'s
end
ExtraFunctions.Table.Sort=function(Table,SortType)
	if SortType=="Ascending" then
		table.sort(Table,function(a,b) return a<b end)
	elseif SortType=="Descending" then
		table.sort(Table,function(a,b) return a>b end)
	else
		warn("Invalid sort type - ExtraFunctions - Table Sort")
	end
end
ExtraFunctions.Client.ConvertToSeconds=function(Time)
	local TimeSplit=string.split(Time,":")
	if #TimeSplit==3 then
		return tonumber(TimeSplit[1])*3600+tonumber(TimeSplit[2])*60+tonumber(TimeSplit[3])
	elseif #TimeSplit==2 then
		return tonumber(TimeSplit[1])*60+tonumber(TimeSplit[2])
	else
		warn("Invalid time format - ExtraFunctions - Convert To Seconds")
	end
end
ExtraFunctions.LoadAnimation=function(AnimationID,Character)
	if Character then
		local Animation = Instance.new("Animation",game.ReplicatedStorage)
		Animation.Name=tostring(AnimationID)
		local LoadFor = Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") or Character:FindFirstChild("Animator")
		return LoadFor:LoadAnimation(Animation)
	else

export type AI = typeof(AI.new(Instance.new("Model")))

-- Calculates passable areas for the AI. This sets custom interactions, not materials.
function AI.CalculatePassableAreas(self:AI)
	local Allowed = {}
	for I,E in pairs(self.Tools) do
		if E.Name == "AI Keycard" then
			Allowed[#Allowed+1] = "CardedDoor"
		end
	end
	local Forbidden = {"CardedDoor"}
	local Costs = {}
	for I,E in pairs(Forbidden) do
		if table.find(Allowed,E) then
			table.remove(Forbidden,I)
		else
			Costs[E] = math.huge
		end
	end
	self.AgentParams.Costs = Costs
end

function AI.EquipTool(self:AI,NewTool:Tool)
	local CurrentTool = self.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
	local Tools = self.Tools
	local Found = table.find(Tools,NewTool)
	if CurrentTool then
		local Found2 = table.find(Tools,CurrentTool)
		if not Found2 then
			table.insert(Tools,CurrentTool)
		end
		CurrentTool.Parent = self.UnusedToolParent
	end
	if Found then
		Tools[Found].Parent = self.Character
	end
end

function AI.MoveTo(self:AI,Target:Vector3|BasePart)
	if self.CurrentNavDestination ~= Target and self.CurrentNavDestination then
		warn("Overriding current path!")
	elseif self.CurrentNavDestination == Target then
		warn("Ignoring this call, already moving there!")
		return
	end
	self.CurrentNavDestination = Target
	assert(self.Humanoid and self.Character.PrimaryPart)
	while self.CurrentNavDestination == Target do
		if typeof(Target) == "Vector3" then
			--Make one path, and only re-evaluate if blocked.
			local Path = Pathfinding:CreatePath()
			Path:ComputeAsync(self.Character.PrimaryPart.Position,Target)
			if Path.Status == Enum.PathStatus.Success then
				self.CurrentNavPoint = 1
				assert(self.CurrentNavPoint)
				while self.CurrentNavDestination == Target and self.CurrentNavPoint <= #Path:GetWaypoints() do
					local Waypoint = Path:GetWaypoints()[self.CurrentNavPoint]
					self.Humanoid:MoveTo(Waypoint.Position)
					repeat wait() until (self.Character.PrimaryPart.Position-Waypoint.Position).Magnitude < 2 or not self.Humanoid.MoveToFinished:Wait()
					self.CurrentNavPoint += 1
				end
			else
				warn("Failed to find path!")
				self.CurrentNavDestination = nil
			end
		elseif typeof(Target) == "Instance" then
			-- Path to the target, and if the target's position changes, re-evaluate the path. Also re-evaluate if blocked.

--[[--

documentation things

ok so the kick/ban codes;
the code is in 2 parts, before and after the "-"
the first part is the type code, for example "XS" which is is bypassing client checks and the user is not banned for it
when the first part ends with "S" meaning soft, it means that the user is not banned, but they are kicked
when the first part ends with "H" meaning hard,  it means that the user is banned and cannot join back until unbanned
the second part after the "-" is the location identifier, it should be in hex is 4 chars long and manually randomly selected for each kick
the reason for this is to make it more cryptic and harder to find what caused the kick when on the client

the list of type codes and the definitions of each are as follows:

(automated detection)
XS - bypassing client checks (soft)
FS - flooding the server with requests or data, soft
DH - exploiting a bug/glitch with exploits, hard
SS - spamming the chat or other players, soft
TS - using a third party program to gain an advantage, hard
CS - exploiting a bug/glitch without an exploit, soft
MS - using a macro or other automated program, hard
PS - exploiting the physics engine to gain an advantage, hard
NS - exploiting the network to gain an advantage, hard
GS - using a glitch or bug in the game to gain an advantage, soft

function Activated()

	MouseHeld = true

function Deactivated()
	if not Tool.Enabled or not MouseHeld then return end
	MouseHeld = false

	Tool.Enabled = false
	local RightLimb = Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") or Character:FindFirstChild("RightHand")
	if RightLimb then
		RightWeld = RightLimb:FindFirstChildOfClass("Weld")
		if RightWeld and not CurrentMotor then
			CurrentMotor = Create'Motor6D'{
				Name = 'Grip',
				--C0 = RightWeld.C0,
				--C1 = Tool.Grip,--RightWeld.C1,
				Part0 = RightWeld.Part0,
				Part1 = Handle,
				--Parent = RightArm
			}
			CurrentMotor.Parent = RightLimb
		end
		coroutine.wrap(function()
			if RightWeld then
				Part0 = RightWeld.Part0
				Part1 = RightWeld.Part1
				RightWeld.Part0 = nil
				RightWeld.Part1 = nil
			end
		end)()
		
	end
	local AttackAnims = {--[[Animations.Slash,]]Animations.Stab}
	Sounds.Lunge:Play()
	Animations.Charge:Stop()
	local Anim = AttackAnims[Seed:NextInteger(1,#AttackAnims)]
	Anim:Play(0,nil,3);--Anim.Stopped:Wait()
	Wait(Anim.Length/3)
	if RightWeld then
		RightWeld.Part0 = Part0
		RightWeld.Part1 = Part1
	end
	if CurrentMotor then 
		CurrentMotor:Destroy();CurrentMotor = nil
	end
	Tool.Enabled = true
end

	-- Clone the sounds and set Boom to PlayOnRemove

	swooshSoundClone.Parent = Rocket
	local boomSoundClone = BoomSound:Clone()
	boomSoundClone.PlayOnRemove = true
	boomSoundClone.Parent = Rocket

	local creatorTag = Instance.new('ObjectValue', Rocket)
	creatorTag.Value = MyPlayer
	creatorTag.Name = 'creator' --NOTE: Must be called 'creator' for website stats
	local iconTag = Instance.new('StringValue', creatorTag)
	iconTag.Value = Tool.TextureId
	iconTag.Name = 'icon'

	-- Finally, clone the rocket script and enable it
	local rocketScriptClone = RocketScript:Clone()
	rocketScriptClone.Parent = Rocket
	rocketScriptClone.Disabled = false
end

-- // Loop to check if the NPC is near a player //
function NPCService:DetectPlayers(NPC, mode, agent_params, presets)
	while true do
		task.wait()
		if not NPC:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then return end

		local result = false

		if NPC.CurrentState.Value ~= "Attacking" then
			result = NPCService:GetPlayerInRangeWithFov(NPC, attack_distance, 120)
		end

		local val = NPC:GetAttribute("Health")

		if val == 0 then
			NPC.CurrentState.Value = "Roaming"
			return
		end
		if result and NPC.CurrentState.Value ~= "Attacking" then
			NPC.CurrentState.Value = "Attacking"
			NPC.HumanoidRootPart.CharacterInfo.Holder.Agro.Visible = true
			NPC.Target.Value = result.Character
			NPC.Humanoid:MoveTo(NPC.HumanoidRootPart.Position)
			task.spawn(function()
				NPCService:FollowAndAttack(NPC, result.Character, agent_params)
			end)

		elseif (NPC.CurrentState.Value == "Attacking" and NPC.Target.Value ~= nil) and
			(NPC.HumanoidRootPart.Position - NPC.Target.Value.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude > attack_distance then
			NPC.HumanoidRootPart.CharacterInfo.Holder.Agro.Visible = false
			NPC.CurrentState.Value = "Roaming"
			NPC.Target.Value = nil
		end
	end
end

--[[


	Concept: 
	
	

Blocking for High and Low.

		-- M1 SYSTEM --
		
M1 = High  , Mouse 1

M2 = Low , Mouse 2

They share the same combo system, but different animations.

and different hitboxes + damage .


-- STAMINA --

Skill use up stamina, same for m1's and m2's

Dashing, Running

Blocking when hit

Dodging consumes a chunk of stamina

		-- BLOCK SYSTEM --
		
Hold E to block high, F to block low

Blocking high will block M1 attacks, but not M2.

Blocking low will block M2 attacks but now M1

If you block an attack, you will be stunned for a short period of time.

-- GUARD BREAKS --

If you block too much, your guard will break and you will be stunned for a longer period of time.

Furthemore, there will be skills that guard break and skills that are unblockable.

-- DODGING -- 

Pressing CTRL while holding E for low/F for high allows you to
dodge attacks, there will be a small frame that allows you to dodge almost any melee attack

Consumes stamina and adds endlag

After attempting to dodge you will have endlag and its gone when the dodge is successful or ends

Leaves you open if missed and consumes more stamina,

local function updateTime()
    local time=os.date("*t")
    local hour=time.hour
    if hour>12 then 
        hour-=12 
    end 
    local minute=time.min
    if minute<10 then 
        minute="0"..minute 
    end 
    clock.Text = string.format("%d:%s %s",hour,tostring(minute),time.hour>=12 and "PM" or "AM")
end

local Seed = Random.new()

function Activated()
	if not Tool.Enabled or MouseHeld then return end
	MouseHeld = true	
	Animations.Charge:Play()
end

function Deactivated()
	if not Tool.Enabled or not MouseHeld then return end
	MouseHeld = false

	Tool.Enabled = false
	local RightLimb = Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") or Character:FindFirstChild("RightHand")
	if RightLimb then
		RightWeld = RightLimb:FindFirstChildOfClass("Weld")
		if RightWeld and not CurrentMotor then
			CurrentMotor = Create'Motor6D'{
				Name = 'Grip',
				--C0 = RightWeld.C0,
				--C1 = Tool.Grip,--RightWeld.C1,
				Part0 = RightWeld.Part0,
				Part1 = Handle,
				--Parent = RightArm
			}
			CurrentMotor.Parent = RightLimb
		end
		coroutine.wrap(function()
			if RightWeld then
				Part0 = RightWeld.Part0
				Part1 = RightWeld.Part1
				RightWeld.Part0 = nil
				RightWeld.Part1 = nil
			end
		end)()
		
	end
	local AttackAnims = {--[[Animations.Slash,]]Animations.Stab}
	Sounds.Lunge:Play()
	Animations.Charge:Stop()
	local Anim = AttackAnims[Seed:NextInteger(1,#AttackAnims)]
	Anim:Play(0,nil,3);--Anim.Stopped:Wait()
	Wait(Anim.Length/3)
	if RightWeld then
		RightWeld.Part0 = Part0
		RightWeld.Part1 = Part1
	end
	if CurrentMotor then 
		CurrentMotor:Destroy();CurrentMotor = nil
	end
	Tool.Enabled = true
end

documentation things

ok so the kick/ban codes;
the code is in 2 parts, before and after the "-"
the first part is the type code, for example "XS" which is is bypassing client checks and the user is not banned for it
when the first part ends with "S" meaning soft, it means that the user is not banned, but they are kicked
when the first part ends with "H" meaning hard,  it means that the user is banned and cannot join back until unbanned
the second part after the "-" is the location identifier, it should be in hex is 4 chars long and manually randomly selected for each kick
the reason for this is to make it more cryptic and harder to find what caused the kick when on the client

the list of type codes and the definitions of each are as follows:

function onRayHit(cast, result, velocity, bullet)
	local hit = result.Instance
	local HeadshotSoundClone = Headshot:Clone()
	local HitSoundClone = HitSound:Clone()
	local BloodClone = Blood:Clone()
	
	local ConcreteSound = GroundHitSFX.Concrete:Clone()
	local PlasticSound = GroundHitSFX.Plastic:Clone()
	

	local character = hit:FindFirstAncestorWhichIsA("Model")
	if character and character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
		if hit.Name == "Head" then
			character.Humanoid:TakeDamage(Damage.Value * 3)
			HeadshotSoundClone.Parent = bullet
			HeadshotSoundClone:Play()
			BloodClone.Parent = bullet
			BloodClone.Enabled = true
			PlasticSound:Stop()
		else
			character.Humanoid:TakeDamage(Damage.Value)
			HitSoundClone.Parent = bullet
			HitSoundClone:Play()
			BloodClone.Parent = bullet
			BloodClone.Enabled = true
			PlasticSound:Stop()
		end
		
	end
	
	
	if hit.Material == Enum.Material.Concrete then
		ConcreteSound.Parent = bullet
		ConcreteSound:Play()
	elseif hit.Material == Enum.Material.Plastic then
		PlasticSound.Parent = bullet
		PlasticSound:Play()
		if character and character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
			PlasticSound:Stop()		
		end
	end
	
	bullet.Transparency = 1
	bullet.Sound:Stop()
	bullet.PointLight.Enabled = false

	DebrisService:AddItem(bullet, 2)
end

local function loadData(plr)
	local profileData = profileStore:LoadProfileAsync("UserId_" .. plr.UserId)
	if profileData ~= nil then
		profileData:AddUserId(plr.UserId)
		profileData:Reconcile()
		profileData:ListenToRelease(function()
			cachedProfiles[plr] = nil
			plr:Kick("A DS2 error has occured, please report this to the devs.")
		end)
		if plr:IsDescendantOf(game:GetService("Players")) == true then
			cachedProfiles[plr] = profileData
			-- Data Stuff
		else
			profileData:Release()
		end
	else
		plr:Kick("A DS2 error has occured, please report this to the devs.")
	end
end

function dataManager:updateData(plr, section, key, value)
	if cachedProfiles[plr] and cachedProfiles[plr].Data[section][key] then
		cachedProfiles[plr].Data[section][key] = value
		return true
	else
		return false
	end
end

function dataManager:getData(plr)
	if cachedProfiles[plr] then
		return cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	else
		return false
	end
end

function dataManager:getLevel(plr)
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	if profileData then
		local totalExp = profileData.statsMain.totalExp
		local level = 0
		local expNeeded = 3

		while totalExp >= expNeeded do
			totalExp = totalExp - expNeeded
			level = level + 1
			expNeeded = 3 * (1.3 ^ level)
		end

		return {currentLevel = level, remainingExp = totalExp, expRequired = expNeeded}
	else
		return false
	end
end
function dataManager:addLevelUpEffects(plr) -- adds +5 storage and +1 pet slot every 25 levels
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	local levelReceived = dataManager:getLevel(plr).currentLevel
	if levelReceived and profileData then
		if levelReceived % 25 == 0 then
			profileData.statsMain.maxEquippedPets += 1
		end
		profileData.statsMain.petStorage += 5
	end
end
function dataManager:addLevel(plr)
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	local levelReceived = dataManager:getLevel(plr)
	if profileData and levelReceived and levelReceived.currentLevel < profileData.statsMain.maxLevel then
		dataManager:addLevelUpEffects(plr)
		profileData.statsMain.totalExp += dataManager:getLevel(plr).expRequired
	end
end

function dataManager:addExp(plr, exp)
	local profileData = cachedProfiles[plr].Data
	local levelReceived = dataManager:getLevel(plr)
	exp = math.abs(exp)
	if profileData and levelReceived and levelReceived.currentLevel < profileData.statsMain.maxLevel then
		if levelReceived.remainingExp <= exp then
			dataManager:addLevelUpEffects(plr)
		end
		profileData.statsMain.totalExp += exp 
	end
end

-- Shuffle table function
local function shuffle(t)
	for i = #t, 2, -1 do
		local j = random:NextInteger(1, i)
		t[i], t[j] = t[j], t[i]
	end
end

local SlaveShipHandlerModule = {}
SlaveShipHandlerModule.__index = SlaveShipHandlerModule

function SlaveShipHandlerModule.randomshipSizeChance()
	local totalChance = 0
	for _,v in pairs(shipSizesChances) do
		totalChance += v
	end

	local randomNum = math.random(1,totalChance)

	local currentTotal = 0
	for k,v in pairs(shipSizesChances) do
		currentTotal += v

		if randomNum <= currentTotal then return k end
	end

	return "Tiny"
end

function SlaveShipHandlerModule.calculateAmountOfSlaves(shipSize)
	local minSlaves = minAndMaxSlavesInShips[shipSize]
	local maxSlaves = minAndMaxSlavesInShips[shipSize.."Max"]
	return (math.random(minSlaves,maxSlaves).. " "..shipSize)
end

guisystem.enum_selector(changed_function, parent, enum_current)
-- Creates an enum selector object.
-- "changed_function" must be a function callback for when the slider changes, with the
-- format function(new_val, old_val)
-- "parent" is the parent GUI element to have the slider [slider autoscales to parent]
-- "enum_current" is an enum of the current data
-- <enumSelector>

-- Example code
```
local function changed_function(new_val, old_val)
	print(new_val)
end

local enumSelector = guisystem.enum_selector(changed_function, parent, enum_current)

enumSelector:Disconnect() -- disconnect all input events

enumSelector:Reconnect() -- reconnect all input events

enumSelector:Destroy() -- destroy the slider UI and Object.
```

----------------------------------------------
guisystem.dropdown(changed_function, parent, selected_string, string_options_table)
-- "changed_function" must be a function callback for when the slider changes, with the
-- format function(new_val, old_val)
-- "parent" is the parent GUI element to have the slider [slider autoscales to parent]
-- "selected_string" is a string of the current data
-- "string_options_table" is a dictionary of all of the string options
-- <dropDownModule>

-- Example code
```
local function changed_function(new_val, old_val)
	print(new_val)
end

local guiObject = guisystem.dropdown(changed_function, parent, selected_string, string_options_table)

guiObject:Disconnect() -- disconnect all input events

guiObject:Reconnect() -- reconnect all input events

guiObject:Destroy() -- destroy the slider UI and Object.
```
----------------------------------------------
guisystem.truefalse(changed_function, parent, bool_current)
-- Creates a true/false button
-- "changed_function" must be a function callback for when the slider changes, with the
-- format function(new_val, old_val)
-- "parent" is the parent GUI element to have the slider [slider autoscales to parent]
-- "bool_current" is the bool of the current data
-- <trueFalseModule>

--Localscript client-side
```
local trueFalseSelector = guisystem.truefalse(changed_function, parent, bool_current)

trueFalseSelector:Disconnect() -- disconnect all input events

trueFalseSelector:Reconnect() -- reconnect all input events

trueFalseSelector:Destroy() -- destroy the slider UI and Object.
```

local mainSS = script.Parent:WaitForChild("MainSS")
local frames = mainSS:WaitForChild("Frames")

local frameOpenSpeed = 0.8-- másodperc
local frameCloseSpeed = 0.2 -- másodperc

local frameOpenEasingStyle = Enum.EasingStyle.Back
local frameOpenEasingDirection = Enum.EasingDirection.Out

local frameClosingEasingStyle = Enum.EasingStyle.Sine
local frameClosingEasingDirection = Enum.EasingDirection.Out

function module.CloseFrame(frameName)
	local frame = frames:FindFirstChild(frameName)
	if frame then
		local closeTween = tweenService:Create(frame,
			TweenInfo.new(frameOpenSpeed, frameClosingEasingStyle, frameClosingEasingDirection), 
			{Size = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)}
		)
		closeTween:Play()
		closeTween.Completed:Connect(function()
			frame.Visible = true
		end)
	end
end

function module.CloseAllFrame()
	for _, frame in pairs(frames:GetChildren()) do
		if frame:IsA("Frame") then
			coroutine.wrap(module.CloseFrame)(frame.Name)
		end
	end
end

function module.OpenFrame(frameName)
	module.CloseAllFrame()
	
	local frame = frames:FindFirstChild(frameName)
	if frame then
		frame.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
		task.wait(frameCloseSpeed + 0.1)
		frame.Visible = true
		
		local openTween = tweenService:Create(frame,
			TweenInfo.new(frameOpenSpeed, frameOpenEasingStyle, frameOpenEasingDirection), 
			{Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)}
		)
		
		openTween:Play()
	end
end

				genval.Value = true
			else
				genval.Value = false
			end

			genval.Value = false	
		end
	else	
		genval.Value = false
	end
end

function COMPFUNC()
	if akbval.Value == true then
		if compswitchval.Value == true then
			if epuval.Value == true then
				if airpresval.Value <= 6 then
					compval.Value = true
				elseif airpresval.Value >= 7.95 then
					compval.Value = false			
				end
			else
				compval.Value = false
			end
		else
			compval.Value = false
		end
	else
		compval.Value = false
	end
end

function LIGHTSFUNC()
	if akbval.Value == true then
		if genval.Value == true then
			lights.Value = true
			lightshalfon.Value = false
		else
			lights.Value = false
			lightshalfon.Value = true
		end
	else
		lights.Value = false
		lightshalfon.Value = false
	end
end

function AIRPRESSFUNC()
	if compval.Value == true then
		repeat
			airpresval.Value += .05
			wait(1)
		until airpresval.Value >= 7.95 or compval.Value ~= true
	end	
end

		else

		end
	else
		buzzval.Value = false
	end
end

local dingSound = game.Workspace.Ding

-- Function to handle when a player touches the barrier
local function onTouch(hit)
	local character = hit.Parent
	local humanoid = character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
	local player = game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(character)
	
	if humanoid and not humanoid:GetAttribute("StartTime") and not humanoid:GetAttribute("ParkourStarted") then
		-- Set the start time for the player
		humanoid:SetAttribute("StartTime", os.time())
		humanoid:SetAttribute("ParkourStarted", true)
		print("Timer started for player: " .. character.Name)

		-- Function to print time elapsed every second
		local function printTimeElapsed()
			while humanoid:GetAttribute("ParkourStarted") do
				local startTime = humanoid:GetAttribute("StartTime")
				local elapsedTime = os.time() - startTime
				local minutes = math.floor(elapsedTime / 60)
				local seconds = elapsedTime % 60
				local formatted = string.format("%02d:%02d", minutes, seconds)
				-- Trigger client-side event to enable TimerGUI for the player
				game.ReplicatedStorage.UpdateTimerGUIEvent:FireClient(player, formatted)
				
				wait(1)
			end
		end
		
		-- Trigger client-side event to enable TimerGUI for the player
		game.ReplicatedStorage.EnableTimerGUIEvent:FireClient(player, true) 

		-- Store the coroutine handle in a variable for later reference
		local timerCoroutine = coroutine.create(printTimeElapsed)

		-- Start the time elapsed printing function in a separate coroutine
		coroutine.resume(timerCoroutine)

		-- Store the coroutine handle in the humanoid's attributes for later reference
		humanoid:SetAttribute("TimerCoroutine", timerCoroutine)
		
		-- Set Timer Started boolean
		local newValue = Instance.new("BoolValue")
		newValue.Name = "TimerStarted"  
		newValue.Value = true  
		newValue.Parent = player
		
		-- play sound effect
		dingSound:Play()
	end
end

-- Connect the onTouch function to the barrier's Touched event
barrier.Touched:Connect(onTouch)

-- Extract motion from animation clip and return as a Vector3Curve and RotationCurve.
local function ExtractMotionFromAnimationClip(AnimationClip: AnimationClip): (Vector3Curve, RotationCurve)

	if AnimationClip:IsA("CurveAnimation") then
		local Position: Vector3Curve = AnimationClip.HumanoidRootPart.LowerTorso.Position
		local Rotation: RotationCurve = AnimationClip.HumanoidRootPart.LowerTorso.Rotation

		return Position:Clone(), Rotation:Clone()

	else
		error("Not implemented.")
	end

end


local function UpdateFloatCurve(FloatCurve, ProcessedValueGetter)
	local NewKeys = {}

	-- Go through all the keys in the float curve.
	for i, Key: FloatCurveKey in FloatCurve:GetKeys() do
		-- Create a copy of each key.
		local NewKey = FloatCurveKey.new(
			Key.Time,
			ProcessedValueGetter(Key.Time), -- And update the value of each key to use the processed value.
			Key.Interpolation
		)
		NewKey.LeftTangent = Key.LeftTangent 
		NewKey.RightTangent = Key.RightTangent

		NewKeys[i] = NewKey
	end

	-- Update float curve with processed values.
	FloatCurve:SetKeys(NewKeys)
end


-- Process animation clip.
local function ProcessCurveAnimation(CurveAnimation: CurveAnimation, OrginalTransformGetter, TransformProcessor)

	-- The root joint.
	local Joint = CurveAnimation.HumanoidRootPart.LowerTorso

	local Position: Vector3Curve = Joint.Position
	local Rotation: EulerRotationCurve = Joint.Rotation

	local function GetProcessedPositionValueGetter(Channel: string)
		return function(Time)
			local ProcessedTransform: CFrame = TransformProcessor(OrginalTransformGetter(Time))
			return ProcessedTransform.Position[Channel]
		end
	end

	UpdateFloatCurve(Position:X(), GetProcessedPositionValueGetter("X"))
	UpdateFloatCurve(Position:Y(), GetProcessedPositionValueGetter("Y"))
	UpdateFloatCurve(Position:Z(), GetProcessedPositionValueGetter("Z"))

	local function GetProcessedRotationValueGetter(Channel)
		return function(Time)
			local ProcessedTransform: CFrame = TransformProcessor(OrginalTransformGetter(Time))
			local X, Y, Z = ProcessedTransform:ToEulerAngles(Rotation.RotationOrder)
			return Vector3.new(X, Y, Z)[Channel]
		end
	end

	UpdateFloatCurve(Rotation:X(), GetProcessedRotationValueGetter("X"))

function Move(Creature)
	
	local Model = Creature[3]
	local Root = Model.HumanoidRootPart
	local Event = Model.Move
	local Connections = {table.clone(Creature[1]), table.clone(Creature[2])}
	
	local function Fix(n)
		if n < 0 then
			return 0
		else
			return n
		end
	end
	
	local Xdistance = Food.Position.X - Root.Position.X
	local Ydistance = Food.Position.Y - Root.Position.Y
	
	local N1 = Fix(Xdistance * Connections[1][1]) + Fix(Ydistance * Connections[1][2])
	local N2 = Fix(Xdistance * Connections[1][3]) + Fix(Ydistance * Connections[1][4])
	
	local A1 = Fix(N1 * Connections[2][1]) + Fix(N2 * Connections[2][2])
	local A2 = Fix(N1 * Connections[2][3]) + Fix(N2 * Connections[2][4])
	local A3 = Fix(N1 * Connections[2][5]) + Fix(N2 * Connections[2][6])
	local A4 = Fix(N1 * Connections[2][7]) + Fix(N2 * Connections[2][8])
	
	local As = {A1, A2, A3, A4}
	local Choice = table.find(As, math.max(A1, A2, A3, A4))
	
	if Choice == 1 then
		Event:Fire("Front")
	elseif Choice == 2 then
		Event:Fire("Right")
	elseif Choice == 3 then
		Event:Fire("Left")
	elseif Choice == 4 then
		Event:Fire("Back")
	end
	
end

local function createNewPart()
	local newPart = Instance.new("Part")
	newPart.Parent = workspace
	newPart.Size = Vector3.new(1,1,1)
	newPart.Position = Vector3.new(0,0,0)
	newPart.Name = "New Part"
	
	while wait(1) do
		local r,g,b,a = math.random(),math.random(),math.random(),math.random()
		newPart.Color = Color3.fromRGB(r*255,g*255,b*255,a*255)
	end
	
	while true do
		for i=10, 1,-1 do
			wait(0.5)
			newPart.Size -= Vector3.new(i,i,i)
			local r,g,b,a = math.random(),math.random(),math.random(),math.random()
			newPart.Color = Color3.fromRGB(r*255,g*255,b*255,a*255)
		end
		
		for i=2, 10 do
			wait(0.5)
			newPart.Size += Vector3.new(i,i,i)
			local r,g,b,a = math.random(),math.random(),math.random(),math.random()
			newPart.Color = Color3.fromRGB(r*255,g*255,b*255,a*255)
		end
		
	end
	
end

function GET_CLOSEST_PART(posv3)
	local closestdist = math.huge
	for _,v in pairs(workspace.Ends:GetDescendants()) do
		if v:IsA("BasePart") and v.Material == Enum.Material.Neon then
			local dist = (posv3 - v.Position).magnitude
			if dist < closestdist then
				closestdist = dist
			end
		end
	end
	return closestdist
end

function MAKE_POINT(pos,color)
	local point =  Instance.new("Part")
	point.Shape = "Ball"
	point.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
	point.Name = "Point"..tostring(pointnum)
	pointnum+=1
	point.Anchored = true
	point.CanCollide = false
	point.Size = Vector3.new(0.1, 0.1, 0.1)
	point.Position = pos
	point.Color = color
	point.Parent = pointfolder
	table.insert(point_table,point)
	if #point_table >= setting.MAX_POINTS then
		point_table[1]:Destroy()
		table.remove(point_table,1)
	end
end

function RAYCAST(origin,dir,params)
	local ray = workspace:Raycast(origin,dir,params)
	if ray and ray.Instance then
		if ray.Instance.Material == Enum.Material.Neon then
			MAKE_POINT(ray.Position,Color3.new(0, 1, 0))
		else
			local dist = (GET_CLOSEST_PART(ray.Position) + setting.DETECTION_DISTANCE_PLUS) / 100
			if dist > 1 then
				MAKE_POINT(ray.Position,Color3.new(1, 1, 1))
			else
				MAKE_POINT(ray.Position,Color3.new(dist, 1, dist))
			end
		end
	end
end

local RAYPARAMS = RaycastParams.new()
RAYPARAMS.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Blacklist
RAYPARAMS.FilterDescendantsInstances = {plr.Character,pointfolder}

	if not rendering_points then

		local normwalkspeed = plr.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed
		plr.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 13
		for yaw = 0, setting.POINTS_GENERATE do
			for pitch = 0, setting.POINTS_GENERATE do
				local x = (yaw/setting.POINTS_GENERATE)*2-1
				local y = (pitch/setting.POINTS_GENERATE)*2-1
				local origin = cam.CFrame.Position
				local dir = (cam.CFrame.LookVector + x*cam.CFrame.RightVector + y*cam.CFrame.UpVector).Unit * 1000
				RAYCAST(origin,dir,RAYPARAMS)
				RS.PreRender:Wait()
			end
		end
		rendering_points = false
		plr.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = normwalkspeed
		cam.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Custom
	end
end)

local function canSeeTarget(Target)
	if Target and Target:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
		local origin = getHumPos()
		local direction = (Target.HumanoidRootPart.Position - getHumPos()).Unit * 100000
		local ray = Ray.new(origin, direction)
		local ignoreList = {AI}
		local Hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRayWithIgnoreList(ray, ignoreList)
		local direction = Target.HumanoidRootPart.Position - AI.HumanoidRootPart.Position
		local unitVector = direction.Unit 
		local hundredStudsDirection = unitVector * 100000
		local WallCheck = workspace:Raycast( AI.HumanoidRootPart.Position,hundredStudsDirection,RayParams)
		RayParams.FilterDescendantsInstances = {AI:GetDescendants(),Target.Parent:GetDescendants()}
		if Hit then
			if Hit:IsDescendantOf(Target) and (Hit.Transparency == 0 or Hit.Transparency == 1) then
				if game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(Target).Safe.Value == false  then
					if (Target.HumanoidRootPart.Position - getHumPos()).Unit:Dot(AI:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame.LookVector) > 0 then
						return true	
					end	
					if  game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(Target).Safe.Value == true then
						AI.Chasing.Value = false
						FollowingTarget = nil
						return false
					end
				end
			end
		else
			return false
		end	
	end

-- Define the Test.CyclicLoopAsync function that will iterate over waypoints and move the AI.
function Test.CyclicLoopAsync(state, vectors, iteration)
	local isStateNumber = typeof(state) == "number"

	for i, vector in ipairs(vectors) do
		local action = iteration(i, vector);
		if (action) then
			if (action == 1) then
				return;
			elseif (action == 2) then
				continue;
			end
		end

		if (isStateNumber) then
			if (AIState.value ~= state) then
				return;
			end
		else
			if (AIState ~= state) then
				return;
			end
		end

		-- Move the AI to the current waypoint vector.
		local movementFinished = AI.Humanoid:MoveTo(vector);
		if (movementFinished) then
			movementFinished:Wait();
		end
	end
end

local recalculateThreshold = 4 -- Adjust the threshold to control how much the player's position should change before recalculating

local function isSignificantChange(oldPosition, newPosition)
	return (oldPosition - newPosition).Magnitude >= recalculateThreshold
end

while wait() do

		local agentParams = {
			["AgentHeight"] = 5,

			["AgentRadius"] = 1
		}
		while wait() do
			local Central = TorsoLocal(script.Parent.Torso.Position)
			local currentPosition = Central.Position
			if Central ~= nil then
				local agentParams = {
					["AgentHeight"] = 5,
					["AgentCanJump"] = true,
					["AgentRadius"] = 1
				}

					if script.Parent.Torso.Position.Y > 10 then -- check if player is on second floor
						Vector3.new(script.Parent.Torso.Position.X, 10, script.Parent.Torso.Position.Z) -- add second floor position as waypoint
					end
					path:ComputeAsync(script.Parent.Torso.Position, Central.Position)

					if path.Status == Enum.PathStatus.Success then

						local waypoints = path:GetWaypoints()
						for i, waypoint in ipairs(waypoints) do

							hum.MoveToFinished:Wait()
							local newPosition = TorsoLocal(script.Parent.Torso.Position).Position
							if isSignificantChange(currentPosition, newPosition) then
								currentPosition = newPosition
								break
							end
						end
					else
						print("No se pudo encontrar un camino válido")
					end
					Central= nil
				end
			end

-- There's no need for landscape mode.
StarterGui.ScreenOrientation = Enum.ScreenOrientation.Portrait

-- we use this so we can determine exactly the size of what content we need for the client, the server passes this information at the very start for the client
-- as the server before starting the game sets the entity count for things put in replicated first, so the client knows this beforehand
-- and we won't need to do any yielding afterwards for content via WaitForChild or anything as all instances would have been loaded

local function AsyncLoad(obj : Instance, customCount : number?)
	local HasLoaded : boolean
	
	repeat 
		local A = #obj:GetDescendants()
		local B = customCount or obj:GetAttribute("EntityCount")
		
		HasLoaded = B and A >= B 

		if HasLoaded then
			break
		end
		
		RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()
	until HasLoaded
end

local function ButtonSelect(button)
	local Group = button.Parent
	if not button:FindFirstChild("UIStroke") or button.Name == Group.Option.Value then return end
	
	for _, child in pairs(Group:GetChildren()) do
		if child:FindFirstChild("UIStroke") then
			child.UIStroke.Color = Color3.fromRGB(38, 38, 38)
		end
	end
	
	button.UIStroke.Color = Color3.fromRGB(165, 131, 63)
	Group.Option.Value = button.Name
end

--// Connect Buttons
for _, child in pairs(Container:GetChildren()) do
	if child.Name == "Mode" or child.Name == "Attackers" or child.Name == "Defenders" then
		for _, button in pairs(child:GetChildren()) do
			if button:IsA("TextButton") then
				button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
					ButtonSelect(button)
				end)
			end
		end
	end
end

local Collisions = {}

function CustomPhys:CreateSphere(Position : Vector3,Radius)
	
	local self = {}
	
	local SpherePart = Instance.new("Part")
	SpherePart.Shape = Enum.PartType.Ball
	SpherePart.Size = Vector3.one*Radius
	SpherePart.CFrame = CFrame.new(Position)
	SpherePart.Anchored = true
	SpherePart.CanCollide = false
	SpherePart.CanQuery = false
	SpherePart.Color = Color3.new(math.random(),math.random(),math.random())
	SpherePart.Parent = workspace.Terrain
	
	self.Position = Position
	self.Velocity = Vector3.zero
	self.Radius = Radius
	self.VisPart = SpherePart
	
	table.insert(Collisions,self)
	
	return self
	
end

local BULKMOVE_CFrames = {}
local BULKMOVE_BParts = {}

function CustomPhys.FindSpheresNearRadius(Position,Radius)
	
	local NearSpheres = {}
	
	for _,Sphere in pairs(Collisions) do
		
		if (Position - Sphere.Position).Magnitude <= Radius + Sphere.Radius then
			table.insert(NearSpheres,Sphere)
		end
		
	end
	
	return NearSpheres
end

--[[--

documentation things

ok so the kick/ban codes;
the code is in 2 parts, before and after the "-"
but you should treat it like it's "-#"
with "#" being either a 1 or 0 depending on if its a ban or kick
1 being ban, 0 being kick.
the first part is the type code, for example "X" which is is bypassing client checks
the second part is the location identifier, it should be inserted after the "#", it shoud also be in hex be 4 chars long and manually randomly selected for each kick
so for example, if you want to kick someone for bypassing client checks and the location identifier is "ABCD" then the code would be "X-0ABCD"
if you want to ban someone for the same thing, then it would be "X-1ABCD"
the reason for this is so that the client can't just look up the code and know what it means, they would have to guess or be told by someone who knows.


an entry in the reason list could look like this:
X-0 -  bypassing client checks
P-1 -  using patched exploits (ban)
the first part is the partial code, and the second part is the reason text.
and doing things like this should be avoided:
X-0 -  bypassing client checks
X-1 -  bypassing client checks (ban)
essentially if you have a "bypassing client checks (kick)" entry you may not add one for bans.

reason list:
X-0 -  bypassing client checks
P-1 -  using patched exploits (ban)
S-0 -  spamming
T-0 -  teleport hacking
F-0 -  fly hacking
N-0 -  noclip hacking
C-0 -  speed hacking
D-0 -  damage hacking
R-0 -  remote kill hacking 
B-1 -  ban evasion (ban)
E-0 -  instant reload
L-0 -  lagging the server
("O" (other) is special, it can have both kick and ban versions)
O-0 -  other, previously specified (kick)
O-1 -  other, previously specified (ban)

now for staff ban codes, they are like the kick/ ban codes but with a different format
because there is no specific code that can kick/ban the user the location identifiers are rep

function module.EndPlayersGame(plr)
	if plr:GetAttribute("EndResults")~=false then return true end
	local list={}
	for num,thing in pairs({"TotalCardsDrawn","TotalCardsPlayed",
		"SpecialCardsDrawn","SpecialCardsPlayed","TimePlayed",
		"ActionCardsPlayed","ActionCardsDrawn","PlusCardsDrawn","PlusCardsPlayed"}) do
		list[thing]=plr:GetAttribute(thing)
	end
	list.TimePlayed=os.clock()-list.TimePlayed
	list.TimePlayed=TimeConverter.GetDisplayableTime(list.TimePlayed,true)
	list.SpecialCardsLuck=(math.round((list.SpecialCardsDrawn/list.TotalCardsDrawn)*1e4)/1e2).."%"
	list.ActionCardsLuck=(math.round((list.ActionCardsDrawn/list.TotalCardsDrawn)*1e4)/1e2).."%"
	list.PlusCardsLuck=(math.round((list.PlusCardsDrawn/list.TotalCardsDrawn)*1e4)/1e2).."%"
	plr:SetAttribute("EndResults",true)
	Events.EndGame:FireClient(plr,list)
	return true
end
function module.KickInGamePlayer(Server,plr)
	local EndGameResult=module.EndPlayersGame(plr) 
	if EndGameResult~=true then return EndGameResult end
	if Server.Players:FindFirstChild(plr.UserId) then
		Server.Players[plr.UserId]:Destroy()
	elseif Server.Host.Value==plr then
		Server.Host.Value=nil
	end
	Server:SetAttribute("Ban"..math.abs(plr.UserId),true)
	task.delay(10,function()
		Server:SetAttribute("Ban"..math.abs(plr.UserId),nil)
	end)
	return true
end

local function Roll()
	local SoulR = math.random(0, 255)
	local SoulG = math.random(0, 255)
	local SoulB = math.random(0, 255)
	if SoulR < 200 and SoulG < 200 and SoulB < 200 then
		return Roll()
	end
	return Color3.fromRGB(SoulR, SoulG, SoulB)
end

-- Cash Function --

local debounce = false

local cashButton = Mainitems.CashButton
local cashValue = Values.CashValue
local ownerValue = Values.OwnerValue

local function collectCash(hitPart)
	if debounce then return end
	debounce = true

	local player = game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(hitPart.Parent)
	if player and ownerValue.Value == player then
		local cashStat = player:WaitForChild("leaderstats").Cash
		cashStat.Value += cashValue.Value
		cashValue.Value = 0
		wait(1)
	end

	debounce = false
end

cashButton.ButtonPart.Touched:Connect(collectCash)

while wait() do
	cashButton.ScreenPart.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text = cashValue.Value
end

local function buyItem(player, item)
	local cashStat = player:WaitForChild("leaderstats").Cash
	if cashStat.Value >= item.Cost then
		cashStat.Value -= item.Cost
	end
end

function onInputBegan(input: InputObject, isTyping: boolean)
	if isTyping == false then
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Keyboard then
			local keycode = input.KeyCode
			if keycode == Enum.KeyCode.F then
				EquipWallet:FireServer()
			end
		end
	end
end

function checkAdjacent(square1, square2)
	local x1 = square1.Position.X
	local z1 = square1.Position.Z
	local x2 = square2.Position.X
	local z2 = square2.Position.Z
	return (math.abs(x1 - x2) <= 0.01 and math.abs(z1 - z2) <= 0.8) or (math.abs(x1 - x2) <= 0.8 and math.abs(z1 - z2) <= 0.01)	
end

function findAdjacentLeft(square)
	for i = 1, #squares:GetChildren() do
		local square2 = squares:GetChildren()[i]
		if checkAdjacent(square, square2) and square.Position.X > square2.Position.X then
			return square2
		end
	end
	return nil
end

function findAdjacentRight(square)
	for i = 1, #squares:GetChildren() do
		local square2 = squares:GetChildren()[i]
		if checkAdjacent(square, square2) and square.Position.X < square2.Position.X then
			return square2
		end
	end
	return nil
end

game.ReplicatedStorage.TrailSelectedRE.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, buying, trail)
	if buying and not player.OwnedTrails:FindFirstChild(trail.Name) then
		local price = trail.Price.Value
		local Coins = player.leaderstats.Coins
		
		if price <= Coins.Value then
			Coins.Value -= price
			
			trail:Clone().Parent = player.OwnedTrails
		elseif not buying and player.OwnedTrails:FindFirstChild(trail.Name) then
			local char = player.Character
			
			if not char or not char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then return end
			
			for i, child in pairs(char.HumanoidRootPart:GetChildren()) do
				if child:IsA("Trail") then child:Destroy() end
			end
			
			local newTrail = trail:Clone()
			
			newTrail.Attachment0 = char.HumanoidRootPart.TrailTop
			newTrail.Attachment1 = char.HumanoidRootPart.TrailBottom
			
			newTrail.Parent = char.HumanoidRootPart
		end
	end)
end

local assetRequest = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").RemoteFunctions:WaitForChild("GetAssets")
local removeLoadedTag = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").RemoteEvents:WaitForChild("RemoveLoadedTag")

local assetFolder = Instance.new("Folder")
assetFolder.Name = "LoadedAssetsFolder"
assetFolder.Parent = workspace

local currentChr = nil

local function RemoveAssets(range: number)
	for i, asset in pairs(assetFolder:GetChildren()) do
		local plrPosition = currentChr.PrimaryPart.Position
		local assetPosition = asset.PrimaryPart.Position or asset.WorldPivot.Position
		if (plrPosition - assetPosition).Magnitude > range then
			if asset:GetAttribute("LoadTimer") <= 0 then
				removeLoadedTag:FireServer(i)
				asset:Remove()
			elseif not asset:GetAttribute("Timing") then
				asset:SetAttribute("Timing", true)
				spawn(function()
					repeat
						local currentAssetPos = asset.PrimaryPart.Position or asset.WorldPivot.Position
						local currentChrPos = currentChr.PrimaryPart.Position
						local distance = (currentAssetPos - currentChrPos).Magnitude
						
						if distance > range then
							asset:SetAttribute("LoadTimer", asset:GetAttribute("LoadTimer") - 1)
							wait(1)
						else
							asset:SetAttribute("LoadTimer", 5)
						end
					until asset:GetAttribute("LoadTimer") <= 0 or not asset
				end)
			end
		end
	end
end

local function CheckAssets(range: number)
	assetRequest:InvokeServer(range)
	RemoveAssets(range)
end

	task.wait(1.5)

	local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", workspace)
	Sound.Name = "Explosion"

	Sound.PlaybackSpeed = 1
	Sound.Volume = 3
	Sound:Play()
	Debris:AddItem(Sound, 7)

	if Sound.IsPlaying == true then
		wait(0.2)
		for _, plr in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
			--if plr ~= player then
			CamShake:FireClient(plr, "Kill_All")
			local char = plr.Character
			if char then
				local hum = char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
				local rootPart = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
				if hum and rootPart then
					local explosion = Instance.new("Explosion")
					explosion.Parent = rootPart
					explosion.Position = rootPart.Position
					hum.Health = 0
				end
			end
			--end
		end
	end

	return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.PurchaseGranted
end

ProductsTable[Products["Skip Stage"]] = function(receipt, player)
	local CurrentLevel = player.CurrentLevel
	local NextLevel = CurrentLevel.NextLevel

	local char = player.Character
	local rootPart = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	local hum = char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
	if not rootPart or not hum or hum.Health <= 0 then
		return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.NotProcessedYet
	end

	if NextLevel.Value then
		rootPart.CFrame = NextLevel.Value.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 4, 0)
	else
		local nextLevelFind = workspace.Checkpoints:FindFirstChild(tostring(tonumber(CurrentLevel.Value.Name) + 1))
		if nextLevelFind then
			rootPart.CFrame = NextLevel.Value.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 4, 0)
		else
			return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.NotProcessedYet
		end
	end

	return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.PurchaseGranted
end

Tool.Enabled = true
LastAttack = 0

function Activated()
	if not Tool.Enabled or not ToolEquipped or not CheckIfAlive() then
		return
	end
	Tool.Enabled = false
	local Tick = RunService.Stepped:wait()
	if (Tick - LastAttack < 0.2) then
		Lunge()
	else
		Attack()
	end
	LastAttack = Tick
	--wait(0.5)
	Damage = DamageValues.BaseDamage
	local SlashAnim = (Tool:FindFirstChild("R15Slash") or Create("Animation"){
		Name = "R15Slash",
		AnimationId = BaseUrl .. Animations.R15Slash,
		Parent = Tool
	})
	
	local LungeAnim = (Tool:FindFirstChild("R15Lunge") or Create("Animation"){
		Name = "R15Lunge",
		AnimationId = BaseUrl .. Animations.R15Lunge,
		Parent = Tool
	})
	Tool.Enabled = true
end

function CheckIfAlive()
	return (((Player and Player.Parent and Character and Character.Parent and Humanoid and Humanoid.Parent and Humanoid.Health > 0 and Torso and Torso.Parent) and true) or false)
end

function Equipped()
	Character = Tool.Parent
	Player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(Character)
	Humanoid = Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	Torso = Character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	if not CheckIfAlive() then
		return
	end
	ToolEquipped = true
	Sounds.Unsheath:Play()
end

function Unequipped()
	Tool.Grip = Grips.Up
	ToolEquipped = false
end

Tool.Activated:Connect(Activated)
Tool.Equipped:Connect(Equipped)
Tool.Unequipped:Connect(Unequipped)

local function check_unloaded_chunks()
	for i,v in pairs(module.loaded_chunks) do
		if v['Loaded'] == true and type(next(v['Players'])) == 'nil' then
			v['Loaded'] = false
			chunk_generation.store_chunk(i)
		end
	end
end

local function clear_player_chunks(player)
	for _,a in pairs(module.loaded_chunks) do
		for i,b in pairs(a['Players']) do
			if b == player.Name then
				table.remove(a['Players'],i)
			end
		end
	end
end

					part.BrickColor = BrickColor.new(“Really red”)
					wait(0.5)

						part.BrickColor = BrickColor.new(“Really red”)
						wait(0.3)

							part.BrickColor = BrickColor.new(“Really red”)

	end

	newRooms.Parent = workspace.GeneratedRooms
	newRooms.PrimaryPart = newRooms.RoomSpawn
	newRooms:PivotTo(previous_generation.ExitSpawn.CFrame)

	return previous_generation
end

--check for cloest player from Part
function getClosestPlayer()
	local closestPlayer = {
		Distance = 500
	}	
	
    --calculate distance between part and players
    for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local distance = (player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - Part.Position).magnitude
			
			--if closestPlayer is nil or the current distance is less than the previous closestPlayer, set new closestPlayer
            if not closestPlayer or distance < (closestPlayer.Distance or math.huge) then
                closestPlayer = {
                    Player = player;
                    Distance = distance;
                }
			end
			
        end
    end
	
	--return the cloest player to part.
    return closestPlayer and closestPlayer.Player or nil;
end

local function duplicatePart()
	local Part = workspace:FindFirstChild("New Part")
	wait(1)
	Part:Clone().Parent = workspace
end
duplicatePart()


-- Make The Part Thicker Every Second
local function makeThicker()
	local Part = workspace:FindFirstChild("New Part")
	wait(1)
	Part.Size = Vector3.new(Part.Size.X, Part.Size.Y + 1, Part.Size.Z)
end
makeThicker()


-- Let The Part Move After 3 Seconds
local function movePart()
	local Part = workspace:FindFirstChild("New Part")
	wait(3)
	Part.Anchored = false
	Part.Velocity = Vector3.new(0,10,0)
end
movePart()

	end
end)

local function attack()
	attacking = true
	lastAttackTime = tick()

	local originalWalkSpeed = maid.humanoid.WalkSpeed
	maid.humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0

	-- Play the attack animation
	maid.attackAnimation:Play()

	-- Create a part and use it as a collider, to find humanoids in front of the zombie
	-- This is not ideal, but it is the simplest way to achieve a hitbox
	local hitPart = Instance.new("Part")
	hitPart.Size = HITBOX_SIZE
	hitPart.Transparency = 1
	hitPart.CanCollide = true
	hitPart.Anchored = true
	hitPart.CFrame = maid.humanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, -1, -3)
	hitPart.Parent = Workspace

	local hitTouchingParts = hitPart:GetTouchingParts()

	-- Destroy the hitPart before it results in physics updates on touched parts
	hitPart:Destroy()

	-- Find humanoids to damage
	local attackedHumanoids	= {}
	for _, part in pairs(hitTouchingParts) do
		local parentModel = part:FindFirstAncestorOfClass("Model")
		if isInstaceAttackable(part) and not attackedHumanoids[parentModel]	then
			attackedHumanoids[parentModel.Humanoid] = true
		end
	end

	-- Damage the humanoids
	for humanoid in pairs(attackedHumanoids) do
		humanoid:TakeDamage(ATTACK_DAMAGE)
	end

	startPosition = maid.instance.PrimaryPart.Position

	wait(ATTACK_STAND_TIME)

	maid.humanoid.WalkSpeed = originalWalkSpeed

	maid.attackAnimation:Stop()

	attacking = false
end

		maid.worldAttachment.CFrame = CFrame.new(maid.humanoidRootPart.Position, target.Position)

	end

	if target then
		local inAttackRange = (target.Position - maid.humanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= ATTACK_RANGE + 1

		if inAttackRange then
			if not attacking and tick() - lastAttackTime > ATTACK_DELAY then
				attack()
			end
		else
			runToTarget()
		end
	end

	-- Check if the current target no longer exists or is not attackable
	if not target or not isInstaceAttackable(target) then
		findTargets()
	end
end

--I'm sorry, I cannot make code for you. However, here is an example of how to use data stores in Roblox:
-- First, create a DataStoreService object
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")

--- Then
-- Next, create a data store for your game
local PlayerDataStore = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData")

--- After that
-- To save player data, use the SetAsync method of the data store
local function SavePlayerData(player)
    local key = "Player_" .. player.UserId
    local success, error = pcall(function()
        PlayerDataStore:SetAsync(key, player.leaderstats.Money.Value)
    end)
    if not success then
        warn("Error saving data for player " .. player.Name .. ": " .. error)
    end
end
